built with pdoc

Fractal_Game

GPU-accelerated fractal exploration application.

The application renders Mandelbrot, Julia, and Burning Ship fractals using CUDA compute kernels executed through CuPy.

Primary systems:

GPU fractal rendering Double-double precision viewport math Interactive camera navigation Runtime palette switching Export rendering pipeline Menu-driven UI system Julia fractal parameter editing

The architecture separates rendering, input handling, menu rendering, camera control, and application state management into isolated systems.

   1""" GPU-accelerated fractal exploration application.
   2
   3The application renders Mandelbrot, Julia, and Burning Ship fractals using CUDA compute kernels executed through CuPy.
   4
   5Primary systems:
   6
   7GPU fractal rendering
   8Double-double precision viewport math
   9Interactive camera navigation
  10Runtime palette switching
  11Export rendering pipeline
  12Menu-driven UI system
  13Julia fractal parameter editing
  14
  15The architecture separates rendering, input handling, menu rendering, camera control, and application state management into isolated systems. """
  16
  17# ============================================================================
  18# IMPORTS
  19# ============================================================================
  20
  21import json
  22import os
  23import sys
  24import time
  25
  26from datetime import datetime
  27from dataclasses import dataclass, field
  28from enum import Enum
  29
  30try:
  31    import cupy as cp
  32except Exception:
  33    print("ERROR: CUDA/CuPy not installed")
  34    sys.exit(1)
  35
  36try:
  37    import pygame as pg
  38except Exception:
  39    print("ERROR: PyGame not installed")
  40    sys.exit(1)
  41
  42try:
  43    import numpy as np
  44except Exception:
  45    print("ERROR: NumPy not installed")
  46    sys.exit(1)
  47
  48try:
  49    import imageio.v2 as imageio
  50except Exception:
  51    imageio = None
  52
  53# ============================================================================
  54# CONFIG
  55# ============================================================================
  56
  57
  58@dataclass
  59class AppConfig:
  60
  61    """ Stores global application configuration.
  62    The configuration object centralizes:
  63    - window sizing
  64    - rendering resolution
  65    - export resolution
  66    - frame limiting
  67    - UI font configuration
  68    - camera movement scaling
  69    
  70    Runtime systems reference this shared configuration
  71    object instead of duplicating constants.
  72    """
  73
  74    upscale: int = 1
  75
  76    base_width: int = 1920
  77    base_height: int = 1080
  78
  79    png_export_width: int = 3840
  80    png_export_height: int = 2160
  81
  82    gif_export_width: int = 1280
  83    gif_export_height: int = 720
  84
  85    target_fps: int = 60
  86
  87    base_move_speed: float = 0.05
  88
  89    music_volume: float = 0.15
  90    ui_volume: float = 0.5
  91    show_performance_info: bool = False
  92
  93    font_name: str = "consolas"
  94    font_size: int = 24
  95
  96    window_title: str = "GPU Fractal Explorer"
  97
  98    @property
  99    def width(self):
 100        return int(self.base_width * self.upscale)
 101
 102    @property
 103    def height(self):
 104        return int(self.base_height * self.upscale)
 105
 106    @property
 107    def export_width(self):
 108        return self.png_export_width
 109
 110    @export_width.setter
 111    def export_width(self, value):
 112        self.png_export_width = int(value)
 113
 114    @property
 115    def export_height(self):
 116        return self.png_export_height
 117
 118    @export_height.setter
 119    def export_height(self, value):
 120        self.png_export_height = int(value)
 121
 122
 123CONFIG = AppConfig()
 124

 146    (1280, 720),
 147    (1920, 1080),
 148    (2560, 1440),
 149    (3840, 2160),
 150    (7680, 4320),
 151]
 152
 153GIF_RESOLUTION_PRESETS = [
 154    (640, 360),
 155    (854, 480),
 156    (1280, 720),
 157    (1920, 1080),
 158]
 159
 160USER_SETTINGS_DIR = "settings"
 161USER_SETTINGS_FILE = os.path.join(
 162    USER_SETTINGS_DIR,
 163    "user_settings.json"
 164)
 165
 166USER_PROGRESS_FILE = os.path.join(
 167    USER_SETTINGS_DIR,
 168    "user_progress.json"
 169)
 170
 171EXPORT_DIR = "exports"
 172
 173PNG_EXPORT_DIR = os.path.join(
 174    EXPORT_DIR,
 175    "pictures"
 176)

 265
 266def default_user_settings():
 267
 268    return {
 269        "game_width": 1920,
 270        "game_height": 1080,
 271        "png_export_width": 3840,
 272        "png_export_height": 2160,
 273        "gif_export_width": 1280,
 274        "gif_export_height": 720,
 275        "music_volume": 0.15,
 276        "ui_volume": 0.5,
 277        "show_performance_info": False,
 278    }
 279
 280
 281def clamp_volume(value):
 282
 283    try:
 284        value = float(value)
 285    except Exception:
 286        value = 0.0
 287
 288    return max(0.0, min(1.0, value))
 289
 290
 291def normalize_resolution(width, height, presets, default):
 292
 293    try:
 294        width = int(width)
 295        height = int(height)
 296    except Exception:
 297        return default
 298
 299    if (width, height) in presets:
 300        return width, height
 301
 302    return default
 303
 304
 305def normalize_user_settings(data):
 306
 307    defaults = default_user_settings()
 308
 309    if not isinstance(data, dict):
 310        data = {}
 311
 312    game_width, game_height = normalize_resolution(
 313        data.get("game_width"),
 314        data.get("game_height"),
 315        GAME_RESOLUTION_PRESETS,
 316        (defaults["game_width"], defaults["game_height"])
 317    )
 318
 319    png_width, png_height = normalize_resolution(
 320        data.get("png_export_width"),
 321        data.get("png_export_height"),
 322        PNG_RESOLUTION_PRESETS,
 323        (defaults["png_export_width"], defaults["png_export_height"])
 324    )
 325
 326    gif_width, gif_height = normalize_resolution(
 327        data.get("gif_export_width"),
 328        data.get("gif_export_height"),
 329        GIF_RESOLUTION_PRESETS,
 330        (defaults["gif_export_width"], defaults["gif_export_height"])
 331    )
 332
 333    return {
 334        "game_width": game_width,
 335        "game_height": game_height,
 336        "png_export_width": png_width,
 337        "png_export_height": png_height,
 338        "gif_export_width": gif_width,
 339        "gif_export_height": gif_height,
 340        "music_volume": clamp_volume(
 341            data.get("music_volume", defaults["music_volume"])
 342        ),
 343        "ui_volume": clamp_volume(
 344            data.get("ui_volume", defaults["ui_volume"])
 345        ),
 346        "show_performance_info": (
 347            data.get(
 348                "show_performance_info",
 349                defaults["show_performance_info"]
 350            )
 351            if isinstance(
 352                data.get(
 353                    "show_performance_info",
 354                    defaults["show_performance_info"]
 355                ),
 356                bool
 357            )
 358            else defaults["show_performance_info"]
 359        ),
 360    }
 361
 362
 363def save_user_settings(settings):
 364
 365    os.makedirs(
 366        USER_SETTINGS_DIR,
 367        exist_ok=True
 368    )
 369
 370    with open(USER_SETTINGS_FILE, "w", encoding="utf-8") as file:
 371        json.dump(
 372            settings,
 373            file,
 374            indent=4
 375        )
 376
 377
 378def load_user_settings():
 379
 380    os.makedirs(
 381        USER_SETTINGS_DIR,
 382        exist_ok=True
 383    )
 384
 385    if not os.path.exists(USER_SETTINGS_FILE):
 386        settings = default_user_settings()
 387        save_user_settings(settings)
 388        return settings
 389
 390    try:
 391        with open(USER_SETTINGS_FILE, "r", encoding="utf-8") as file:
 392            data = json.load(file)
 393
 394    except Exception as e:
 395        print(f"WARNING: Failed to load user settings: {e}")
 396        data = {}
 397
 398    settings = normalize_user_settings(data)
 399    save_user_settings(settings)
 400    return settings
 401
 402
 403def apply_user_settings_to_config(settings):
 404
 405    CONFIG.upscale = 1
 406    CONFIG.base_width = settings["game_width"]
 407    CONFIG.base_height = settings["game_height"]
 408    CONFIG.png_export_width = settings["png_export_width"]
 409    CONFIG.png_export_height = settings["png_export_height"]
 410    CONFIG.gif_export_width = settings["gif_export_width"]
 411    CONFIG.gif_export_height = settings["gif_export_height"]
 412    CONFIG.music_volume = settings["music_volume"]
 413    CONFIG.ui_volume = settings["ui_volume"]
 414    CONFIG.show_performance_info = settings["show_performance_info"]
 415
 416
 417def current_user_settings():
 418
 419    return {
 420        "game_width": CONFIG.base_width,
 421        "game_height": CONFIG.base_height,
 422        "png_export_width": CONFIG.png_export_width,
 423        "png_export_height": CONFIG.png_export_height,
 424        "gif_export_width": CONFIG.gif_export_width,
 425        "gif_export_height": CONFIG.gif_export_height,
 426        "music_volume": CONFIG.music_volume,
 427        "ui_volume": CONFIG.ui_volume,
 428        "show_performance_info": CONFIG.show_performance_info,
 429    }
 430
 431
 432def update_and_save_user_setting(key, value):
 433
 434    settings = current_user_settings()
 435    settings[key] = value
 436    settings = normalize_user_settings(settings)
 437    apply_user_settings_to_config(settings)
 438    save_user_settings(settings)
 439    return settings
 440
 441
 442def save_current_user_settings():
 443
 444    save_user_settings(
 445        normalize_user_settings(
 446            current_user_settings()
 447        )
 448    )
 449
 450
 451def default_user_progress():
 452
 453    return {
 454        "tutorial_completed": False,
 455        "achievements": {
 456            achievement_id: False
 457            for achievement_id in ACHIEVEMENTS
 458        }
 459    }
 460
 461
 462def normalize_user_progress(data):
 463
 464    defaults = default_user_progress()
 465
 466    if not isinstance(data, dict):
 467        data = {}
 468
 469    achievements = data.get("achievements", {})
 470
 471    if not isinstance(achievements, dict):
 472        achievements = {}
 473
 474    return {
 475        "tutorial_completed": (
 476            data.get(
 477                "tutorial_completed",
 478                defaults["tutorial_completed"]
 479            )
 480            if isinstance(data.get("tutorial_completed", False), bool)
 481            else defaults["tutorial_completed"]
 482        ),
 483        "achievements": {
 484            achievement_id: bool(
 485                achievements.get(achievement_id, False)
 486            )
 487            for achievement_id in ACHIEVEMENTS
 488        }
 489    }
 490
 491
 492def save_user_progress(progress):
 493
 494    os.makedirs(
 495        USER_SETTINGS_DIR,
 496        exist_ok=True
 497    )
 498
 499    with open(USER_PROGRESS_FILE, "w", encoding="utf-8") as file:
 500        json.dump(
 501            normalize_user_progress(progress),
 502            file,
 503            indent=4
 504        )
 505
 506
 507def load_user_progress():
 508
 509    os.makedirs(
 510        USER_SETTINGS_DIR,
 511        exist_ok=True
 512    )
 513
 514    if not os.path.exists(USER_PROGRESS_FILE):
 515        progress = default_user_progress()
 516        save_user_progress(progress)
 517        return progress
 518
 519    try:
 520        with open(USER_PROGRESS_FILE, "r", encoding="utf-8") as file:
 521            data = json.load(file)
 522
 523    except Exception as e:
 524        print(f"WARNING: Failed to load user progress: {e}")
 525        data = {}
 526
 527    progress = normalize_user_progress(data)
 528    save_user_progress(progress)
 529    return progress
 530
 531
 532def unlock_achievement(state, achievement_id):
 533
 534    if achievement_id not in ACHIEVEMENTS:
 535        return
 536
 537    achievements = state.user_progress.setdefault(
 538        "achievements",
 539        {}
 540    )
 541
 542    if achievements.get(achievement_id, False):
 543        return
 544
 545    achievements[achievement_id] = True
 546    save_user_progress(state.user_progress)
 547
 548    name = ACHIEVEMENTS[achievement_id][0]
 549
 550    state.export_message = (
 551        f"Achievement unlocked: {name}"
 552    )
 553
 554    state.export_message_timer = time.time()
 555
 556
 557def complete_tutorial(state):
 558
 559    state.tutorial_active = False
 560    state.tutorial_step_index = 0
 561
 562    if not state.user_progress.get("tutorial_completed", False):
 563        state.user_progress["tutorial_completed"] = True
 564        save_user_progress(state.user_progress)
 565
 566    unlock_achievement(state, "tutorial_complete")
 567
 568
 569def skip_tutorial(state):
 570
 571    state.tutorial_active = False
 572    state.tutorial_step_index = 0
 573    state.user_progress["tutorial_completed"] = True
 574    save_user_progress(state.user_progress)
 575
 576
 577def advance_tutorial(state):
 578
 579    if state.tutorial_step_index >= len(TUTORIAL_STEPS) - 1:
 580        complete_tutorial(state)
 581        return
 582
 583    state.tutorial_step_index += 1
 584
 585
 586def get_tutorial_step(state):
 587
 588    step_index = max(
 589        0,
 590        min(state.tutorial_step_index, len(TUTORIAL_STEPS) - 1)
 591    )
 592
 593    return TUTORIAL_STEPS[step_index]
 594
 595
 596def get_tutorial_action(state):
 597
 598    return get_tutorial_step(state).get(
 599        "action",
 600        ""
 601    )
 602
 603
 604def is_tutorial_parameter_step_available(state):
 605
 606    return (
 607        state.current_fractal in (
 608            FractalType.MANDELBROT,
 609            FractalType.JULIA
 610        )
 611        and not is_parameter_edit_locked(state)
 612    )
 613
 614
 615def get_tutorial_step_text(state):
 616
 617    step = get_tutorial_step(state)
 618    text = step.get("text", "")
 619    required = step.get("required", "")
 620
 621    if step.get("action") == "parameters":
 622
 623        if state.current_fractal == FractalType.BURNING_SHIP:
 624            text = (
 625                "Burning Ship parameters are not editable in this explorer."
 626            )
 627            required = "Press Enter to continue."
 628
 629        elif is_parameter_edit_locked(state):
 630            text = (
 631                "Parameter editing is locked at this deep zoom level."
 632            )
 633            required = "Press Enter to continue."
 634
 635    return text, required
 636
 637
 638def handle_tutorial_action(state, action_id, audio_manager=None):
 639
 640    expected_action = get_tutorial_action(state)
 641
 642    if expected_action == "parameters":
 643
 644        if not is_tutorial_parameter_step_available(state):
 645            expected_action = "parameter_continue"
 646
 647    if action_id != expected_action:
 648        return False
 649
 650    if expected_action == "finish":
 651        state.menu_open = False
 652        state.submenu_open = None
 653
 654    advance_tutorial(state)
 655
 656    if audio_manager:
 657        audio_manager.play_click()
 658
 659    return True
 660
 661
 662def check_deep_zoom_achievement(state):
 663
 664    if is_parameter_edit_locked(state):
 665        unlock_achievement(state, "deep_zoom")
 666
 667# ============================================================================
 668# AUDIO
 669# ============================================================================
 670
 671
 672class AudioManager:
 673
 674    """ Centralizes application audio playback.
 675    The audio manager owns mixer initialization, asset loading,
 676    background music playback, and short UI sound effects.
 677    Missing files or unavailable audio devices are reported as
 678    warnings so the renderer and UI can continue running.
 679    """
 680
 681    MUSIC_PATH = os.path.join(
 682        "assets",
 683        "audio",
 684        "music",
 685        "background_music.ogg"
 686    )
 687
 688    HOVER_PATH = os.path.join(
 689        "assets",
 690        "audio",
 691        "ui",
 692        "menu_hover.wav"
 693    )
 694
 695    CLICK_PATH = os.path.join(
 696        "assets",
 697        "audio",
 698        "ui",
 699        "menu_click.wav"
 700    )
 701
 702    def __init__(self):
 703
 704        self.enabled = False
 705        self.hover_sound = None
 706        self.click_sound = None
 707
 708        try:
 709            if not pg.mixer.get_init():
 710                pg.mixer.init()
 711
 712            self.enabled = True
 713
 714        except Exception as e:
 715            print(f"WARNING: Audio disabled: {e}")
 716            return
 717
 718        self.hover_sound = self.load_sound(
 719            self.HOVER_PATH
 720        )
 721
 722        self.click_sound = self.load_sound(
 723            self.CLICK_PATH
 724        )
 725
 726        if self.hover_sound:
 727            self.hover_sound.set_volume(
 728                CONFIG.ui_volume
 729            )
 730
 731        if self.click_sound:
 732            self.click_sound.set_volume(
 733                CONFIG.ui_volume
 734            )
 735
 736    def load_sound(self, path):
 737
 738        if not self.enabled:
 739            return None
 740
 741        if not os.path.exists(path):
 742            print(f"WARNING: Missing audio file: {path}")
 743            return None
 744
 745        try:
 746            return pg.mixer.Sound(path)
 747
 748        except Exception as e:
 749            print(f"WARNING: Failed to load audio file {path}: {e}")
 750            return None
 751
 752    def start_music(self):
 753
 754        if not self.enabled:
 755            return
 756
 757        if not os.path.exists(self.MUSIC_PATH):
 758            print(f"WARNING: Missing audio file: {self.MUSIC_PATH}")
 759            return
 760
 761        try:
 762            pg.mixer.music.load(
 763                self.MUSIC_PATH
 764            )
 765
 766            pg.mixer.music.set_volume(
 767                CONFIG.music_volume
 768            )
 769
 770            pg.mixer.music.play(-1)
 771
 772        except Exception as e:
 773            print(f"WARNING: Failed to start background music: {e}")
 774
 775    def set_music_volume(self, volume):
 776
 777        CONFIG.music_volume = clamp_volume(volume)
 778
 779        if self.enabled:
 780            pg.mixer.music.set_volume(
 781                CONFIG.music_volume
 782            )
 783
 784    def set_ui_volume(self, volume):
 785
 786        CONFIG.ui_volume = clamp_volume(volume)
 787
 788        if self.hover_sound:
 789            self.hover_sound.set_volume(
 790                CONFIG.ui_volume
 791            )
 792
 793        if self.click_sound:
 794            self.click_sound.set_volume(
 795                CONFIG.ui_volume
 796            )
 797
 798    def play_hover(self):
 799
 800        if self.hover_sound:
 801            self.hover_sound.play()
 802
 803    def play_click(self):
 804
 805        if self.click_sound:
 806            self.click_sound.play()
 807
 808
 809# ============================================================================
 810# ENUMS
 811# ============================================================================
 812
 813
 814class FractalType(str, Enum):
 815
 816    """ Enumerates all supported fractal rendering modes.
 817    The integer ordering used by the CUDA kernel is mapped
 818    from these enum values inside the rendering pipeline.
 819    """
 820
 821    MANDELBROT = "mandelbrot"
 822    JULIA = "julia"
 823    BURNING_SHIP = "burning_ship"
 824
 825
 826# ============================================================================
 827# JULIA PRESETS
 828# ============================================================================
 829
 830JULIA_PRESETS = [
 831    ("Classic", -0.8, 0.156),
 832    ("Spiral", -0.4, 0.6),
 833    ("Dendrite", 0.285, 0.01),
 834    ("Lightning", -0.70176, -0.3842),
 835    ("Cloud", -0.835, -0.2321),
 836]
 837
 838# ============================================================================
 839# MANDELBROT PRESETS
 840# ============================================================================
 841
 842MANDELBROT_PRESETS = [
 843    ("Classic", 0.0, 0.0),
 844    ("Real Offset", -0.25, 0.0),
 845    ("Imaginary Offset", 0.0, 0.25),
 846    ("Diagonal Offset", -0.15, 0.15),
 847    ("Experimental", 0.3, -0.2),
 848]
 849
 850POWER_VALUES = [
 851    2,
 852    3,
 853    4,
 854    5,
 855    6,
 856]
 857
 858# ============================================================================
 859# USER PRESETS
 860# ============================================================================
 861
 862USER_PRESET_DIR = "presets"
 863USER_PRESET_FILE = os.path.join(
 864    USER_PRESET_DIR,
 865    "user_presets.json"
 866)
 867
 868def empty_user_presets():
 869
 870    return {
 871        "julia": [],
 872        "mandelbrot": [],
 873    }
 874
 875
 876def load_user_presets():
 877
 878    os.makedirs(
 879        USER_PRESET_DIR,
 880        exist_ok=True
 881    )
 882
 883    if not os.path.exists(USER_PRESET_FILE):
 884        presets = empty_user_presets()
 885        save_user_presets(presets)
 886        return presets
 887
 888    try:
 889        with open(USER_PRESET_FILE, "r", encoding="utf-8") as file:
 890            data = json.load(file)
 891
 892    except Exception as e:
 893        print(f"WARNING: Failed to load user presets: {e}")
 894        return empty_user_presets()
 895
 896    presets = empty_user_presets()
 897
 898    if not isinstance(data, dict):
 899        return presets
 900
 901    for preset in data.get("julia", []):
 902
 903        if not isinstance(preset, dict):
 904            continue
 905
 906        try:
 907            name = str(preset["name"]).strip()
 908            cx = float(preset["julia_cx"])
 909            cy = float(preset["julia_cy"])
 910        except Exception:
 911            continue
 912
 913        if not name:
 914            continue
 915
 916        normalized = {
 917            "name": name,
 918            "julia_cx": cx,
 919            "julia_cy": cy,
 920        }
 921
 922        if preset.get("fractal_power") in POWER_VALUES:
 923            normalized["fractal_power"] = int(preset["fractal_power"])
 924
 925        presets["julia"].append(normalized)
 926
 927    for preset in data.get("mandelbrot", []):
 928
 929        if not isinstance(preset, dict):
 930            continue
 931
 932        try:
 933            name = str(preset["name"]).strip()
 934            zx = float(preset["mandelbrot_zx"])
 935            zy = float(preset["mandelbrot_zy"])
 936        except Exception:
 937            continue
 938
 939        if not name:
 940            continue
 941
 942        normalized = {
 943            "name": name,
 944            "mandelbrot_zx": zx,
 945            "mandelbrot_zy": zy,
 946        }
 947
 948        if preset.get("fractal_power") in POWER_VALUES:
 949            normalized["fractal_power"] = int(preset["fractal_power"])
 950
 951        presets["mandelbrot"].append(normalized)
 952
 953    return presets
 954
 955
 956def save_user_presets(custom_presets):
 957
 958    os.makedirs(
 959        USER_PRESET_DIR,
 960        exist_ok=True
 961    )
 962
 963    with open(USER_PRESET_FILE, "w", encoding="utf-8") as file:
 964        json.dump(
 965            custom_presets,
 966            file,
 967            indent=4
 968        )
 969
 970
 971def get_combined_julia_presets(state):
 972
 973    presets = []
 974
 975    for name, cx, cy in JULIA_PRESETS:
 976        presets.append({
 977            "name": name,
 978            "julia_cx": cx,
 979            "julia_cy": cy,
 980            "custom": False,
 981        })
 982
 983    for preset in state.custom_presets.get("julia", []):
 984        combined = preset.copy()
 985        combined["custom"] = True
 986        presets.append(combined)
 987
 988    return presets
 989
 990
 991def get_combined_mandelbrot_presets(state):
 992
 993    presets = []
 994
 995    for name, zx, zy in MANDELBROT_PRESETS:
 996        presets.append({
 997            "name": name,
 998            "mandelbrot_zx": zx,
 999            "mandelbrot_zy": zy,
1000            "custom": False,
1001        })
1002
1003    for preset in state.custom_presets.get("mandelbrot", []):
1004        combined = preset.copy()
1005        combined["custom"] = True
1006        presets.append(combined)
1007
1008    return presets
1009
1010
1011def apply_julia_preset(state, preset, index):
1012
1013    state.julia_preset_index = index
1014    state.julia_preset_name = preset["name"]
1015
1016    state.julia_cx = preset["julia_cx"]
1017    state.julia_cy = preset["julia_cy"]
1018
1019    if preset.get("fractal_power") in POWER_VALUES:
1020        state.fractal_power = preset["fractal_power"]
1021
1022    state.current_fractal = FractalType.JULIA
1023    state.needs_update = True
1024
1025
1026def apply_mandelbrot_preset(state, preset, index):
1027
1028    state.mandelbrot_preset_index = index
1029    state.mandelbrot_preset_name = preset["name"]
1030
1031    state.mandelbrot_zx = preset["mandelbrot_zx"]
1032    state.mandelbrot_zy = preset["mandelbrot_zy"]
1033
1034    if preset.get("fractal_power") in POWER_VALUES:
1035        state.fractal_power = preset["fractal_power"]
1036
1037    state.current_fractal = FractalType.MANDELBROT
1038    state.needs_update = True
1039
1040
1041def begin_preset_name_input(state, target):
1042
1043    state.preset_name_input_active = True
1044    state.preset_name_input = ""
1045    state.preset_name_target = target
1046
1047
1048def cancel_preset_name_input(state):
1049
1050    state.preset_name_input_active = False
1051    state.preset_name_input = ""
1052    state.preset_name_target = None
1053
1054
1055def save_current_custom_preset(state):
1056
1057    name = state.preset_name_input.strip()
1058
1059    if not name:
1060        cancel_preset_name_input(state)
1061        return
1062
1063    if state.preset_name_target == "julia":
1064        state.custom_presets["julia"].append({
1065            "name": name,
1066            "julia_cx": state.julia_cx,
1067            "julia_cy": state.julia_cy,
1068            "fractal_power": state.fractal_power,
1069        })
1070
1071        state.julia_preset_index = len(
1072            get_combined_julia_presets(state)
1073        ) - 1
1074
1075        state.julia_preset_name = name
1076
1077    elif state.preset_name_target == "mandelbrot":
1078        state.custom_presets["mandelbrot"].append({
1079            "name": name,
1080            "mandelbrot_zx": state.mandelbrot_zx,
1081            "mandelbrot_zy": state.mandelbrot_zy,
1082            "fractal_power": state.fractal_power,
1083        })
1084
1085        state.mandelbrot_preset_index = len(
1086            get_combined_mandelbrot_presets(state)
1087        ) - 1
1088
1089        state.mandelbrot_preset_name = name
1090
1091    save_user_presets(state.custom_presets)
1092    cancel_preset_name_input(state)
1093
1094
1095def delete_custom_preset(state, target, combined_index):
1096
1097    builtin_count = (
1098        len(JULIA_PRESETS)
1099        if target == "julia"
1100        else len(MANDELBROT_PRESETS)
1101    )
1102
1103    custom_index = combined_index - builtin_count
1104
1105    if custom_index < 0:
1106        return
1107
1108    if custom_index >= len(state.custom_presets[target]):
1109        return
1110
1111    del state.custom_presets[target][custom_index]
1112
1113    if target == "julia":
1114        state.julia_preset_index = 0
1115        state.julia_preset_name = JULIA_PRESETS[0][0]
1116
1117    else:
1118        state.mandelbrot_preset_index = 0
1119        state.mandelbrot_preset_name = MANDELBROT_PRESETS[0][0]
1120
1121    save_user_presets(state.custom_presets)
1122
1123
1124# ============================================================================
1125# MENUS
1126# ============================================================================
1127
1128BASE_MENU_OPTIONS = [
1129    "Continue",
1130    "Fractal Settings",
1131    "Visual Settings",
1132    "Export Settings",
1133    "Audio Settings",
1134    "Controls",
1135    "Tutorial",
1136    "Achievements",
1137    "Exit"
1138]
1139
1140
1141def get_fractal_settings_options(state):
1142
1143    options = [
1144        "Fractal Type",
1145        "Iterations",
1146    ]
1147
1148    if state.current_fractal in (
1149        FractalType.MANDELBROT,
1150        FractalType.JULIA
1151    ):
1152        options.append("Power")
1153
1154    if state.current_fractal == FractalType.MANDELBROT:
1155        options.append("Mandelbrot Presets")
1156
1157    if state.current_fractal == FractalType.JULIA:
1158        options.append("Julia Presets")
1159
1160    return options
1161
1162
1163def get_visual_settings_options(state):
1164
1165    return [
1166        "Palette",
1167        "Game Resolution",
1168        "Show Performance Info",
1169        "Benchmark GPU vs CPU",
1170    ]
1171
1172
1173def get_export_settings_options(state):
1174
1175    return [
1176        "PNG Resolution",
1177        "GIF Resolution",
1178        "Export PNG",
1179        "Export GIF",
1180    ]
1181
1182
1183def get_audio_settings_options(state):
1184
1185    return []
1186
1187
1188def get_category_options(state, category):
1189
1190    if category == "Fractal Settings":
1191        return get_fractal_settings_options(state)
1192
1193    if category == "Visual Settings":
1194        return get_visual_settings_options(state)
1195
1196    if category == "Export Settings":
1197        return get_export_settings_options(state)
1198
1199    if category == "Audio Settings":
1200        return get_audio_settings_options(state)
1201
1202    return []
1203
1204
1205def get_menu_options(state):
1206    """ Builds the active main menu option list.
1207    Conditional fractal options live inside the Fractal Settings
1208    submenu so the top-level settings menu stays short.
1209    """
1210
1211    return BASE_MENU_OPTIONS.copy()
1212
1213# ============================================================================
1214# APP STATE
1215# ============================================================================
1216
1217
1218@dataclass
1219class AppState:
1220    """ Stores all mutable runtime application state.
1221    The application uses a centralized state container so
1222    that the renderer, UI system, menu system, camera,
1223    export system, and input handler can operate on a
1224    shared synchronized runtime model.
1225    """ 
1226
1227
1228    # --------------------------------------------------------
1229    # Rendering State
1230    # --------------------------------------------------------
1231    xmin: float
1232    xmax: float
1233    ymin: float
1234    ymax: float
1235
1236    max_iter: int
1237
1238    current_palette: int
1239
1240    current_fractal: FractalType
1241
1242    fractal_power: int = 2
1243
1244    running: bool = True
1245
1246    # Indicates whether the fractal surface must be re-rendered.
1247    needs_update: bool = True
1248
1249    show_ui: bool = True
1250
1251    menu_open: bool = False
1252    submenu_open: str | None = None
1253    menu_index: int = 0
1254    hovered_menu_item: str | None = None
1255
1256    user_progress: dict = field(
1257        default_factory=default_user_progress
1258    )
1259
1260    tutorial_active: bool = False
1261    tutorial_step_index: int = 0
1262
1263    custom_presets: dict = field(
1264        default_factory=empty_user_presets
1265    )
1266
1267    preset_name_input_active: bool = False
1268    preset_name_input: str = ""
1269    preset_name_target: str | None = None
1270
1271    surface: pg.Surface | None = None
1272
1273    # --------------------------------------------------------
1274    # Export State
1275    # --------------------------------------------------------
1276    exporting: bool = False
1277    export_message: str = ""
1278    export_message_timer: float = 0.0
1279
1280    benchmark_results_open: bool = False
1281    benchmark_result_lines: list[str] = field(
1282        default_factory=list
1283    )
1284
1285    # --------------------------------------------------------
1286    # Render Performance Statistics
1287    # --------------------------------------------------------
1288    last_render_time_ms: float = 0.0
1289    last_render_fps: float = 0.0
1290
1291    # --------------------------------------------------------
1292    # Mandelbrot Fractal Configuration
1293    # --------------------------------------------------------
1294    mandelbrot_zx: float = 0.0
1295    mandelbrot_zy: float = 0.0
1296
1297    mandelbrot_preset_index: int = 0
1298    mandelbrot_preset_name: str = "Classic"
1299
1300    # --------------------------------------------------------
1301    # Julia Fractal Configuration
1302    # --------------------------------------------------------
1303    julia_cx: float = -0.8
1304    julia_cy: float = 0.156
1305
1306    julia_preset_index: int = 0
1307    julia_preset_name: str = "Classic"
1308
1309
1310
1311# ============================================================================
1312# INITIAL STATE
1313# ============================================================================
1314
1315
1316def create_initial_state():
1317
1318
1319    """ Creates the default runtime application state.
1320    The initial viewport is configured to frame the
1321    Mandelbrot Set while preserving the display aspect ratio.
1322    
1323    Returns:
1324        Initialized AppState instance.
1325    """
1326
1327    xmin, xmax = -3.0, 1.5
1328
1329    x_range = xmax - xmin
1330
1331    # Preserve aspect ratio when constructing the viewport.
1332    y_range = x_range * (
1333        CONFIG.height / CONFIG.width
1334    )
1335
1336    ymin = -y_range / 2
1337    ymax = y_range / 2
1338
1339    return AppState(
1340        xmin=xmin,
1341        xmax=xmax,
1342        ymin=ymin,
1343        ymax=ymax,
1344        max_iter=100,
1345        current_palette=0,
1346        current_fractal=FractalType.MANDELBROT,
1347    )
1348
1349
1350def is_parameter_edit_locked(state):
1351
1352    return abs(state.xmax - state.xmin) < PARAMETER_EDIT_LOCK_WIDTH
1353
1354
1355def show_parameter_lock_message(state):
1356
1357    state.export_message = (
1358        "Parameter changes locked at deep zoom"
1359    )
1360
1361    state.export_message_timer = time.time()
1362
1363# ============================================================================
1364# CUDA KERNEL
1365# ============================================================================
1366
1367""" The CUDA kernel performs GPU-accelerated escape-time fractal rendering using double-double precision arithmetic.
1368
1369Rendering stages:
1370
1371Convert screen coordinates into viewport coordinates.
1372Initialize fractal state.
1373Execute iterative fractal calculations.
1374Perform escape-radius checks.
1375Store iteration counts into the GPU output buffer.
1376
1377Double-double arithmetic is used to improve numerical stability during deep zoom operations. """
1378fractal_kernel = cp.RawKernel(r'''
1379
1380struct dd
1381{
1382    double hi;
1383    double lo;
1384};
1385
1386__device__ inline dd dd_set(double a)
1387{
1388    dd r;
1389    r.hi = a;
1390    r.lo = 0.0;
1391    return r;
1392}
1393
1394__device__ inline dd quick_two_sum(double a, double b)
1395{
1396    dd r;
1397
1398    r.hi = a + b;
1399    r.lo = b - (r.hi - a);
1400
1401    return r;
1402}
1403
1404__device__ inline dd two_sum(double a, double b)
1405{
1406    dd r;
1407
1408    r.hi = a + b;
1409
1410    double bb = r.hi - a;
1411
1412    r.lo =
1413        (a - (r.hi - bb)) +
1414        (b - bb);
1415
1416    return r;
1417}
1418
1419__device__ inline dd split(double a)
1420{
1421    const double splitter = 134217729.0;
1422
1423    double t = splitter * a;
1424
1425    dd r;
1426
1427    r.hi = t - (t - a);
1428    r.lo = a - r.hi;
1429
1430    return r;
1431}
1432
1433__device__ inline dd two_prod(double a, double b)
1434{
1435    dd r;
1436
1437    r.hi = a * b;
1438
1439    dd sa = split(a);
1440    dd sb = split(b);
1441
1442    r.lo =
1443        ((sa.hi * sb.hi - r.hi) +
1444        sa.hi * sb.lo +
1445        sa.lo * sb.hi) +
1446        sa.lo * sb.lo;
1447
1448    return r;
1449}
1450
1451__device__ inline dd dd_add(dd a, dd b)
1452{
1453    dd s = two_sum(a.hi, b.hi);
1454
1455    double e =
1456        a.lo +
1457        b.lo +
1458        s.lo;
1459
1460    return quick_two_sum(s.hi, e);
1461}
1462
1463__device__ inline dd dd_sub(dd a, dd b)
1464{
1465    dd s = two_sum(a.hi, -b.hi);
1466
1467    double e =
1468        a.lo -
1469        b.lo +
1470        s.lo;
1471
1472    return quick_two_sum(s.hi, e);
1473}
1474
1475__device__ inline dd dd_mul(dd a, dd b)
1476{
1477    dd p = two_prod(a.hi, b.hi);
1478
1479    p.lo +=
1480        a.hi * b.lo +
1481        a.lo * b.hi;
1482
1483    return quick_two_sum(p.hi, p.lo);
1484}
1485
1486__device__ inline dd dd_abs(dd a)
1487{
1488    if (a.hi < 0.0)
1489    {
1490        a.hi = -a.hi;
1491        a.lo = -a.lo;
1492    }
1493
1494    return a;
1495}
1496
1497__device__ inline double dd_to_double(dd a)
1498{
1499    return a.hi + a.lo;
1500}
1501
1502__device__ inline void complex_mul(
1503    dd ar,
1504    dd ai,
1505    dd br,
1506    dd bi,
1507    dd* rr,
1508    dd* ri
1509)
1510{
1511    dd arbr = dd_mul(ar, br);
1512    dd aibi = dd_mul(ai, bi);
1513
1514    dd arbi = dd_mul(ar, bi);
1515    dd aibr = dd_mul(ai, br);
1516
1517    *rr = dd_sub(arbr, aibi);
1518    *ri = dd_add(arbi, aibr);
1519}
1520
1521extern "C" __global__
1522void fractal(
1523    int fractal_type,
1524
1525    double xmin,
1526    double xmax,
1527    double ymin,
1528    double ymax,
1529
1530    int width,
1531    int height,
1532
1533    int max_iter,
1534
1535    double julia_cx,
1536    double julia_cy,
1537
1538    double mandelbrot_zx,
1539    double mandelbrot_zy,
1540
1541    int fractal_power,
1542
1543    int* iter_out
1544)
1545{
1546    int x =
1547        blockIdx.x *
1548        blockDim.x +
1549        threadIdx.x;
1550
1551    int y =
1552        blockIdx.y *
1553        blockDim.y +
1554        threadIdx.y;
1555
1556    if (x >= width || y >= height)
1557        return;
1558
1559    // ============================================================
1560    // DOUBLE-DOUBLE VIEWPORT SETUP
1561    // ============================================================
1562
1563    dd dd_xmin = dd_set(xmin);
1564    dd dd_xmax = dd_set(xmax);
1565
1566    dd dd_ymin = dd_set(ymin);
1567    dd dd_ymax = dd_set(ymax);
1568
1569    dd dx = dd_mul(
1570        dd_sub(dd_xmax, dd_xmin),
1571        dd_set(1.0 / (double)width)
1572    );
1573
1574    dd dy = dd_mul(
1575        dd_sub(dd_ymax, dd_ymin),
1576        dd_set(1.0 / (double)height)
1577    );
1578
1579    dd cr = dd_add(
1580        dd_xmin,
1581        dd_mul(
1582            dd_set((double)x),
1583            dx
1584        )
1585    );
1586
1587    dd ci = dd_sub(
1588        dd_ymax,
1589        dd_mul(
1590            dd_set((double)y),
1591            dy
1592        )
1593    );
1594
1595    // ============================================================
1596    // INITIAL VALUES
1597    // ============================================================
1598
1599    dd z0r;
1600    dd z0i;
1601
1602    dd c_r;
1603    dd c_i;
1604
1605    if (fractal_type == 0)
1606    {
1607        // MANDELBROT
1608
1609        z0r = dd_set(mandelbrot_zx);
1610        z0i = dd_set(mandelbrot_zy);
1611
1612        c_r = cr;
1613        c_i = ci;
1614    }
1615    else if (fractal_type == 1)
1616    {
1617        // JULIA
1618
1619        z0r = cr;
1620        z0i = ci;
1621
1622        c_r = dd_set(julia_cx);
1623        c_i = dd_set(julia_cy);
1624    }
1625    else
1626    {
1627        // BURNING SHIP
1628
1629        z0r = dd_set(0.0);
1630        z0i = dd_set(0.0);
1631
1632        c_r = cr;
1633        c_i = ci;
1634    }
1635
1636    dd zr = z0r;
1637    dd zi = z0i;
1638
1639    int i;
1640
1641    for (i = 0; i < max_iter; i++)
1642    {
1643        if (fractal_type == 2)
1644        {
1645            zr = dd_abs(zr);
1646            zi = dd_abs(zi);
1647        }
1648
1649        dd zr2 = dd_mul(zr, zr);
1650        dd zi2 = dd_mul(zi, zi);
1651
1652        dd mag2 = dd_add(zr2, zi2);
1653
1654        if (mag2.hi > 4.0)
1655            break;
1656
1657        dd zrzi = dd_mul(zr, zi);
1658
1659        dd two_zrzi = dd_add(
1660            zrzi,
1661            zrzi
1662        );
1663
1664        dd z2r = dd_sub(zr2, zi2);
1665        dd z2i = two_zrzi;
1666
1667        dd power_r = z2r;
1668        dd power_i = z2i;
1669
1670        if (fractal_type != 2 && fractal_power > 2)
1671        {
1672            dd z3r;
1673            dd z3i;
1674
1675            complex_mul(
1676                z2r,
1677                z2i,
1678                zr,
1679                zi,
1680                &z3r,
1681                &z3i
1682            );
1683
1684            if (fractal_power == 3)
1685            {
1686                power_r = z3r;
1687                power_i = z3i;
1688            }
1689            else
1690            {
1691                dd z4r;
1692                dd z4i;
1693
1694                complex_mul(
1695                    z2r,
1696                    z2i,
1697                    z2r,
1698                    z2i,
1699                    &z4r,
1700                    &z4i
1701                );
1702
1703                if (fractal_power == 4)
1704                {
1705                    power_r = z4r;
1706                    power_i = z4i;
1707                }
1708                else if (fractal_power == 5)
1709                {
1710                    complex_mul(
1711                        z4r,
1712                        z4i,
1713                        zr,
1714                        zi,
1715                        &power_r,
1716                        &power_i
1717                    );
1718                }
1719                else
1720                {
1721                    complex_mul(
1722                        z3r,
1723                        z3i,
1724                        z3r,
1725                        z3i,
1726                        &power_r,
1727                        &power_i
1728                    );
1729                }
1730            }
1731        }
1732
1733        dd zr_new = dd_add(
1734            power_r,
1735            c_r
1736        );
1737
1738        dd zi_new = dd_add(
1739            power_i,
1740            c_i
1741        );
1742
1743        zr = zr_new;
1744        zi = zi_new;
1745    }
1746
1747    
1748
1749    int idx =
1750        y * width + x;
1751
1752    iter_out[idx] = i;
1753}
1754
1755''', 'fractal')
1756
1757# ============================================================================
1758# PALETTES
1759# ============================================================================
1760
1761
1762def smooth_gradient(stops, t):
1763
1764    t = cp.clip(t, 0.0, 1.0)
1765
1766    result_r = cp.zeros_like(t)
1767    result_g = cp.zeros_like(t)
1768    result_b = cp.zeros_like(t)
1769
1770    for i in range(len(stops) - 1):
1771
1772        p0, c0 = stops[i]
1773        p1, c1 = stops[i + 1]
1774
1775        mask = (t >= p0) & (t <= p1)
1776
1777        local_t = (t - p0) / max(p1 - p0, 1e-8)
1778
1779        local_t = local_t * local_t * (
1780            3.0 - 2.0 * local_t
1781        )
1782
1783        result_r = cp.where(
1784            mask,
1785            c0[0] + (c1[0] - c0[0]) * local_t,
1786            result_r
1787        )
1788
1789        result_g = cp.where(
1790            mask,
1791            c0[1] + (c1[1] - c0[1]) * local_t,
1792            result_g
1793        )
1794
1795        result_b = cp.where(
1796            mask,
1797            c0[2] + (c1[2] - c0[2]) * local_t,
1798            result_b
1799        )
1800
1801    return result_r, result_g, result_b
1802
1803
1804def gradient_palette(name, stops):
1805
1806    return {
1807        "name": name,
1808        "func": lambda t: smooth_gradient(stops, t)
1809    }
1810
1811
1812PALETTES = [
1813
1814    gradient_palette(
1815        "Classic Fire",
1816        [
1817            (0.0, (0, 0, 0)),
1818            (0.3, (255, 0, 0)),
1819            (0.6, (255, 180, 0)),
1820            (1.0, (255, 255, 255)),
1821        ]
1822    ),
1823
1824    gradient_palette(
1825        "Ocean",
1826        [
1827            (0.0, (0, 7, 100)),
1828            (0.3, (32, 107, 203)),
1829            (0.6, (0, 200, 255)),
1830            (1.0, (220, 255, 255)),
1831        ]
1832    ),
1833
1834    gradient_palette(
1835        "Inferno",
1836        [
1837            (0.0, (0, 0, 0)),
1838            (0.3, (100, 0, 50)),
1839            (0.6, (255, 100, 0)),
1840            (1.0, (255, 255, 200)),
1841        ]
1842    ),
1843
1844    gradient_palette(
1845        "Rainbow",
1846        [
1847            (0.0, (255, 0, 0)),
1848            (0.2, (255, 127, 0)),
1849            (0.4, (255, 255, 0)),
1850            (0.6, (0, 255, 0)),
1851            (0.8, (0, 0, 255)),
1852            (1.0, (148, 0, 211)),
1853        ]
1854    ),
1855
1856    gradient_palette(
1857        "Neon",
1858        [
1859            (0.0, (0, 0, 0)),
1860            (0.3, (255, 0, 255)),
1861            (0.6, (0, 255, 255)),
1862            (1.0, (255, 255, 255)),
1863        ]
1864    ),
1865
1866    gradient_palette(
1867        "Icy",
1868        [
1869            (0.0, (0, 0, 20)),
1870            (0.3, (0, 120, 255)),
1871            (0.7, (180, 240, 255)),
1872            (1.0, (255, 255, 255)),
1873        ]
1874    ),
1875
1876    gradient_palette(
1877        "Sunset",
1878        [
1879            (0.0, (0, 0, 0)),
1880            (0.2, (80, 0, 120)),
1881            (0.5, (255, 60, 60)),
1882            (0.8, (255, 180, 0)),
1883            (1.0, (255, 255, 200)),
1884        ]
1885    ),
1886
1887    gradient_palette(
1888        "B&W High Contrast",
1889        [
1890            (0.0, (0, 0, 0)),
1891            (0.49, (0, 0, 0)),
1892            (0.5, (255, 255, 255)),
1893            (1.0, (255, 255, 255)),
1894        ]
1895    ),
1896
1897]
1898
1899# ============================================================================
1900# COLORIZE
1901# ============================================================================
1902
1903
1904def colorize_gpu(iter_arr, max_iter, palette_index, width, height):
1905
1906    t = iter_arr.astype(cp.float32) / max_iter
1907
1908    palette = PALETTES[palette_index]["func"]
1909
1910    r, g, b = palette(t)
1911
1912    inside = iter_arr >= max_iter
1913
1914    r = cp.where(inside, 0, r)
1915    g = cp.where(inside, 0, g)
1916    b = cp.where(inside, 0, b)
1917
1918    r = cp.clip(r, 0, 255).astype(cp.uint8)
1919    g = cp.clip(g, 0, 255).astype(cp.uint8)
1920    b = cp.clip(b, 0, 255).astype(cp.uint8)
1921
1922    rgb_flat = cp.stack([r, g, b], axis=1)
1923
1924    return rgb_flat.reshape(height, width, 3)
1925
1926# ============================================================================
1927# FRACTAL RENDER
1928# ============================================================================
1929
1930
1931def render_fractal_iterations_gpu(
1932    state,
1933    width,
1934    height
1935):
1936
1937    gpu_buffer = cp.zeros(
1938        width * height,
1939        dtype=cp.int32
1940    )
1941
1942    block = (16, 16)
1943
1944    grid = (
1945        (width + block[0] - 1) // block[0],
1946        (height + block[1] - 1) // block[1],
1947    )
1948
1949    fractal_type = 0
1950
1951    if state.current_fractal == FractalType.JULIA:
1952        fractal_type = 1
1953
1954    elif state.current_fractal == FractalType.BURNING_SHIP:
1955        fractal_type = 2
1956
1957    fractal_kernel(
1958        grid,
1959        block,
1960        (
1961            np.int32(fractal_type),
1962
1963            np.float64(state.xmin),
1964            np.float64(state.xmax),
1965            np.float64(state.ymin),
1966            np.float64(state.ymax),
1967
1968            np.int32(width),
1969            np.int32(height),
1970
1971            np.int32(state.max_iter),
1972
1973            np.float64(state.julia_cx),
1974            np.float64(state.julia_cy),
1975
1976            np.float64(state.mandelbrot_zx),
1977            np.float64(state.mandelbrot_zy),
1978
1979            np.int32(state.fractal_power),
1980
1981            gpu_buffer,
1982        )
1983    )
1984
1985    return gpu_buffer
1986
1987
1988def render_fractal_gpu(
1989    state,
1990    width,
1991    height
1992):
1993
1994    gpu_buffer = render_fractal_iterations_gpu(
1995        state,
1996        width,
1997        height
1998    )
1999
2000    rgb_hw3 = colorize_gpu(
2001        gpu_buffer,
2002        state.max_iter,
2003        state.current_palette,
2004        width,
2005        height
2006    )
2007
2008    return rgb_hw3
2009
2010
2011def render_fractal_iterations_cpu(
2012    state,
2013    width,
2014    height
2015):
2016
2017    x = np.arange(
2018        width,
2019        dtype=np.float64
2020    )
2021
2022    y = np.arange(
2023        height,
2024        dtype=np.float64
2025    )
2026
2027    cr = state.xmin + (
2028        x *
2029        ((state.xmax - state.xmin) / width)
2030    )
2031
2032    ci = state.ymax - (
2033        y *
2034        ((state.ymax - state.ymin) / height)
2035    )
2036
2037    cr, ci = np.meshgrid(
2038        cr,
2039        ci
2040    )
2041
2042    if state.current_fractal == FractalType.MANDELBROT:
2043
2044        zr = np.full(
2045            (height, width),
2046            state.mandelbrot_zx,
2047            dtype=np.float64
2048        )
2049
2050        zi = np.full(
2051            (height, width),
2052            state.mandelbrot_zy,
2053            dtype=np.float64
2054        )
2055
2056        c_r = cr
2057        c_i = ci
2058
2059    elif state.current_fractal == FractalType.JULIA:
2060
2061        zr = cr.copy()
2062        zi = ci.copy()
2063
2064        c_r = np.full(
2065            (height, width),
2066            state.julia_cx,
2067            dtype=np.float64
2068        )
2069
2070        c_i = np.full(
2071            (height, width),
2072            state.julia_cy,
2073            dtype=np.float64
2074        )
2075
2076    else:
2077
2078        zr = np.zeros(
2079            (height, width),
2080            dtype=np.float64
2081        )
2082
2083        zi = np.zeros(
2084            (height, width),
2085            dtype=np.float64
2086        )
2087
2088        c_r = cr
2089        c_i = ci
2090
2091    iter_out = np.full(
2092        (height, width),
2093        state.max_iter,
2094        dtype=np.int32
2095    )
2096
2097    active = np.ones(
2098        (height, width),
2099        dtype=bool
2100    )
2101
2102    with np.errstate(
2103        over="ignore",
2104        invalid="ignore"
2105    ):
2106
2107        for i in range(state.max_iter):
2108
2109            if state.current_fractal == FractalType.BURNING_SHIP:
2110                zr = np.abs(zr)
2111                zi = np.abs(zi)
2112
2113            mag2 = zr * zr + zi * zi
2114
2115            escaped = active & (mag2 > 4.0)
2116
2117            iter_out[escaped] = i
2118            active &= ~escaped
2119
2120            if not active.any():
2121                break
2122
2123            if state.current_fractal != FractalType.BURNING_SHIP:
2124
2125                if state.fractal_power == 2:
2126                    zr_active = zr[active]
2127                    zi_active = zi[active]
2128
2129                    power_r = (
2130                        zr_active *
2131                        zr_active -
2132                        zi_active *
2133                        zi_active
2134                    )
2135
2136                    power_i = (
2137                        2.0 *
2138                        zr_active *
2139                        zi_active
2140                    )
2141
2142                else:
2143                    z = (
2144                        zr[active] +
2145                        1j *
2146                        zi[active]
2147                    ) ** state.fractal_power
2148
2149                    power_r = z.real
2150                    power_i = z.imag
2151
2152            else:
2153                zr_active = zr[active]
2154                zi_active = zi[active]
2155
2156                power_r = (
2157                    zr_active *
2158                    zr_active -
2159                    zi_active *
2160                    zi_active
2161                )
2162
2163                power_i = (
2164                    2.0 *
2165                    zr_active *
2166                    zi_active
2167                )
2168
2169            zr[active] = (
2170                power_r +
2171                c_r[active]
2172            )
2173
2174            zi[active] = (
2175                power_i +
2176                c_i[active]
2177            )
2178
2179    return iter_out
2180
2181
2182def run_gpu_cpu_benchmark(state):
2183
2184    try:
2185
2186        state.exporting = True
2187
2188        state.export_message = (
2189            "Running benchmark..."
2190        )
2191
2192        state.export_message_timer = time.time()
2193
2194        render_fractal_iterations_gpu(
2195            state,
2196            BENCHMARK_WIDTH,
2197            BENCHMARK_HEIGHT
2198        )
2199
2200        cp.cuda.Stream.null.synchronize()
2201
2202        gpu_times = []
2203
2204        for _ in range(BENCHMARK_RUNS):
2205
2206            start = time.perf_counter()
2207
2208            render_fractal_iterations_gpu(
2209                state,
2210                BENCHMARK_WIDTH,
2211                BENCHMARK_HEIGHT
2212            )
2213
2214            cp.cuda.Stream.null.synchronize()
2215
2216            gpu_times.append(
2217                (time.perf_counter() - start) * 1000.0
2218            )
2219
2220        cpu_times = []
2221
2222        for _ in range(BENCHMARK_RUNS):
2223
2224            start = time.perf_counter()
2225
2226            render_fractal_iterations_cpu(
2227                state,
2228                BENCHMARK_WIDTH,
2229                BENCHMARK_HEIGHT
2230            )
2231
2232            cpu_times.append(
2233                (time.perf_counter() - start) * 1000.0
2234            )
2235
2236        gpu_avg = sum(gpu_times) / len(gpu_times)
2237        cpu_avg = sum(cpu_times) / len(cpu_times)
2238
2239        if gpu_avg > 0.0:
2240            speedup = cpu_avg / gpu_avg
2241        else:
2242            speedup = 0.0
2243
2244        state.benchmark_result_lines = [
2245            "GPU vs CPU Benchmark",
2246            "",
2247            f"Resolution: {BENCHMARK_WIDTH}x{BENCHMARK_HEIGHT}",
2248            f"Runs: {BENCHMARK_RUNS}",
2249            f"Fractal: {state.current_fractal.value}",
2250            f"Iterations: {state.max_iter}",
2251            f"GPU average: {gpu_avg:.1f} ms",
2252            f"CPU average: {cpu_avg:.1f} ms",
2253            f"GPU speedup: {speedup:.1f}x",
2254            "",
2255            "Press ESC to close",
2256        ]
2257
2258        state.benchmark_results_open = True
2259
2260        state.export_message = (
2261            "Benchmark complete"
2262        )
2263
2264        state.export_message_timer = time.time()
2265
2266        unlock_achievement(state, "benchmark_runner")
2267
2268    except Exception as e:
2269
2270        state.benchmark_result_lines = [
2271            "GPU vs CPU Benchmark",
2272            "",
2273            f"BENCHMARK ERROR: {e}",
2274            "",
2275            "Press ESC to close",
2276        ]
2277
2278        state.benchmark_results_open = True
2279
2280        state.export_message = (
2281            f"BENCHMARK ERROR: {e}"
2282        )
2283
2284        state.export_message_timer = time.time()
2285
2286    finally:
2287
2288        state.exporting = False
2289
2290
2291def compute_surface(state, width, height):
2292
2293    rgb_hw3 = render_fractal_gpu(
2294        state,
2295        width,
2296        height
2297    )
2298
2299    rgb_wh3 = cp.transpose(
2300        rgb_hw3,
2301        (1, 0, 2)
2302    )
2303
2304    return pg.surfarray.make_surface(
2305        cp.asnumpy(rgb_wh3)
2306    )
2307
2308# ============================================================================
2309# EXPORT
2310# ============================================================================
2311
2312
2313def ensure_export_folders():
2314
2315    os.makedirs(
2316        PNG_EXPORT_DIR,
2317        exist_ok=True
2318    )
2319
2320    os.makedirs(
2321        GIF_EXPORT_DIR,
2322        exist_ok=True
2323    )
2324
2325
2326def export_fractal_png(state):
2327
2328    try:
2329
2330        state.exporting = True
2331
2332        state.export_message = (
2333            "Rendering export..."
2334        )
2335
2336        rgb_hw3 = render_fractal_gpu(
2337            state,
2338            CONFIG.png_export_width,
2339            CONFIG.png_export_height
2340        )
2341
2342        rgb_wh3 = cp.transpose(
2343            rgb_hw3,
2344            (1, 0, 2)
2345        )
2346
2347        surface = pg.surfarray.make_surface(
2348            cp.asnumpy(rgb_wh3)
2349        )
2350
2351        timestamp = datetime.now().strftime(
2352            "%Y%m%d_%H%M%S"
2353        )
2354
2355        ensure_export_folders()
2356
2357        filename = (
2358            f"fractal_{timestamp}.png"
2359        )
2360
2361        filepath = os.path.join(
2362            PNG_EXPORT_DIR,
2363            filename
2364        )
2365
2366        pg.image.save(surface, filepath)
2367
2368        state.exporting = False
2369
2370        state.export_message = (
2371            f"Exported: {filepath}"
2372        )
2373
2374        state.export_message_timer = time.time()
2375
2376        unlock_achievement(state, "first_export")
2377
2378    except Exception as e:
2379
2380        state.exporting = False
2381
2382        state.export_message = (
2383            f"EXPORT ERROR: {e}"
2384        )
2385
2386        state.export_message_timer = time.time()
2387
2388
2389
2390def get_gif_export_size():
2391
2392    width = min(
2393        CONFIG.gif_export_width,
2394        GIF_MAX_WIDTH
2395    )
2396
2397    height = min(
2398        CONFIG.gif_export_height,
2399        GIF_MAX_HEIGHT
2400    )
2401
2402    width = max(256, int(width))
2403    height = max(256, int(height))
2404
2405    return width, height
2406
2407
2408def export_zoom_gif(state):
2409
2410    if imageio is None:
2411
2412        state.export_message = (
2413            "GIF export requires imageio"
2414        )
2415
2416        state.export_message_timer = time.time()
2417        return
2418
2419    saved_viewport = (
2420        state.xmin,
2421        state.xmax,
2422        state.ymin,
2423        state.ymax,
2424    )
2425
2426    try:
2427
2428        state.exporting = True
2429
2430        state.export_message = (
2431            "Rendering GIF..."
2432        )
2433
2434        state.export_message_timer = time.time()
2435
2436        gif_width, gif_height = get_gif_export_size()
2437
2438        target_center_x = (
2439            state.xmin +
2440            state.xmax
2441        ) * 0.5
2442
2443        target_center_y = (
2444            state.ymin +
2445            state.ymax
2446        ) * 0.5
2447
2448        target_range_x = (
2449            state.xmax -
2450            state.xmin
2451        )
2452
2453        target_range_y = (
2454            state.ymax -
2455            state.ymin
2456        )
2457
2458        default_state = create_initial_state()
2459
2460        start_range_x = (
2461            default_state.xmax -
2462            default_state.xmin
2463        )
2464
2465        start_range_y = (
2466            default_state.ymax -
2467            default_state.ymin
2468        )
2469
2470        timestamp = datetime.now().strftime(
2471            "%Y%m%d_%H%M%S"
2472        )
2473
2474        ensure_export_folders()
2475
2476        filename = (
2477            f"fractal_zoom_{timestamp}.gif"
2478        )
2479
2480        filepath = os.path.join(
2481            GIF_EXPORT_DIR,
2482            filename
2483        )
2484
2485        with imageio.get_writer(
2486            filepath,
2487            mode="I",
2488            duration=GIF_DURATION_MS / 1000.0
2489        ) as writer:
2490
2491            for frame_index in range(GIF_FRAME_COUNT):
2492
2493                if GIF_FRAME_COUNT <= 1:
2494                    t = 1.0
2495                else:
2496                    t = frame_index / (
2497                        GIF_FRAME_COUNT - 1
2498                    )
2499
2500                current_range_x = (
2501                    start_range_x *
2502                    (
2503                        target_range_x /
2504                        start_range_x
2505                    ) ** t
2506                )
2507
2508                current_range_y = (
2509                    start_range_y *
2510                    (
2511                        target_range_y /
2512                        start_range_y
2513                    ) ** t
2514                )
2515
2516                state.xmin = target_center_x - current_range_x * 0.5
2517                state.xmax = target_center_x + current_range_x * 0.5
2518                state.ymin = target_center_y - current_range_y * 0.5
2519                state.ymax = target_center_y + current_range_y * 0.5
2520
2521                rgb_hw3 = render_fractal_gpu(
2522                    state,
2523                    gif_width,
2524                    gif_height
2525                )
2526
2527                writer.append_data(
2528                    cp.asnumpy(rgb_hw3)
2529                )
2530
2531        state.export_message = (
2532            f"Exported GIF: {filepath}"
2533        )
2534
2535        state.export_message_timer = time.time()
2536
2537        unlock_achievement(state, "first_export")
2538
2539    except Exception as e:
2540
2541        state.export_message = (
2542            f"GIF EXPORT ERROR: {e}"
2543        )
2544
2545        state.export_message_timer = time.time()
2546
2547    finally:
2548
2549        (
2550            state.xmin,
2551            state.xmax,
2552            state.ymin,
2553            state.ymax,
2554        ) = saved_viewport
2555
2556        state.exporting = False
2557        state.needs_update = True
2558
2559# ============================================================================
2560# CAMERA
2561# ============================================================================
2562
2563
2564class Camera:
2565
2566    @staticmethod
2567    def get_move_speed(state):
2568
2569        return (
2570            CONFIG.base_move_speed *
2571            (state.xmax - state.xmin)
2572        )
2573
2574    @staticmethod
2575    def move(state, dx, dy):
2576
2577        speed = Camera.get_move_speed(state)
2578
2579        state.xmin += dx * speed
2580        state.xmax += dx * speed
2581
2582        state.ymin += dy * speed
2583        state.ymax += dy * speed
2584
2585        state.needs_update = True
2586        check_deep_zoom_achievement(state)
2587
2588    @staticmethod
2589    def center_on_pixel(state, mx, my):
2590
2591        cx = (
2592            state.xmin +
2593            (mx / CONFIG.width) *
2594            (state.xmax - state.xmin)
2595        )
2596
2597        cy = (
2598            state.ymax -
2599            (my / CONFIG.height) *
2600            (state.ymax - state.ymin)
2601        )
2602
2603        xr = state.xmax - state.xmin
2604        yr = state.ymax - state.ymin
2605
2606        state.xmin = cx - xr / 2
2607        state.xmax = cx + xr / 2
2608
2609        state.ymin = cy - yr / 2
2610        state.ymax = cy + yr / 2
2611
2612        state.needs_update = True
2613        check_deep_zoom_achievement(state)
2614
2615    @staticmethod
2616    def zoom(state, direction):
2617
2618        cx = (
2619            state.xmin +
2620            state.xmax
2621        ) * 0.5
2622
2623        cy = (
2624            state.ymin +
2625            state.ymax
2626        ) * 0.5
2627
2628        xr = (
2629            state.xmax -
2630            state.xmin
2631        )
2632
2633        yr = (
2634            state.ymax -
2635            state.ymin
2636        )
2637
2638        zoom = 0.8 if direction > 0 else 1.25
2639
2640        xr *= zoom
2641        yr *= zoom
2642
2643        # ============================================================
2644        # FLOATING POINT PRECISION LIMIT
2645        #
2646        # Prevents xmin/xmax and ymin/ymax from collapsing into the
2647        # same value due to IEEE double precision limits.
2648        # ============================================================
2649
2650        EPS = 1e-15
2651
2652        if abs(xr) < EPS * max(1.0, abs(cx)):
2653            return
2654
2655        if abs(yr) < EPS * max(1.0, abs(cy)):
2656            return
2657
2658        state.xmin = cx - xr * 0.5
2659        state.xmax = cx + xr * 0.5
2660
2661        state.ymin = cy - yr * 0.5
2662        state.ymax = cy + yr * 0.5
2663
2664        state.needs_update = True
2665        check_deep_zoom_achievement(state)
2666
2667# ============================================================================
2668# RUNTIME SETTINGS HELPERS
2669# ============================================================================
2670
2671
2672def preserve_viewport_for_aspect_ratio(state):
2673
2674    center_x = (
2675        state.xmin +
2676        state.xmax
2677    ) * 0.5
2678
2679    center_y = (
2680        state.ymin +
2681        state.ymax
2682    ) * 0.5
2683
2684    x_range = (
2685        state.xmax -
2686        state.xmin
2687    )
2688
2689    y_range = x_range * (
2690        CONFIG.height /
2691        CONFIG.width
2692    )
2693
2694    state.xmin = center_x - x_range * 0.5
2695    state.xmax = center_x + x_range * 0.5
2696    state.ymin = center_y - y_range * 0.5
2697    state.ymax = center_y + y_range * 0.5
2698
2699
2700def apply_game_resolution(state, width, height):
2701
2702    CONFIG.upscale = 1
2703    CONFIG.base_width = int(width)
2704    CONFIG.base_height = int(height)
2705
2706    preserve_viewport_for_aspect_ratio(state)
2707
2708    pg.display.set_mode(
2709        (
2710            CONFIG.width,
2711            CONFIG.height
2712        )
2713    )
2714
2715    save_current_user_settings()
2716
2717    state.surface = None
2718    state.needs_update = True
2719
2720
2721def set_png_resolution(width, height):
2722
2723    CONFIG.png_export_width = int(width)
2724    CONFIG.png_export_height = int(height)
2725
2726    save_current_user_settings()
2727
2728
2729def set_gif_resolution(width, height):
2730
2731    CONFIG.gif_export_width = int(width)
2732    CONFIG.gif_export_height = int(height)
2733
2734    save_current_user_settings()
2735
2736
2737def set_volume(audio_manager, key, value):
2738
2739    if key == "music_volume":
2740        audio_manager.set_music_volume(value)
2741
2742        update_and_save_user_setting(
2743            "music_volume",
2744            CONFIG.music_volume
2745        )
2746
2747    elif key == "ui_volume":
2748        audio_manager.set_ui_volume(value)
2749
2750        update_and_save_user_setting(
2751            "ui_volume",
2752            CONFIG.ui_volume
2753        )
2754
2755
2756def change_volume(audio_manager, key, delta):
2757
2758    if key == "music_volume":
2759        set_volume(
2760            audio_manager,
2761            key,
2762            CONFIG.music_volume + delta
2763        )
2764
2765    elif key == "ui_volume":
2766        set_volume(
2767            audio_manager,
2768            key,
2769            CONFIG.ui_volume + delta
2770        )
2771
2772
2773def toggle_performance_info():
2774
2775    CONFIG.show_performance_info = (
2776        not CONFIG.show_performance_info
2777    )
2778
2779    update_and_save_user_setting(
2780        "show_performance_info",
2781        CONFIG.show_performance_info
2782    )
2783
2784# ============================================================================
2785# INPUT
2786# ============================================================================
2787
2788
2789class InputHandler:
2790
2791    @staticmethod
2792    def process_events(state, audio_manager):
2793
2794        for event in pg.event.get():
2795
2796            if event.type == pg.QUIT:
2797                state.running = False
2798
2799            elif state.tutorial_active:
2800                InputHandler.handle_tutorial_event(
2801                    state,
2802                    event,
2803                    audio_manager
2804                )
2805
2806            elif event.type == pg.KEYDOWN:
2807                InputHandler.handle_keydown(
2808                    state,
2809                    event,
2810                    audio_manager
2811                )
2812
2813            elif event.type == pg.MOUSEBUTTONDOWN:
2814                InputHandler.handle_mouse(
2815                    state,
2816                    event,
2817                    audio_manager
2818                )
2819
2820    @staticmethod
2821    def handle_tutorial_event(state, event, audio_manager):
2822
2823        if event.type == pg.KEYDOWN:
2824
2825            if event.key == pg.K_ESCAPE:
2826
2827                if get_tutorial_action(state) == "menu":
2828                    handle_tutorial_action(
2829                        state,
2830                        "menu",
2831                        audio_manager
2832                    )
2833
2834                else:
2835                    skip_tutorial(state)
2836
2837                    if audio_manager:
2838                        audio_manager.play_click()
2839
2840                return
2841
2842            if event.key == pg.K_RETURN:
2843
2844                action = get_tutorial_action(state)
2845
2846                if action == "begin":
2847                    handle_tutorial_action(
2848                        state,
2849                        "begin",
2850                        audio_manager
2851                    )
2852
2853                elif action == "finish":
2854                    handle_tutorial_action(
2855                        state,
2856                        "finish",
2857                        audio_manager
2858                    )
2859
2860                elif action == "parameters" and not is_tutorial_parameter_step_available(state):
2861                    handle_tutorial_action(
2862                        state,
2863                        "parameter_continue",
2864                        audio_manager
2865                    )
2866
2867                return
2868
2869            if event.key in (
2870                pg.K_w,
2871                pg.K_a,
2872                pg.K_s,
2873                pg.K_d
2874            ):
2875                InputHandler.handle_keydown(
2876                    state,
2877                    event,
2878                    audio_manager
2879                )
2880
2881                handle_tutorial_action(
2882                    state,
2883                    "movement",
2884                    audio_manager
2885                )
2886                return
2887
2888            if event.key in (pg.K_q, pg.K_e):
2889                InputHandler.handle_keydown(
2890                    state,
2891                    event,
2892                    audio_manager
2893                )
2894
2895                handle_tutorial_action(
2896                    state,
2897                    "iterations",
2898                    audio_manager
2899                )
2900                return
2901
2902            if event.key in (pg.K_r, pg.K_f):
2903                InputHandler.handle_keydown(
2904                    state,
2905                    event,
2906                    audio_manager
2907                )
2908
2909                handle_tutorial_action(
2910                    state,
2911                    "palette",
2912                    audio_manager
2913                )
2914                return
2915
2916            if event.key in (
2917                pg.K_i,
2918                pg.K_j,
2919                pg.K_k,
2920                pg.K_l
2921            ):
2922                InputHandler.handle_keydown(
2923                    state,
2924                    event,
2925                    audio_manager
2926                )
2927
2928                if is_tutorial_parameter_step_available(state):
2929                    handle_tutorial_action(
2930                        state,
2931                        "parameters",
2932                        audio_manager
2933                    )
2934
2935                return
2936
2937        elif event.type == pg.MOUSEBUTTONDOWN:
2938
2939            if event.button == 1:
2940                InputHandler.handle_mouse(
2941                    state,
2942                    event,
2943                    audio_manager
2944                )
2945
2946                handle_tutorial_action(
2947                    state,
2948                    "center",
2949                    audio_manager
2950                )
2951                return
2952
2953            if event.button in (4, 5):
2954                InputHandler.handle_mouse(
2955                    state,
2956                    event,
2957                    audio_manager
2958                )
2959
2960                handle_tutorial_action(
2961                    state,
2962                    "zoom",
2963                    audio_manager
2964                )
2965                return
2966
2967    @staticmethod
2968    def activate_menu_option(state, option, audio_manager=None):
2969
2970        if audio_manager:
2971            audio_manager.play_click()
2972
2973        if option == "Continue":
2974
2975            state.menu_open = False
2976            state.submenu_open = None
2977
2978        elif option == "Export PNG":
2979
2980            export_fractal_png(state)
2981
2982        elif option == "Export GIF":
2983
2984            export_zoom_gif(state)
2985
2986        elif option == "Show Performance Info":
2987
2988            toggle_performance_info()
2989
2990        elif option == "Benchmark GPU vs CPU":
2991
2992            run_gpu_cpu_benchmark(state)
2993
2994        elif option == "Tutorial":
2995
2996            state.menu_open = False
2997            state.submenu_open = None
2998            state.tutorial_step_index = 0
2999            state.tutorial_active = True
3000
3001        elif option == "Exit":
3002
3003            state.running = False
3004
3005        else:
3006
3007            state.submenu_open = option
3008
3009    @staticmethod
3010    def handle_keydown(state, event, audio_manager):
3011
3012        if state.preset_name_input_active:
3013
3014            if event.key == pg.K_ESCAPE:
3015                cancel_preset_name_input(state)
3016                return
3017
3018            if event.key == pg.K_RETURN:
3019                save_current_custom_preset(state)
3020
3021                if audio_manager:
3022                    audio_manager.play_click()
3023
3024                return
3025
3026            if event.key == pg.K_BACKSPACE:
3027                state.preset_name_input = (
3028                    state.preset_name_input[:-1]
3029                )
3030                return
3031
3032            if event.unicode and event.unicode.isprintable():
3033                if len(state.preset_name_input) < 32:
3034                    state.preset_name_input += event.unicode
3035
3036            return
3037
3038        if state.benchmark_results_open:
3039
3040            if event.key == pg.K_ESCAPE:
3041                state.benchmark_results_open = False
3042
3043            return
3044
3045        if event.key == pg.K_ESCAPE:
3046
3047            if state.submenu_open:
3048
3049                state.submenu_open = None
3050
3051            else:
3052
3053                state.menu_open = (
3054                    not state.menu_open
3055                )
3056
3057            return
3058
3059        # ========================================================
3060        # MENU SHORTCUTS
3061        # ========================================================
3062
3063        if state.submenu_open == "Iterations":
3064
3065            if event.key == pg.K_q:
3066                state.max_iter = max(
3067                    1,
3068                    state.max_iter // 2
3069                )
3070
3071                state.needs_update = True
3072
3073            elif event.key == pg.K_e:
3074                state.max_iter *= 2
3075                state.needs_update = True
3076
3077        if state.submenu_open == "Show Performance Info":
3078
3079            if event.key in (pg.K_RETURN, pg.K_LEFT, pg.K_RIGHT):
3080                toggle_performance_info()
3081
3082        if state.menu_open:
3083
3084            if event.key == pg.K_DOWN:
3085
3086                state.menu_index += 1
3087                state.menu_index %= len(
3088                    get_menu_options(state)
3089                )
3090
3091            elif event.key == pg.K_RETURN:
3092
3093                option = get_menu_options(state)[
3094                    state.menu_index
3095                ]
3096
3097                InputHandler.activate_menu_option(
3098                    state,
3099                    option,
3100                    audio_manager
3101                )
3102
3103            return
3104
3105        # ========================================================
3106        # NORMAL CONTROLS
3107        # ========================================================
3108
3109        if event.key == pg.K_w:
3110            Camera.move(state, 0, 1)
3111
3112        elif event.key == pg.K_s:
3113            Camera.move(state, 0, -1)
3114
3115        elif event.key == pg.K_a:
3116            Camera.move(state, -1, 0)
3117
3118        elif event.key == pg.K_d:
3119            Camera.move(state, 1, 0)
3120
3121        elif event.key == pg.K_q:
3122
3123            state.max_iter = max(
3124                1,
3125                state.max_iter // 2
3126            )
3127
3128            state.needs_update = True
3129
3130        elif event.key == pg.K_e:
3131
3132            state.max_iter *= 2
3133            state.needs_update = True
3134
3135        elif event.key == pg.K_r:
3136
3137            state.current_palette += 1
3138            state.current_palette %= len(
3139                PALETTES
3140            )
3141
3142            state.needs_update = True
3143            unlock_achievement(state, "palette_swapper")
3144
3145        elif event.key == pg.K_f:
3146
3147            state.current_palette -= 1
3148            state.current_palette %= len(
3149                PALETTES
3150            )
3151
3152            state.needs_update = True
3153            unlock_achievement(state, "palette_swapper")
3154
3155        elif event.key == pg.K_p:
3156
3157            export_fractal_png(state)
3158
3159        elif event.key in (
3160            pg.K_i,
3161            pg.K_k,
3162            pg.K_j,
3163            pg.K_l
3164        ):
3165
