3166            if state.current_fractal in (
3167                FractalType.MANDELBROT,
3168                FractalType.JULIA
3169            ) and is_parameter_edit_locked(state):
3170
3171                show_parameter_lock_message(state)
3172                return
3173
3174            if state.current_fractal == FractalType.JULIA:
3175
3176                if event.key == pg.K_i:
3177                    state.julia_cy += 0.005
3178
3179                elif event.key == pg.K_k:
3180                    state.julia_cy -= 0.005
3181
3182                elif event.key == pg.K_j:
3183                    state.julia_cx -= 0.005
3184
3185                elif event.key == pg.K_l:
3186                    state.julia_cx += 0.005
3187
3188                state.needs_update = True
3189
3190            elif state.current_fractal == FractalType.MANDELBROT:
3191
3192                if event.key == pg.K_i:
3193                    state.mandelbrot_zy += 0.005
3194
3195                elif event.key == pg.K_k:
3196                    state.mandelbrot_zy -= 0.005
3197
3198                elif event.key == pg.K_j:
3199                    state.mandelbrot_zx -= 0.005
3200
3201                elif event.key == pg.K_l:
3202                    state.mandelbrot_zx += 0.005
3203
3204                state.needs_update = True
3205        
3206    @staticmethod
3207    def handle_mouse(state, event, audio_manager):
3208
3209        mx, my = pg.mouse.get_pos()
3210
3211        if state.benchmark_results_open:
3212            return
3213
3214        if state.preset_name_input_active:
3215            return
3216
3217        # ========================================================
3218        # MENU
3219        # ========================================================
3220
3221        if state.menu_open:
3222
3223            if event.button != 1:
3224                return
3225
3226            panel = pg.Rect(
3227                80,
3228                120,
3229                CONFIG.width - 160,
3230                CONFIG.height - 240
3231            )
3232
3233            category_options = get_category_options(
3234                state,
3235                state.submenu_open
3236            )
3237
3238            if category_options:
3239
3240                y = panel.y + 30
3241
3242                for option in category_options:
3243
3244                    rect = pg.Rect(
3245                        panel.x + 30,
3246                        y,
3247                        panel.width - 60,
3248                        42
3249                    )
3250
3251                    if rect.collidepoint(mx, my):
3252                        InputHandler.activate_menu_option(
3253                            state,
3254                            option,
3255                            audio_manager
3256                        )
3257                        return
3258
3259                    y += 52
3260
3261                return
3262
3263            if state.submenu_open == "Mandelbrot Presets":
3264
3265                y = panel.y + 30
3266
3267                add_rect = pg.Rect(
3268                    panel.x + 30,
3269                    y,
3270                    panel.width - 60,
3271                    42
3272                )
3273
3274                if add_rect.collidepoint(mx, my):
3275                    begin_preset_name_input(
3276                        state,
3277                        "mandelbrot"
3278                    )
3279                    audio_manager.play_click()
3280                    return
3281
3282                y += 52
3283
3284                for i, preset in enumerate(
3285                    get_combined_mandelbrot_presets(state)
3286                ):
3287
3288                    rect = pg.Rect(
3289                        panel.x + 30,
3290                        y,
3291                        panel.width - 60,
3292                        42
3293                    )
3294
3295                    delete_rect = pg.Rect(
3296                        rect.right - 52,
3297                        rect.y + 6,
3298                        36,
3299                        30
3300                    )
3301
3302                    if (
3303                        preset.get("custom")
3304                        and delete_rect.collidepoint(mx, my)
3305                    ):
3306                        delete_custom_preset(
3307                            state,
3308                            "mandelbrot",
3309                            i
3310                        )
3311                        audio_manager.play_click()
3312                        return
3313
3314                    if rect.collidepoint(mx, my):
3315
3316                        if is_parameter_edit_locked(state):
3317                            show_parameter_lock_message(state)
3318                            audio_manager.play_click()
3319                            return
3320
3321                        apply_mandelbrot_preset(
3322                            state,
3323                            preset,
3324                            i
3325                        )
3326
3327                        audio_manager.play_click()
3328
3329                    y += 52
3330
3331                return
3332
3333            if state.submenu_open == "Julia Presets":
3334
3335                y = panel.y + 30
3336
3337                add_rect = pg.Rect(
3338                    panel.x + 30,
3339                    y,
3340                    panel.width - 60,
3341                    42
3342                )
3343
3344                if add_rect.collidepoint(mx, my):
3345                    begin_preset_name_input(
3346                        state,
3347                        "julia"
3348                    )
3349                    audio_manager.play_click()
3350                    return
3351
3352                y += 52
3353
3354                for i, preset in enumerate(
3355                    get_combined_julia_presets(state)
3356                ):
3357
3358                    rect = pg.Rect(
3359                        panel.x + 30,
3360                        y,
3361                        panel.width - 60,
3362                        42
3363                    )
3364
3365                    delete_rect = pg.Rect(
3366                        rect.right - 52,
3367                        rect.y + 6,
3368                        36,
3369                        30
3370                    )
3371
3372                    if (
3373                        preset.get("custom")
3374                        and delete_rect.collidepoint(mx, my)
3375                    ):
3376                        delete_custom_preset(
3377                            state,
3378                            "julia",
3379                            i
3380                        )
3381                        audio_manager.play_click()
3382                        return
3383
3384                    if rect.collidepoint(mx, my):
3385
3386                        if is_parameter_edit_locked(state):
3387                            show_parameter_lock_message(state)
3388                            audio_manager.play_click()
3389                            return
3390
3391                        apply_julia_preset(
3392                            state,
3393                            preset,
3394                            i
3395                        )
3396
3397                        audio_manager.play_click()
3398
3399                    y += 52
3400
3401                return
3402
3403            if state.submenu_open == "Power":
3404
3405                y = panel.y + 30
3406
3407                for power in POWER_VALUES:
3408
3409                    rect = pg.Rect(
3410                        panel.x + 30,
3411                        y,
3412                        panel.width - 60,
3413                        42
3414                    )
3415
3416                    if rect.collidepoint(mx, my):
3417
3418                        if is_parameter_edit_locked(state):
3419                            show_parameter_lock_message(state)
3420                            audio_manager.play_click()
3421                            return
3422
3423                        state.fractal_power = power
3424                        state.needs_update = True
3425
3426                        audio_manager.play_click()
3427
3428                    y += 52
3429
3430                return
3431
3432            if state.submenu_open == "Fractal Type":
3433
3434                y = panel.y + 30
3435
3436                fractals = [
3437                    (FractalType.MANDELBROT, "Mandelbrot"),
3438                    (FractalType.JULIA, "Julia Set"),
3439                    (FractalType.BURNING_SHIP, "Burning Ship"),
3440                ]
3441
3442                for fractal_type, label in fractals:
3443
3444                    rect = pg.Rect(
3445                        panel.x + 30,
3446                        y,
3447                        panel.width - 60,
3448                        50
3449                    )
3450
3451                    if rect.collidepoint(mx, my):
3452
3453                        previous_fractal = (
3454                            state.current_fractal
3455                        )
3456
3457                        state.current_fractal = fractal_type
3458
3459                        if (
3460                            previous_fractal != FractalType.MANDELBROT
3461                            and fractal_type == FractalType.MANDELBROT
3462                        ):
3463
3464                            new_state = create_initial_state()
3465
3466                            state.xmin = new_state.xmin
3467                            state.xmax = new_state.xmax
3468                            state.ymin = new_state.ymin
3469                            state.ymax = new_state.ymax
3470
3471                        state.needs_update = True
3472
3473                        if previous_fractal != fractal_type:
3474                            unlock_achievement(
3475                                state,
3476                                "fractal_switcher"
3477                            )
3478
3479                        audio_manager.play_click()
3480
3481                    y += 62
3482
3483                return
3484
3485            if state.submenu_open == "Palette":
3486
3487                y = panel.y + 30
3488
3489                for i, palette in enumerate(PALETTES):
3490
3491                    rect = pg.Rect(
3492                        panel.x + 30,
3493                        y,
3494                        panel.width - 60,
3495                        42
3496                    )
3497
3498                    if rect.collidepoint(mx, my):
3499
3500                        previous_palette = state.current_palette
3501
3502                        state.current_palette = i
3503                        state.needs_update = True
3504
3505                        if previous_palette != i:
3506                            unlock_achievement(
3507                                state,
3508                                "palette_swapper"
3509                            )
3510
3511                        audio_manager.play_click()
3512
3513                    y += 52
3514
3515                return
3516
3517            if state.submenu_open == "Game Resolution":
3518
3519                y = panel.y + 30
3520
3521                for width, height in GAME_RESOLUTION_PRESETS:
3522
3523                    rect = pg.Rect(
3524                        panel.x + 30,
3525                        y,
3526                        panel.width - 60,
3527                        42
3528                    )
3529
3530                    if rect.collidepoint(mx, my):
3531                        apply_game_resolution(
3532                            state,
3533                            width,
3534                            height
3535                        )
3536                        audio_manager.play_click()
3537                        return
3538
3539                    y += 52
3540
3541            if state.submenu_open == "PNG Resolution":
3542
3543                y = panel.y + 30
3544
3545                for width, height in PNG_RESOLUTION_PRESETS:
3546
3547                    rect = pg.Rect(
3548                        panel.x + 30,
3549                        y,
3550                        panel.width - 60,
3551                        42
3552                    )
3553
3554                    if rect.collidepoint(mx, my):
3555                        set_png_resolution(
3556                            width,
3557                            height
3558                        )
3559                        audio_manager.play_click()
3560                        return
3561
3562                    y += 52
3563
3564            if state.submenu_open == "GIF Resolution":
3565
3566                y = panel.y + 30
3567
3568                for width, height in GIF_RESOLUTION_PRESETS:
3569
3570                    rect = pg.Rect(
3571                        panel.x + 30,
3572                        y,
3573                        panel.width - 60,
3574                        42
3575                    )
3576
3577                    if rect.collidepoint(mx, my):
3578                        set_gif_resolution(
3579                            width,
3580                            height
3581                        )
3582                        audio_manager.play_click()
3583                        return
3584
3585                    y += 52
3586
3587            if state.submenu_open == "Audio Settings":
3588
3589                sliders = [
3590                    (
3591                        "music_volume",
3592                        panel.y + 110
3593                    ),
3594                    (
3595                        "ui_volume",
3596                        panel.y + 220
3597                    ),
3598                ]
3599
3600                for key, slider_y in sliders:
3601
3602                    slider_rect = pg.Rect(
3603                        panel.x + 260,
3604                        slider_y + 6,
3605                        panel.width - 360,
3606                        22
3607                    )
3608
3609                    hit_rect = slider_rect.inflate(
3610                        20,
3611                        34
3612                    )
3613
3614                    if hit_rect.collidepoint(mx, my):
3615                        value = (
3616                            mx - slider_rect.x
3617                        ) / slider_rect.width
3618
3619                        set_volume(
3620                            audio_manager,
3621                            key,
3622                            value
3623                        )
3624
3625                        audio_manager.play_click()
3626                        return
3627
3628                return
3629
3630            if state.submenu_open == "Music Volume":
3631
3632                change_volume(
3633                    audio_manager,
3634                    "music_volume",
3635                    0.05
3636                )
3637                audio_manager.play_click()
3638                return
3639
3640            if state.submenu_open == "UI Volume":
3641
3642                change_volume(
3643                    audio_manager,
3644                    "ui_volume",
3645                    0.05
3646                )
3647                audio_manager.play_click()
3648                return
3649
3650            if state.submenu_open == "Show Performance Info":
3651
3652                toggle_performance_info()
3653                audio_manager.play_click()
3654                return
3655
3656            start_y = 240
3657
3658            for i, option in enumerate(get_menu_options(state)):
3659
3660                rect = pg.Rect(
3661                    CONFIG.width // 2 - 250,
3662                    start_y + i * 70,
3663                    500,
3664                    55
3665                )
3666
3667                if rect.collidepoint(mx, my):
3668
3669                    state.menu_index = i
3670
3671                    InputHandler.activate_menu_option(
3672                        state,
3673                        option,
3674                        audio_manager
3675                    )
3676
3677            return
3678
3679        # ========================================================
3680        # NORMAL
3681        # ========================================================
3682
3683        if event.button == 1:
3684
3685            Camera.center_on_pixel(
3686                state,
3687                mx,
3688                my
3689            )
3690
3691        elif event.button == 4:
3692
3693            Camera.zoom(state, 1)
3694            unlock_achievement(state, "first_zoom")
3695
3696        elif event.button == 5:
3697
3698            Camera.zoom(state, -1)
3699            unlock_achievement(state, "first_zoom")
3700
3701# ============================================================================
3702# UI
3703# ============================================================================
3704
3705
3706class UI:
3707
3708    def __init__(self):
3709
3710        self.font = pg.font.SysFont(
3711            CONFIG.font_name,
3712            CONFIG.font_size
3713        )
3714
3715    def draw(self, screen, state):
3716
3717        if not state.show_ui:
3718
3719            if state.tutorial_active:
3720                self.draw_tutorial_overlay(screen, state)
3721
3722            return
3723
3724        palette_name = PALETTES[
3725            state.current_palette
3726        ]["name"]
3727
3728        lines = [
3729            f"Fractal: {state.current_fractal.value}",
3730        ]
3731        
3732        if state.current_fractal == FractalType.MANDELBROT:
3733
3734            lines += [
3735                f"Mandelbrot Z Real: {state.mandelbrot_zx:.6f}",
3736                f"Mandelbrot Z Imag: {state.mandelbrot_zy:.6f}",
3737                f"Mandelbrot Preset: {state.mandelbrot_preset_name}",
3738            ]
3739
3740        if state.current_fractal == FractalType.JULIA:
3741
3742            lines += [
3743                f"Julia C Real: {state.julia_cx:.6f}",
3744                f"Julia C Imag: {state.julia_cy:.6f}",
3745                f"Julia Preset: {state.julia_preset_name}",
3746            ]
3747
3748        if state.current_fractal in (
3749            FractalType.MANDELBROT,
3750            FractalType.JULIA
3751        ):
3752
3753            lines += [
3754                f"Power: {state.fractal_power}",
3755            ]
3756        
3757        if is_parameter_edit_locked(state):
3758
3759            lines += [
3760                "Parameter editing locked: zoom out to change fractal parameters",
3761            ]
3762
3763        lines += [
3764            f"Iterations: {state.max_iter}",
3765            f"Palette: {palette_name}",
3766        ]
3767
3768        if CONFIG.show_performance_info:
3769
3770            lines += [
3771                f"Render: {state.last_render_time_ms:.2f} ms",
3772                f"FPS: {state.last_render_fps:.1f}",
3773            ]
3774
3775        lines += [
3776            "",
3777            "ESC = menu"
3778        ]
3779        
3780
3781        y = 10
3782
3783        for line in lines:
3784
3785            text = self.font.render(
3786                line,
3787                True,
3788                (255, 255, 255)
3789            )
3790
3791            screen.blit(text, (10, y))
3792
3793            y += 30
3794
3795        now = time.time()
3796
3797        if (
3798            state.export_message and
3799            now - state.export_message_timer < 5.0
3800        ):
3801
3802            text = self.font.render(
3803                state.export_message,
3804                True,
3805                (255, 255, 255)
3806            )
3807
3808            screen.blit(
3809                text,
3810                (20, CONFIG.height - 40)
3811            )
3812
3813        if state.tutorial_active:
3814            self.draw_tutorial_overlay(screen, state)
3815
3816    def draw_tutorial_overlay(self, screen, state):
3817
3818        overlay = pg.Surface(
3819            (CONFIG.width, CONFIG.height),
3820            pg.SRCALPHA
3821        )
3822
3823        overlay.fill((0, 0, 0, 120))
3824        screen.blit(overlay, (0, 0))
3825
3826        panel = pg.Rect(
3827            CONFIG.width // 2 - 550,
3828            CONFIG.height - 310,
3829            1100,
3830            230
3831        )
3832
3833        pg.draw.rect(
3834            screen,
3835            (20, 20, 24),
3836            panel,
3837            border_radius=16
3838        )
3839
3840        pg.draw.rect(
3841            screen,
3842            (90, 90, 140),
3843            panel,
3844            width=2,
3845            border_radius=16
3846        )
3847
3848        step_index = max(
3849            0,
3850            min(state.tutorial_step_index, len(TUTORIAL_STEPS) - 1)
3851        )
3852
3853        step = TUTORIAL_STEPS[step_index]
3854
3855        title = step.get(
3856            "title",
3857            "Tutorial"
3858        )
3859
3860        body, required = get_tutorial_step_text(state)
3861
3862        title_text = self.font.render(
3863            f"Tutorial {step_index + 1}/{len(TUTORIAL_STEPS)}: {title}",
3864            True,
3865            (255, 255, 255)
3866        )
3867
3868        screen.blit(
3869            title_text,
3870            (panel.x + 30, panel.y + 25)
3871        )
3872
3873        body_text = self.font.render(
3874            body,
3875            True,
3876            (220, 220, 220)
3877        )
3878
3879        screen.blit(
3880            body_text,
3881            (panel.x + 30, panel.y + 78)
3882        )
3883
3884        required_text = self.font.render(
3885            required,
3886            True,
3887            (255, 255, 255)
3888        )
3889
3890        screen.blit(
3891            required_text,
3892            (panel.x + 30, panel.y + 118)
3893        )
3894
3895        hint_text = self.font.render(
3896            "ESC skips tutorial",
3897            True,
3898            (190, 190, 210)
3899        )
3900
3901        screen.blit(
3902            hint_text,
3903            (panel.x + 30, panel.y + 165)
3904        )
3905
3906    def draw_benchmark_results_overlay(self, screen, state):
3907
3908        overlay = pg.Surface(
3909            (CONFIG.width, CONFIG.height),
3910            pg.SRCALPHA
3911        )
3912
3913        overlay.fill((0, 0, 0, 180))
3914        screen.blit(overlay, (0, 0))
3915
3916        panel_width = min(
3917            900,
3918            CONFIG.width - 120
3919        )
3920
3921        panel_height = min(
3922            560,
3923            CONFIG.height - 120
3924        )
3925
3926        panel = pg.Rect(
3927            CONFIG.width // 2 - panel_width // 2,
3928            CONFIG.height // 2 - panel_height // 2,
3929            panel_width,
3930            panel_height
3931        )
3932
3933        pg.draw.rect(
3934            screen,
3935            (20, 20, 24),
3936            panel,
3937            border_radius=16
3938        )
3939
3940        pg.draw.rect(
3941            screen,
3942            (90, 90, 140),
3943            panel,
3944            width=2,
3945            border_radius=16
3946        )
3947
3948        y = panel.y + 40
3949
3950        for index, line in enumerate(state.benchmark_result_lines):
3951
3952            font = self.font if index == 0 else self.font
3953
3954            text = font.render(
3955                line,
3956                True,
3957                (255, 255, 255)
3958            )
3959
3960            screen.blit(
3961                text,
3962                (panel.x + 40, y)
3963            )
3964
3965            y += 42
3966
3967
3968# ============================================================================
3969# MENU UI
3970# ============================================================================
3971
3972
3973class MenuUI:
3974
3975    def __init__(self):
3976
3977        self.font = pg.font.SysFont(
3978            CONFIG.font_name,
3979            34
3980        )
3981
3982        self.small_font = pg.font.SysFont(
3983            CONFIG.font_name,
3984            22
3985        )
3986
3987    def update_hover_sound(
3988        self,
3989        state,
3990        audio_manager,
3991        hovered_item
3992    ):
3993
3994        if hovered_item != state.hovered_menu_item:
3995
3996            state.hovered_menu_item = hovered_item
3997
3998            if hovered_item:
3999                audio_manager.play_hover()
4000
4001    def draw(self, screen, state, audio_manager):
4002
4003        overlay = pg.Surface(
4004            (CONFIG.width, CONFIG.height),
4005            pg.SRCALPHA
4006        )
4007
4008        overlay.fill((0, 0, 0, 180))
4009
4010        screen.blit(overlay, (0, 0))
4011
4012        title = self.font.render(
4013            "SETTINGS MENU",
4014            True,
4015            (255, 255, 255)
4016        )
4017
4018        screen.blit(title, (50, 50))
4019
4020        start_y = 240
4021
4022        mouse_x, mouse_y = pg.mouse.get_pos()
4023
4024        hovered_item = None
4025
4026        for i, option in enumerate(get_menu_options(state)):
4027
4028            rect = pg.Rect(
4029                CONFIG.width // 2 - 250,
4030                start_y + i * 70,
4031                500,
4032                55
4033            )
4034
4035            hovered = rect.collidepoint(
4036                mouse_x,
4037                mouse_y
4038            )
4039
4040            if hovered:
4041                hovered_item = f"menu:{option}"
4042
4043            selected = (
4044                hovered or
4045                i == state.menu_index
4046            )
4047
4048            bg = (
4049                (80, 80, 120)
4050                if selected
4051                else
4052                (40, 40, 40)
4053            )
4054
4055            pg.draw.rect(
4056                screen,
4057                bg,
4058                rect,
4059                border_radius=10
4060            )
4061
4062            text = self.font.render(
4063                option,
4064                True,
4065                (255, 255, 255)
4066            )
4067
4068            screen.blit(
4069                text,
4070                (
4071                    rect.x + 20,
4072                    rect.y + 10
4073                )
4074            )
4075
4076        submenu_hovered_item = self.draw_submenu(screen, state)
4077
4078        if submenu_hovered_item:
4079            hovered_item = submenu_hovered_item
4080
4081        if state.preset_name_input_active:
4082            self.draw_preset_name_modal(screen, state)
4083
4084        self.update_hover_sound(
4085            state,
4086            audio_manager,
4087            hovered_item
4088        )
4089
4090    def draw_preset_name_modal(self, screen, state):
4091
4092        modal = pg.Rect(
4093            CONFIG.width // 2 - 330,
4094            CONFIG.height // 2 - 120,
4095            660,
4096            220
4097        )
4098
4099        pg.draw.rect(
4100            screen,
4101            (20, 20, 20),
4102            modal,
4103            border_radius=16
4104        )
4105
4106        pg.draw.rect(
4107            screen,
4108            (90, 90, 140),
4109            modal,
4110            width=2,
4111            border_radius=16
4112        )
4113
4114        title = self.font.render(
4115            "Add Current Preset",
4116            True,
4117            (255, 255, 255)
4118        )
4119
4120        screen.blit(
4121            title,
4122            (modal.x + 30, modal.y + 25)
4123        )
4124
4125        input_rect = pg.Rect(
4126            modal.x + 30,
4127            modal.y + 85,
4128            modal.width - 60,
4129            46
4130        )
4131
4132        pg.draw.rect(
4133            screen,
4134            (35, 35, 35),
4135            input_rect,
4136            border_radius=8
4137        )
4138
4139        text = self.small_font.render(
4140            state.preset_name_input + "_",
4141            True,
4142            (255, 255, 255)
4143        )
4144
4145        screen.blit(
4146            text,
4147            (input_rect.x + 12, input_rect.y + 12)
4148        )
4149
4150        hint = self.small_font.render(
4151            "Enter = save    Escape = cancel",
4152            True,
4153            (220, 220, 220)
4154        )
4155
4156        screen.blit(
4157            hint,
4158            (modal.x + 30, modal.y + 155)
4159        )
4160
4161    def draw_option_rows(
4162        self,
4163        screen,
4164        rows,
4165        selected_index,
4166        hover_prefix,
4167        panel,
4168        y
4169    ):
4170
4171        mouse_x, mouse_y = pg.mouse.get_pos()
4172        hovered_item = None
4173
4174        for i, label in enumerate(rows):
4175
4176            rect = pg.Rect(
4177                panel.x + 30,
4178                y,
4179                panel.width - 60,
4180                42
4181            )
4182
4183            hovered = rect.collidepoint(
4184                mouse_x,
4185                mouse_y
4186            )
4187
4188            if hovered:
4189                hovered_item = f"{hover_prefix}:{i}"
4190
4191            selected = (
4192                i == selected_index
4193            )
4194
4195            bg = (
4196                (80, 80, 120)
4197                if selected or hovered
4198                else
4199                (35, 35, 35)
4200            )
4201
4202            pg.draw.rect(
4203                screen,
4204                bg,
4205                rect,
4206                border_radius=8
4207            )
4208
4209            text = self.small_font.render(
4210                label,
4211                True,
4212                (255, 255, 255)
4213            )
4214
4215            screen.blit(
4216                text,
4217                (
4218                    rect.x + 10,
4219                    rect.y + 10
4220                )
4221            )
4222
4223            y += 52
4224
4225        return hovered_item
4226
4227    def draw_volume_slider(
4228        self,
4229        screen,
4230        panel,
4231        y,
4232        label,
4233        value,
4234        hover_id
4235    ):
4236
4237        mouse_x, mouse_y = pg.mouse.get_pos()
4238
4239        slider_rect = pg.Rect(
4240            panel.x + 260,
4241            y + 6,
4242            panel.width - 360,
4243            22
4244        )
4245
4246        hit_rect = slider_rect.inflate(
4247            20,
4248            34
4249        )
4250
4251        hovered = hit_rect.collidepoint(
4252            mouse_x,
4253            mouse_y
4254        )
4255
4256        label_text = self.small_font.render(
4257            f"{label}: {int(value * 100):3d}%",
4258            True,
4259            (255, 255, 255)
4260        )
4261
4262        screen.blit(
4263            label_text,
4264            (panel.x + 30, y)
4265        )
4266
4267        bg = (
4268            (80, 80, 120)
4269            if hovered
4270            else (45, 45, 45)
4271        )
4272
4273        pg.draw.rect(
4274            screen,
4275            bg,
4276            slider_rect,
4277            border_radius=10
4278        )
4279
4280        fill_rect = pg.Rect(
4281            slider_rect.x,
4282            slider_rect.y,
4283            int(slider_rect.width * clamp_volume(value)),
4284            slider_rect.height
4285        )
4286
4287        pg.draw.rect(
4288            screen,
4289            (120, 120, 180),
4290            fill_rect,
4291            border_radius=10
4292        )
4293
4294        knob_x = (
4295            slider_rect.x +
4296            int(slider_rect.width * clamp_volume(value))
4297        )
4298
4299        pg.draw.circle(
4300            screen,
4301            (230, 230, 255),
4302            (knob_x, slider_rect.centery),
4303            15
4304        )
4305
4306        if hovered:
4307            return hover_id
4308
4309        return None
4310
4311    def draw_submenu(self, screen, state):
4312
4313        if not state.submenu_open:
4314            return None
4315
4316        panel = pg.Rect(
4317            80,
4318            120,
4319            CONFIG.width - 160,
4320            CONFIG.height - 240
4321        )
4322
4323        pg.draw.rect(
4324            screen,
4325            (18, 18, 18),
4326            panel,
4327            border_radius=16
4328        )
4329
4330        y = panel.y + 30
4331
4332        lines = []
4333
4334        mouse_x, mouse_y = pg.mouse.get_pos()
4335        hovered_item = None
4336
4337        title = self.font.render(
4338            state.submenu_open,
4339            True,
4340            (255, 255, 255)
4341        )
4342
4343        screen.blit(
4344            title,
4345            (panel.x + 30, panel.y - 60)
4346        )
4347
4348        category_options = get_category_options(
4349            state,
4350            state.submenu_open
4351        )
4352
4353        if category_options:
4354
4355            rows = []
4356
4357            for option in category_options:
4358
4359                label = option
4360
4361                if option == "Show Performance Info":
4362                    label = (
4363                        "Show Performance Info: " +
4364                        ("ON" if CONFIG.show_performance_info else "OFF")
4365                    )
4366
4367                rows.append(label)
4368
4369            return self.draw_option_rows(
4370                screen,
4371                rows,
4372                -1,
4373                f"submenu:{state.submenu_open}",
4374                panel,
4375                y
4376            )
4377
4378        if state.submenu_open == "Audio Settings":
4379
4380            music_hover = self.draw_volume_slider(
4381                screen,
4382                panel,
4383                y + 80,
4384                "Music Volume",
4385                CONFIG.music_volume,
4386                "submenu:audio:music"
4387            )
4388
4389            ui_hover = self.draw_volume_slider(
4390                screen,
4391                panel,
4392                y + 190,
4393                "UI Volume",
4394                CONFIG.ui_volume,
4395                "submenu:audio:ui"
4396            )
4397
4398            return music_hover or ui_hover
4399
4400        if state.submenu_open == "Palette":
4401
4402            rows = [
4403                palette["name"]
4404                for palette in PALETTES
4405            ]
4406
4407            return self.draw_option_rows(
4408                screen,
4409                rows,
4410                state.current_palette,
4411                "submenu:palette",
4412                panel,
4413                y
4414            )
4415
4416        elif state.submenu_open == "Power":
4417
4418            if is_parameter_edit_locked(state):
4419
4420                warning = self.small_font.render(
4421                    "Parameter editing locked: zoom out to change power",
4422                    True,
4423                    (255, 220, 120)
4424                )
4425
4426                screen.blit(
4427                    warning,
4428                    (panel.x + 30, y)
4429                )
4430
4431                y += 42
4432
4433            rows = [
4434                f"Power {power}"
4435                for power in POWER_VALUES
4436            ]
4437
4438            selected = POWER_VALUES.index(
4439                state.fractal_power
4440            )
4441
4442            return self.draw_option_rows(
4443                screen,
4444                rows,
4445                selected,
4446                "submenu:power",
4447                panel,
4448                y
4449            )
4450
4451        elif state.submenu_open == "Iterations":
4452
4453            lines = [
4454                f"Current Iterations: {state.max_iter}",
4455                "",
4456                "Q = decrease",
4457                "E = increase"
4458            ]
4459
4460        elif state.submenu_open == "Game Resolution":
4461
4462            rows = [
4463                f"{width}x{height}"
4464                for width, height in GAME_RESOLUTION_PRESETS
4465            ]
4466
4467            selected = GAME_RESOLUTION_PRESETS.index(
4468                (CONFIG.base_width, CONFIG.base_height)
4469            )
4470
4471            return self.draw_option_rows(
4472                screen,
4473                rows,
4474                selected,
4475                "submenu:game_resolution",
4476                panel,
4477                y
4478            )
4479
4480        elif state.submenu_open == "PNG Resolution":
4481
4482            rows = [
4483                f"{width}x{height}"
4484                for width, height in PNG_RESOLUTION_PRESETS
4485            ]
4486
4487            selected = PNG_RESOLUTION_PRESETS.index(
4488                (
4489                    CONFIG.png_export_width,
4490                    CONFIG.png_export_height
4491                )
4492            )
4493
4494            return self.draw_option_rows(
4495                screen,
4496                rows,
4497                selected,
4498                "submenu:png_resolution",
4499                panel,
4500                y
4501            )
4502
4503        elif state.submenu_open == "GIF Resolution":
4504
4505            rows = [
4506                f"{width}x{height}"
4507                for width, height in GIF_RESOLUTION_PRESETS
4508            ]
4509
4510            selected = GIF_RESOLUTION_PRESETS.index(
4511                (
4512                    CONFIG.gif_export_width,
4513                    CONFIG.gif_export_height
4514                )
4515            )
4516
4517            return self.draw_option_rows(
4518                screen,
4519                rows,
4520                selected,
4521                "submenu:gif_resolution",
4522                panel,
4523                y
4524            )
4525
4526        elif state.submenu_open == "Show Performance Info":
4527
4528            lines = [
4529                "Show Performance Info: " +
4530                ("ON" if CONFIG.show_performance_info else "OFF"),
4531                "",
4532                "Enter/LEFT/RIGHT/click = toggle"
4533            ]
4534
4535        elif state.submenu_open == "Fractal Type":
4536
4537            fractals = [
4538                (FractalType.MANDELBROT, "Mandelbrot"),
4539                (FractalType.JULIA, "Julia Set"),
4540                (FractalType.BURNING_SHIP, "Burning Ship"),
4541            ]
4542
4543            rows = [
4544                label
4545                for fractal_type, label in fractals
4546            ]
4547
4548            selected = [
4549                fractal_type
4550                for fractal_type, label in fractals
4551            ].index(state.current_fractal)
4552
4553            return self.draw_option_rows(
4554                screen,
4555                rows,
4556                selected,
4557                "submenu:fractal",
4558                panel,
4559                y
4560            )
4561
4562        elif state.submenu_open == "Mandelbrot Presets":
4563
4564            if is_parameter_edit_locked(state):
4565
4566                warning = self.small_font.render(
4567                    "Parameter editing locked: zoom out to change presets",
4568                    True,
4569                    (255, 220, 120)
4570                )
4571
4572                screen.blit(
4573                    warning,
4574                    (panel.x + 30, y)
4575                )
4576
4577                y += 42
4578
4579            add_rect = pg.Rect(
4580                panel.x + 30,
4581                y,
4582                panel.width - 60,
4583                42
4584            )
4585
4586            add_hovered = add_rect.collidepoint(
4587                mouse_x,
4588                mouse_y
4589            )
4590
4591            if add_hovered:
4592                hovered_item = "submenu:mandelbrot:add"
4593
4594            pg.draw.rect(
4595                screen,
4596                (70, 70, 110) if add_hovered else (35, 35, 35),
4597                add_rect,
4598                border_radius=8
4599            )
4600
4601            text = self.small_font.render(
4602                "Add Current Preset",
4603                True,
4604                (255, 255, 255)
4605            )
4606
4607            screen.blit(
4608                text,
4609                (add_rect.x + 10, add_rect.y + 10)
4610            )
4611
4612            y += 52
4613
4614            for i, preset in enumerate(
4615                get_combined_mandelbrot_presets(state)
4616            ):
4617
4618                name = preset["name"]
4619                zx = preset["mandelbrot_zx"]
4620                zy = preset["mandelbrot_zy"]
4621
4622                rect = pg.Rect(
4623                    panel.x + 30,
4624                    y,
4625                    panel.width - 60,
4626                    42
4627                )
4628
4629                delete_rect = pg.Rect(
4630                    rect.right - 52,
4631                    rect.y + 6,
4632                    36,
4633                    30
4634                )
4635
4636                hovered = rect.collidepoint(
4637                    mouse_x,
4638                    mouse_y
4639                )
4640
4641                if hovered:
4642                    hovered_item = f"submenu:mandelbrot:{i}"
4643
4644                selected = (
4645                    i == state.mandelbrot_preset_index
4646                )
4647
4648                bg = (
4649                    (80, 80, 120)
4650                    if selected
4651                    else
4652                    (35, 35, 35)
4653                )
4654
4655                pg.draw.rect(
4656                    screen,
4657                    bg,
4658                    rect,
4659                    border_radius=8
4660                )
4661
4662                label = f"{name}  ({zx:.6f}, {zy:.6f})"
4663
4664                if preset.get("custom"):
4665                    label += "  [custom]"
4666
4667                text = self.small_font.render(
4668                    label,
4669                    True,
4670                    (255, 255, 255)
4671                )
4672
4673                screen.blit(
4674                    text,
4675                    (
4676                        rect.x + 10,
4677                        rect.y + 10
4678                    )
4679                )
4680
4681                if preset.get("custom"):
4682                    delete_hovered = delete_rect.collidepoint(
4683                        mouse_x,
4684                        mouse_y
4685                    )
4686
4687                    if delete_hovered:
4688                        hovered_item = f"submenu:mandelbrot:delete:{i}"
4689
4690                    pg.draw.rect(
4691                        screen,
4692                        (110, 50, 50) if delete_hovered else (70, 40, 40),
4693                        delete_rect,
4694                        border_radius=6
4695                    )
4696
4697                    delete_text = self.small_font.render(
4698                        "X",
4699                        True,
4700                        (255, 255, 255)
4701                    )
4702
4703                    screen.blit(
4704                        delete_text,
4705                        (delete_rect.x + 11, delete_rect.y + 4)
4706                    )
4707
4708                y += 52
4709
4710            return hovered_item
4711
4712        elif state.submenu_open == "Julia Presets":
4713
4714            if is_parameter_edit_locked(state):
4715
4716                warning = self.small_font.render(
4717                    "Parameter editing locked: zoom out to change presets",
4718                    True,
4719                    (255, 220, 120)
4720                )
4721
4722                screen.blit(
4723                    warning,
4724                    (panel.x + 30, y)
4725                )
4726
4727                y += 42
4728
4729            add_rect = pg.Rect(
4730                panel.x + 30,
4731                y,
4732                panel.width - 60,
4733                42
4734            )
4735
4736            add_hovered = add_rect.collidepoint(
4737                mouse_x,
4738                mouse_y
4739            )
4740
4741            if add_hovered:
4742                hovered_item = "submenu:julia:add"
4743
4744            pg.draw.rect(
4745                screen,
4746                (70, 70, 110) if add_hovered else (35, 35, 35),
4747                add_rect,
4748                border_radius=8
4749            )
4750
4751            text = self.small_font.render(
4752                "Add Current Preset",
4753                True,
4754                (255, 255, 255)
4755            )
4756
4757            screen.blit(
4758                text,
4759                (add_rect.x + 10, add_rect.y + 10)
4760            )
4761
4762            y += 52
4763
4764            for i, preset in enumerate(
4765                get_combined_julia_presets(state)
4766            ):
4767
4768                name = preset["name"]
4769                cx = preset["julia_cx"]
4770                cy = preset["julia_cy"]
4771
4772                rect = pg.Rect(
4773                    panel.x + 30,
4774                    y,
4775                    panel.width - 60,
4776                    42
4777                )
4778
4779                delete_rect = pg.Rect(
4780                    rect.right - 52,
4781                    rect.y + 6,
4782                    36,
4783                    30
4784                )
4785
4786                hovered = rect.collidepoint(
4787                    mouse_x,
4788                    mouse_y
4789                )
4790
4791                if hovered:
4792                    hovered_item = f"submenu:julia:{i}"
4793
4794                selected = (
4795                    i == state.julia_preset_index
4796                )
4797
4798                bg = (
4799                    (80, 80, 120)
4800                    if selected
4801                    else
4802                    (35, 35, 35)
4803                )
4804
4805                pg.draw.rect(
4806                    screen,
4807                    bg,
4808                    rect,
4809                    border_radius=8
4810                )
4811
4812                label = f"{name}  ({cx:.6f}, {cy:.6f})"
4813
4814                if preset.get("custom"):
4815                    label += "  [custom]"
4816
4817                text = self.small_font.render(
4818                    label,
4819                    True,
4820                    (255, 255, 255)
4821                )
4822
4823                screen.blit(
4824                    text,
4825                    (
4826                        rect.x + 10,
4827                        rect.y + 10
4828                    )
4829                )
4830
4831                if preset.get("custom"):
4832                    delete_hovered = delete_rect.collidepoint(
4833                        mouse_x,
4834                        mouse_y
4835                    )
4836
4837                    if delete_hovered:
4838                        hovered_item = f"submenu:julia:delete:{i}"
4839
4840                    pg.draw.rect(
4841                        screen,
4842                        (110, 50, 50) if delete_hovered else (70, 40, 40),
4843                        delete_rect,
4844                        border_radius=6
4845                    )
4846
4847                    delete_text = self.small_font.render(
4848                        "X",
4849                        True,
4850                        (255, 255, 255)
4851                    )
4852
4853                    screen.blit(
4854                        delete_text,
4855                        (delete_rect.x + 11, delete_rect.y + 4)
4856                    )
4857
4858                y += 52
4859
4860            return hovered_item
4861
4862        elif state.submenu_open == "Achievements":
4863
4864            for achievement_id, data in ACHIEVEMENTS.items():
4865
4866                name, description = data
4867
4868                unlocked = state.user_progress.get(
4869                    "achievements",
4870                    {}
4871                ).get(achievement_id, False)
4872
4873                rect = pg.Rect(
4874                    panel.x + 30,
4875                    y,
4876                    panel.width - 60,
4877                    58
4878                )
4879
4880                pg.draw.rect(
4881                    screen,
4882                    (55, 70, 55) if unlocked else (35, 35, 35),
4883                    rect,
4884                    border_radius=8
4885                )
4886
4887                title = (
4888                    f"{name} - Unlocked"
4889                    if unlocked
4890                    else f"{name} - Locked"
4891                )
4892
4893                title_text = self.small_font.render(
4894                    title,
4895                    True,
4896                    (255, 255, 255)
4897                )
4898
4899                desc_text = self.small_font.render(
4900                    description if unlocked else "Locked",
4901                    True,
4902                    (210, 210, 210)
4903                )
4904
4905                screen.blit(
4906                    title_text,
4907                    (rect.x + 10, rect.y + 8)
4908                )
4909
4910                screen.blit(
4911                    desc_text,
4912                    (rect.x + 10, rect.y + 32)
4913                )
4914
4915                y += 68
4916
4917            return hovered_item
4918
4919        elif state.submenu_open == "Controls":
4920
4921            lines = [
4922                "WASD = move",
4923                "Mouse wheel = zoom",
4924                "Left click = center",
4925                "Q/E = iterations",
4926                "R/F = palettes",
4927                "I/J/K/L = edit Julia or Mandelbrot parameters",
4928                "P = export PNG",
4929                "Export Settings -> Export GIF = zoom animation"
4930            ]
4931
4932        for line in lines:
4933
4934            text = self.small_font.render(
4935                line,
4936                True,
4937                (220, 220, 220)
4938            )
4939
4940            screen.blit(
4941                text,
4942                (panel.x + 40, y)
4943            )
4944
4945            y += 34
4946
4947        return hovered_item
4948
4949# ============================================================================
4950# RENDERER
4951# ============================================================================
4952
4953
4954class Renderer:
4955
4956    def __init__(self, screen):
4957
4958        self.screen = screen
4959
4960    def render_frame(
4961        self,
4962        state,
4963        ui,
4964        menu_ui,
4965        audio_manager
4966    ):
4967
4968        self.screen = pg.display.get_surface()
4969
4970        if state.needs_update:
4971
4972            t0 = time.perf_counter()
4973
4974            state.surface = compute_surface(
4975                state,
4976                CONFIG.width,
4977                CONFIG.height
4978            )
4979
4980            dt = time.perf_counter() - t0
4981
4982            # ====================================================
4983            # STORE RENDER STATS
4984            # ====================================================
4985
4986            state.last_render_time_ms = dt * 1000.0
4987
4988            if dt > 0.0:
4989                state.last_render_fps = 1.0 / dt
4990            else:
4991                state.last_render_fps = 0.0
4992
4993            state.needs_update = False
4994
4995            if CONFIG.show_performance_info:
4996                pg.display.set_caption(
4997                    f"{CONFIG.window_title} "
4998                    f"| render {state.last_render_time_ms:.1f} ms "
4999                    f"| {state.last_render_fps:.1f} FPS"
5000                )
5001            else:
5002                pg.display.set_caption(
5003                    CONFIG.window_title
5004                )
5005
5006        if state.surface:
5007
5008            self.screen.blit(
5009                state.surface,
5010                (0, 0)
5011            )
5012
5013        ui.draw(self.screen, state)
5014
5015        if state.menu_open:
5016
5017            menu_ui.draw(
5018                self.screen,
5019                state,
5020                audio_manager
5021            )
5022
5023        if state.benchmark_results_open:
5024
5025            ui.draw_benchmark_results_overlay(
5026                self.screen,
5027                state
5028            )
5029
5030# ============================================================================
5031# APPLICATION
5032# ============================================================================
5033
5034
5035class Application:
5036
5037    def __init__(self):
5038
5039        apply_user_settings_to_config(
5040            load_user_settings()
5041        )
5042
5043        pg.init()
5044
5045        self.screen = pg.display.set_mode(
5046            (
5047                CONFIG.width,
5048                CONFIG.height
5049            )
5050        )
5051
5052        pg.display.set_caption(
5053            CONFIG.window_title
5054        )
5055
5056        self.clock = pg.time.Clock()
5057
5058        self.audio_manager = AudioManager()
5059        self.audio_manager.start_music()
5060
5061        self.state = create_initial_state()
5062        self.state.custom_presets = load_user_presets()
5063        self.state.user_progress = load_user_progress()
5064
5065        if not self.state.user_progress.get("tutorial_completed", False):
5066            self.state.tutorial_active = True
5067
5068        self.ui = UI()
5069
5070        self.menu_ui = MenuUI()
5071
5072        self.renderer = Renderer(
5073            self.screen
5074        )
5075
5076    def run(self):
5077
5078        while self.state.running:
5079
5080            InputHandler.process_events(
5081                self.state,
5082                self.audio_manager
5083            )
5084
5085            self.renderer.render_frame(
5086                self.state,
5087                self.ui,
5088                self.menu_ui,
5089                self.audio_manager
5090            )
5091
5092            pg.display.flip()
5093
5094            self.clock.tick(
5095                CONFIG.target_fps
5096            )
5097
5098        pg.quit()
5099
5100# ============================================================================
5101# ENTRY
5102# ============================================================================
5103
5104
5105def main():
5106
5107    app = Application()
5108
5109    app.run()
5110
5111
5112if __name__ == "__main__":
5113    main()
@dataclass
class AppConfig: 
 59@dataclass
 60class AppConfig:
 61
 62    """ Stores global application configuration.
 63    The configuration object centralizes:
 64    - window sizing
 65    - rendering resolution
 66    - export resolution
 67    - frame limiting
 68    - UI font configuration
 69    - camera movement scaling
 70    
 71    Runtime systems reference this shared configuration
 72    object instead of duplicating constants.
 73    """
 74
 75    upscale: int = 1
 76
 77    base_width: int = 1920
 78    base_height: int = 1080
 79
 80    png_export_width: int = 3840
 81    png_export_height: int = 2160
 82
 83    gif_export_width: int = 1280
 84    gif_export_height: int = 720
 85
 86    target_fps: int = 60
 87
 88    base_move_speed: float = 0.05
 89
 90    music_volume: float = 0.15
 91    ui_volume: float = 0.5
 92    show_performance_info: bool = False
 93
 94    font_name: str = "consolas"
 95    font_size: int = 24
 96
 97    window_title: str = "GPU Fractal Explorer"
 98
 99    @property
100    def width(self):
101        return int(self.base_width * self.upscale)
102
103    @property
104    def height(self):
105        return int(self.base_height * self.upscale)
106
107    @property
108    def export_width(self):
109        return self.png_export_width
110
111    @export_width.setter
112    def export_width(self, value):
113        self.png_export_width = int(value)
114
115    @property
116    def export_height(self):
117        return self.png_export_height
118
119    @export_height.setter
120    def export_height(self, value):
121        self.png_export_height = int(value)

Stores global application configuration. The configuration object centralizes:

  • window sizing
  • rendering resolution
  • export resolution
  • frame limiting
  • UI font configuration
  • camera movement scaling

Runtime systems reference this shared configuration object instead of duplicating constants.

AppConfig( upscale: int = 1, base_width: int = 1920, base_height: int = 1080, png_export_width: int = 3840, png_export_height: int = 2160, gif_export_width: int = 1280, gif_export_height: int = 720, target_fps: int = 60, base_move_speed: float = 0.05, music_volume: float = 0.15, ui_volume: float = 0.5, show_performance_info: bool = False, font_name: str = 'consolas', font_size: int = 24, window_title: str = 'GPU Fractal Explorer')
upscale: int = 1
base_width: int = 1920
base_height: int = 1080
png_export_width: int = 3840
png_export_height: int = 2160
gif_export_width: int = 1280
gif_export_height: int = 720
target_fps: int = 60
base_move_speed: float = 0.05
music_volume: float = 0.15
ui_volume: float = 0.5
show_performance_info: bool = False
font_name: str = 'consolas'
font_size: int = 24
window_title: str = 'GPU Fractal Explorer'
width 
 99    @property
100    def width(self):
101        return int(self.base_width * self.upscale)
height 
103    @property
104    def height(self):
105        return int(self.base_height * self.upscale)
export_width 
107    @property
108    def export_width(self):
109        return self.png_export_width
export_height 
115    @property
116    def export_height(self):
117        return self.png_export_height
CONFIG = AppConfig(upscale=1, base_width=1920, base_height=1080, png_export_width=3840, png_export_height=2160, gif_export_width=1280, gif_export_height=720, target_fps=60, base_move_speed=0.05, music_volume=0.15, ui_volume=0.5, show_performance_info=False, font_name='consolas', font_size=24, window_title='GPU Fractal Explorer')
PARAMETER_EDIT_LOCK_WIDTH = 1e-06
BENCHMARK_WIDTH = 640
BENCHMARK_HEIGHT = 360
BENCHMARK_RUNS = 3
GIF_FRAME_COUNT = 90
GIF_DURATION_MS = 40
GIF_ZOOM_FACTOR = 0.92
GIF_MAX_WIDTH = 1920
GIF_MAX_HEIGHT = 1080
GAME_RESOLUTION_PRESETS = [(1280, 720), (1600, 900), (1920, 1080), (2560, 1440), (3840, 2160)]
PNG_RESOLUTION_PRESETS = [(1280, 720), (1920, 1080), (2560, 1440), (3840, 2160), (7680, 4320)]
GIF_RESOLUTION_PRESETS = [(640, 360), (854, 480), (1280, 720), (1920, 1080)]
USER_SETTINGS_DIR = 'settings'
USER_SETTINGS_FILE = 'settings\\user_settings.json'
USER_PROGRESS_FILE = 'settings\\user_progress.json'
EXPORT_DIR = 'exports'
PNG_EXPORT_DIR = 'exports\\pictures'
GIF_EXPORT_DIR = 'exports\\gifs'
ACHIEVEMENTS = {'tutorial_complete': ('First Steps', 'Complete the tutorial.'), 'first_zoom': ('Into the Fractal', 'Zoom in or out for the first time.'), 'palette_swapper': ('Color Explorer', 'Change the color palette.'), 'fractal_switcher': ('Shape Shifter', 'Switch to a different fractal type.'), 'first_export': ('Fractal Photographer', 'Export your first PNG or GIF.'), 'deep_zoom': ('Deep Diver', 'Zoom deeply enough for parameter editing to become locked.'), 'benchmark_runner': ('Speed Tester', 'Run the GPU vs CPU benchmark.')}
TUTORIAL_STEPS = [{'title': 'Welcome', 'text': 'This is a GPU fractal explorer rendered through CUDA/CuPy.', 'action': 'begin', 'required': 'Press Enter to begin.'}, {'title': 'Movement', 'text': 'Move the camera around the fractal.', 'action': 'movement', 'required': 'Press W, A, S, or D.'}, {'title': 'Zooming', 'text': 'Zoom in or out and watch the viewport update.', 'action': 'zoom', 'required': 'Use the mouse wheel.'}, {'title': 'Centering', 'text': 'Re-center the camera on a point in the fractal view.', 'action': 'center', 'required': 'Left-click the fractal view.'}, {'title': 'Iterations', 'text': 'Change the iteration count used by the renderer.', 'action': 'iterations', 'required': 'Press Q or E.'}, {'title': 'Palette', 'text': 'Switch to another color palette.', 'action': 'palette', 'required': 'Press R or F.'}, {'title': 'Fractal Parameters', 'text': 'Edit Mandelbrot or Julia parameters when available.', 'action': 'parameters', 'required': 'Press I, J, K, or L.'}, {'title': 'Menu', 'text': "Don't forget to explore other fractals and settings under the ECS menu.", 'action': 'menu', 'required': 'Press ESC to complete the tutorial.'}]
def default_user_settings(): 
267def default_user_settings():
268
269    return {
270        "game_width": 1920,
271        "game_height": 1080,
272        "png_export_width": 3840,
273        "png_export_height": 2160,
274        "gif_export_width": 1280,
275        "gif_export_height": 720,
276        "music_volume": 0.15,
277        "ui_volume": 0.5,
278        "show_performance_info": False,
279    }
def clamp_volume(value): 
282def clamp_volume(value):
283
284    try:
285        value = float(value)
286    except Exception:
287        value = 0.0
288
289    return max(0.0, min(1.0, value))
def normalize_resolution(width, height, presets, default): 
292def normalize_resolution(width, height, presets, default):
293
294    try:
295        width = int(width)
296        height = int(height)
297    except Exception:
298        return default
299
300    if (width, height) in presets:
301        return width, height
302
303    return default
def normalize_user_settings(data): 
306def normalize_user_settings(data):
307
308    defaults = default_user_settings()
309
310    if not isinstance(data, dict):
311        data = {}
312
313    game_width, game_height = normalize_resolution(
314        data.get("game_width"),
315        data.get("game_height"),
316        GAME_RESOLUTION_PRESETS,
317        (defaults["game_width"], defaults["game_height"])
318    )
319
320    png_width, png_height = normalize_resolution(
321        data.get("png_export_width"),
322        data.get("png_export_height"),
323        PNG_RESOLUTION_PRESETS,
324        (defaults["png_export_width"], defaults["png_export_height"])
325    )
326
327    gif_width, gif_height = normalize_resolution(
328        data.get("gif_export_width"),
329        data.get("gif_export_height"),
330        GIF_RESOLUTION_PRESETS,
331        (defaults["gif_export_width"], defaults["gif_export_height"])
332    )
333
334    return {
335        "game_width": game_width,
336        "game_height": game_height,
337        "png_export_width": png_width,
338        "png_export_height": png_height,
339        "gif_export_width": gif_width,
340        "gif_export_height": gif_height,
341        "music_volume": clamp_volume(
342            data.get("music_volume", defaults["music_volume"])
343        ),
344        "ui_volume": clamp_volume(
345            data.get("ui_volume", defaults["ui_volume"])
346        ),
347        "show_performance_info": (
348            data.get(
349                "show_performance_info",
350                defaults["show_performance_info"]
351            )
352            if isinstance(
353                data.get(
354                    "show_performance_info",
355                    defaults["show_performance_info"]
356                ),
357                bool
358            )
359            else defaults["show_performance_info"]
360        ),
361    }
def save_user_settings(settings): 
364def save_user_settings(settings):
365
366    os.makedirs(
367        USER_SETTINGS_DIR,
368        exist_ok=True
369    )
370
371    with open(USER_SETTINGS_FILE, "w", encoding="utf-8") as file:
372        json.dump(
373            settings,
374            file,
375            indent=4
376        )
def load_user_settings(): 
379def load_user_settings():
380
381    os.makedirs(
382        USER_SETTINGS_DIR,
383        exist_ok=True
384    )
385
386    if not os.path.exists(USER_SETTINGS_FILE):
387        settings = default_user_settings()
388        save_user_settings(settings)
389        return settings
390
391    try:
392        with open(USER_SETTINGS_FILE, "r", encoding="utf-8") as file:
393            data = json.load(file)
394
395    except Exception as e:
396        print(f"WARNING: Failed to load user settings: {e}")
397        data = {}
398
399    settings = normalize_user_settings(data)
400    save_user_settings(settings)
401    return settings
def apply_user_settings_to_config(settings): 
404def apply_user_settings_to_config(settings):
405
406    CONFIG.upscale = 1
407    CONFIG.base_width = settings["game_width"]
408    CONFIG.base_height = settings["game_height"]
409    CONFIG.png_export_width = settings["png_export_width"]
410    CONFIG.png_export_height = settings["png_export_height"]
411    CONFIG.gif_export_width = settings["gif_export_width"]
412    CONFIG.gif_export_height = settings["gif_export_height"]
413    CONFIG.music_volume = settings["music_volume"]
414    CONFIG.ui_volume = settings["ui_volume"]
415    CONFIG.show_performance_info = settings["show_performance_info"]
def current_user_settings(): 
418def current_user_settings():
419
420    return {
421        "game_width": CONFIG.base_width,
422        "game_height": CONFIG.base_height,
423        "png_export_width": CONFIG.png_export_width,
424        "png_export_height": CONFIG.png_export_height,
425        "gif_export_width": CONFIG.gif_export_width,
426        "gif_export_height": CONFIG.gif_export_height,
427        "music_volume": CONFIG.music_volume,
428        "ui_volume": CONFIG.ui_volume,
429        "show_performance_info": CONFIG.show_performance_info,
430    }
def update_and_save_user_setting(key, value): 
433def update_and_save_user_setting(key, value):
434
435    settings = current_user_settings()
436    settings[key] = value
437    settings = normalize_user_settings(settings)
438    apply_user_settings_to_config(settings)
439    save_user_settings(settings)
440    return settings
def save_current_user_settings(): 
443def save_current_user_settings():
444
445    save_user_settings(
446        normalize_user_settings(
447            current_user_settings()
448        )
449    )
def default_user_progress(): 
452def default_user_progress():
453
454    return {
455        "tutorial_completed": False,
456        "achievements": {
457            achievement_id: False
458            for achievement_id in ACHIEVEMENTS
459        }
460    }
def normalize_user_progress(data): 
463def normalize_user_progress(data):
464
465    defaults = default_user_progress()
466
467    if not isinstance(data, dict):
468        data = {}
469
470    achievements = data.get("achievements", {})
471
472    if not isinstance(achievements, dict):
473        achievements = {}
474
475    return {
476        "tutorial_completed": (
477            data.get(
478                "tutorial_completed",
479                defaults["tutorial_completed"]
480            )
481            if isinstance(data.get("tutorial_completed", False), bool)
482            else defaults["tutorial_completed"]
483        ),
484        "achievements": {
485            achievement_id: bool(
486                achievements.get(achievement_id, False)
487            )
488            for achievement_id in ACHIEVEMENTS
489        }
490    }
def save_user_progress(progress): 
493def save_user_progress(progress):
494
495    os.makedirs(
496        USER_SETTINGS_DIR,
497        exist_ok=True
498    )
499
500    with open(USER_PROGRESS_FILE, "w", encoding="utf-8") as file:
501        json.dump(
502            normalize_user_progress(progress),
503            file,
504            indent=4
505        )
def load_user_progress(): 
508def load_user_progress():
509
510    os.makedirs(
511        USER_SETTINGS_DIR,
512        exist_ok=True
513    )
514
515    if not os.path.exists(USER_PROGRESS_FILE):
516        progress = default_user_progress()
517        save_user_progress(progress)
518        return progress
519
520    try:
521        with open(USER_PROGRESS_FILE, "r", encoding="utf-8") as file:
522            data = json.load(file)
523
524    except Exception as e:
525        print(f"WARNING: Failed to load user progress: {e}")
526        data = {}
527
528    progress = normalize_user_progress(data)
529    save_user_progress(progress)
530    return progress
def unlock_achievement(state, achievement_id): 
533def unlock_achievement(state, achievement_id):
534
535    if achievement_id not in ACHIEVEMENTS:
536        return
537
538    achievements = state.user_progress.setdefault(
539        "achievements",
540        {}
541    )
542
543    if achievements.get(achievement_id, False):
544        return
545
546    achievements[achievement_id] = True
547    save_user_progress(state.user_progress)
548
549    name = ACHIEVEMENTS[achievement_id][0]
550
551    state.export_message = (
552        f"Achievement unlocked: {name}"
553    )
554
555    state.export_message_timer = time.time()
def complete_tutorial(state): 
558def complete_tutorial(state):
559
560    state.tutorial_active = False
561    state.tutorial_step_index = 0
562
563    if not state.user_progress.get("tutorial_completed", False):
564        state.user_progress["tutorial_completed"] = True
565        save_user_progress(state.user_progress)
566
567    unlock_achievement(state, "tutorial_complete")
def skip_tutorial(state): 
570def skip_tutorial(state):
571
572    state.tutorial_active = False
573    state.tutorial_step_index = 0
574    state.user_progress["tutorial_completed"] = True
575    save_user_progress(state.user_progress)
def advance_tutorial(state): 
578def advance_tutorial(state):
579
580    if state.tutorial_step_index >= len(TUTORIAL_STEPS) - 1:
581        complete_tutorial(state)
582        return
583
584    state.tutorial_step_index += 1
def get_tutorial_step(state): 
587def get_tutorial_step(state):
588
589    step_index = max(
590        0,
591        min(state.tutorial_step_index, len(TUTORIAL_STEPS) - 1)
592    )
593
594    return TUTORIAL_STEPS[step_index]
def get_tutorial_action(state): 
597def get_tutorial_action(state):
598
599    return get_tutorial_step(state).get(
600        "action",
601        ""
602    )
def is_tutorial_parameter_step_available(state): 
605def is_tutorial_parameter_step_available(state):
606
607    return (
608        state.current_fractal in (
609            FractalType.MANDELBROT,
610            FractalType.JULIA
611        )
612        and not is_parameter_edit_locked(state)
613    )
def get_tutorial_step_text(state): 
616def get_tutorial_step_text(state):
617
618    step = get_tutorial_step(state)
619    text = step.get("text", "")
620    required = step.get("required", "")
621
622    if step.get("action") == "parameters":
623
624        if state.current_fractal == FractalType.BURNING_SHIP:
625            text = (
626                "Burning Ship parameters are not editable in this explorer."
627            )
628            required = "Press Enter to continue."
629
630        elif is_parameter_edit_locked(state):
631            text = (
632                "Parameter editing is locked at this deep zoom level."
633            )
634            required = "Press Enter to continue."
635
636    return text, required
def handle_tutorial_action(state, action_id, audio_manager=None): 
639def handle_tutorial_action(state, action_id, audio_manager=None):
640
641    expected_action = get_tutorial_action(state)
642
643    if expected_action == "parameters":
644
645        if not is_tutorial_parameter_step_available(state):
646            expected_action = "parameter_continue"
647
648    if action_id != expected_action:
649        return False
650
651    if expected_action == "finish":
652        state.menu_open = False
653        state.submenu_open = None
654
655    advance_tutorial(state)
656
657    if audio_manager:
658        audio_manager.play_click()
659
660    return True
def check_deep_zoom_achievement(state): 
663def check_deep_zoom_achievement(state):
664
665    if is_parameter_edit_locked(state):
666        unlock_achievement(state, "deep_zoom")
class AudioManager: 
673class AudioManager:
674
675    """ Centralizes application audio playback.
676    The audio manager owns mixer initialization, asset loading,
677    background music playback, and short UI sound effects.
678    Missing files or unavailable audio devices are reported as
679    warnings so the renderer and UI can continue running.
680    """
681
682    MUSIC_PATH = os.path.join(
683        "assets",
684        "audio",
685        "music",
686        "background_music.ogg"
687    )
688
689    HOVER_PATH = os.path.join(
690        "assets",
691        "audio",
692        "ui",
693        "menu_hover.wav"
694    )
695
696    CLICK_PATH = os.path.join(
697        "assets",
698        "audio",
699        "ui",
700        "menu_click.wav"
701    )
702
703    def __init__(self):
704
705        self.enabled = False
706        self.hover_sound = None
707        self.click_sound = None
708
709        try:
710            if not pg.mixer.get_init():
711                pg.mixer.init()
712
713            self.enabled = True
714
715        except Exception as e:
716            print(f"WARNING: Audio disabled: {e}")
717            return
718
719        self.hover_sound = self.load_sound(
720            self.HOVER_PATH
721        )
722
723        self.click_sound = self.load_sound(
724            self.CLICK_PATH
725        )
726
727        if self.hover_sound:
728            self.hover_sound.set_volume(
729                CONFIG.ui_volume
730            )
731
732        if self.click_sound:
733            self.click_sound.set_volume(
734                CONFIG.ui_volume
735            )
736
737    def load_sound(self, path):
738
739        if not self.enabled:
740            return None
741
742        if not os.path.exists(path):
743            print(f"WARNING: Missing audio file: {path}")
744            return None
745
746        try:
747            return pg.mixer.Sound(path)
748
749        except Exception as e:
750            print(f"WARNING: Failed to load audio file {path}: {e}")
751            return None
752
753    def start_music(self):
754
755        if not self.enabled:
756            return
757
758        if not os.path.exists(self.MUSIC_PATH):
759            print(f"WARNING: Missing audio file: {self.MUSIC_PATH}")
760            return
761
762        try:
763            pg.mixer.music.load(
764                self.MUSIC_PATH
765            )
766
767            pg.mixer.music.set_volume(
768                CONFIG.music_volume
769            )
770
771            pg.mixer.music.play(-1)
772
773        except Exception as e:
774            print(f"WARNING: Failed to start background music: {e}")
775
776    def set_music_volume(self, volume):
777
778        CONFIG.music_volume = clamp_volume(volume)
779
780        if self.enabled:
781            pg.mixer.music.set_volume(
782                CONFIG.music_volume
783            )
784
785    def set_ui_volume(self, volume):
786
787        CONFIG.ui_volume = clamp_volume(volume)
788
789        if self.hover_sound:
790            self.hover_sound.set_volume(
791                CONFIG.ui_volume
792            )
793
794        if self.click_sound:
795            self.click_sound.set_volume(
796                CONFIG.ui_volume
797            )
798
799    def play_hover(self):
800
801        if self.hover_sound:
802            self.hover_sound.play()
803
804    def play_click(self):
805
806        if self.click_sound:
807            self.click_sound.play()

Centralizes application audio playback. The audio manager owns mixer initialization, asset loading, background music playback, and short UI sound effects. Missing files or unavailable audio devices are reported as warnings so the renderer and UI can continue running.

MUSIC_PATH = 'assets\\audio\\music\\background_music.ogg'
HOVER_PATH = 'assets\\audio\\ui\\menu_hover.wav'
CLICK_PATH = 'assets\\audio\\ui\\menu_click.wav'
enabled
hover_sound
click_sound
def load_sound(self, path): 
737    def load_sound(self, path):
738
739        if not self.enabled:
740            return None
741
742        if not os.path.exists(path):
743            print(f"WARNING: Missing audio file: {path}")
744            return None
745
746        try:
747            return pg.mixer.Sound(path)
748
749        except Exception as e:
750            print(f"WARNING: Failed to load audio file {path}: {e}")
751            return None
def start_music(self): 
753    def start_music(self):
754
755        if not self.enabled:
756            return
757
758        if not os.path.exists(self.MUSIC_PATH):
759            print(f"WARNING: Missing audio file: {self.MUSIC_PATH}")
760            return
761
762        try:
763            pg.mixer.music.load(
764                self.MUSIC_PATH
765            )
766
767            pg.mixer.music.set_volume(
768                CONFIG.music_volume
769            )
770
771            pg.mixer.music.play(-1)
772
773        except Exception as e:
774            print(f"WARNING: Failed to start background music: {e}")
def set_music_volume(self, volume): 
776    def set_music_volume(self, volume):
777
778        CONFIG.music_volume = clamp_volume(volume)
779
780        if self.enabled:
781            pg.mixer.music.set_volume(
782                CONFIG.music_volume
783            )
def set_ui_volume(self, volume): 
785    def set_ui_volume(self, volume):
786
787        CONFIG.ui_volume = clamp_volume(volume)
788
789        if self.hover_sound:
790            self.hover_sound.set_volume(
791                CONFIG.ui_volume
792            )
793
794        if self.click_sound:
795            self.click_sound.set_volume(
796                CONFIG.ui_volume
797            )
def play_hover(self): 
799    def play_hover(self):
800
801        if self.hover_sound:
802            self.hover_sound.play()
def play_click(self): 
804    def play_click(self):
805
806        if self.click_sound:
807            self.click_sound.play()
class FractalType(builtins.str, enum.Enum): 
815class FractalType(str, Enum):
816
817    """ Enumerates all supported fractal rendering modes.
818    The integer ordering used by the CUDA kernel is mapped
819    from these enum values inside the rendering pipeline.
820    """
821
822    MANDELBROT = "mandelbrot"
823    JULIA = "julia"
824    BURNING_SHIP = "burning_ship"

Enumerates all supported fractal rendering modes. The integer ordering used by the CUDA kernel is mapped from these enum values inside the rendering pipeline.

MANDELBROT = <FractalType.MANDELBROT: 'mandelbrot'>
JULIA = <FractalType.JULIA: 'julia'>
BURNING_SHIP = <FractalType.BURNING_SHIP: 'burning_ship'>
JULIA_PRESETS = [('Classic', -0.8, 0.156), ('Spiral', -0.4, 0.6), ('Dendrite', 0.285, 0.01), ('Lightning', -0.70176, -0.3842), ('Cloud', -0.835, -0.2321)]
MANDELBROT_PRESETS = [('Classic', 0.0, 0.0), ('Real Offset', -0.25, 0.0), ('Imaginary Offset', 0.0, 0.25), ('Diagonal Offset', -0.15, 0.15), ('Experimental', 0.3, -0.2)]
POWER_VALUES = [2, 3, 4, 5, 6]
USER_PRESET_DIR = 'presets'
USER_PRESET_FILE = 'presets\\user_presets.json'
