def empty_user_presets(): 
869def empty_user_presets():
870
871    return {
872        "julia": [],
873        "mandelbrot": [],
874    }
def load_user_presets(): 
877def load_user_presets():
878
879    os.makedirs(
880        USER_PRESET_DIR,
881        exist_ok=True
882    )
883
884    if not os.path.exists(USER_PRESET_FILE):
885        presets = empty_user_presets()
886        save_user_presets(presets)
887        return presets
888
889    try:
890        with open(USER_PRESET_FILE, "r", encoding="utf-8") as file:
891            data = json.load(file)
892
893    except Exception as e:
894        print(f"WARNING: Failed to load user presets: {e}")
895        return empty_user_presets()
896
897    presets = empty_user_presets()
898
899    if not isinstance(data, dict):
900        return presets
901
902    for preset in data.get("julia", []):
903
904        if not isinstance(preset, dict):
905            continue
906
907        try:
908            name = str(preset["name"]).strip()
909            cx = float(preset["julia_cx"])
910            cy = float(preset["julia_cy"])
911        except Exception:
912            continue
913
914        if not name:
915            continue
916
917        normalized = {
918            "name": name,
919            "julia_cx": cx,
920            "julia_cy": cy,
921        }
922
923        if preset.get("fractal_power") in POWER_VALUES:
924            normalized["fractal_power"] = int(preset["fractal_power"])
925
926        presets["julia"].append(normalized)
927
928    for preset in data.get("mandelbrot", []):
929
930        if not isinstance(preset, dict):
931            continue
932
933        try:
934            name = str(preset["name"]).strip()
935            zx = float(preset["mandelbrot_zx"])
936            zy = float(preset["mandelbrot_zy"])
937        except Exception:
938            continue
939
940        if not name:
941            continue
942
943        normalized = {
944            "name": name,
945            "mandelbrot_zx": zx,
946            "mandelbrot_zy": zy,
947        }
948
949        if preset.get("fractal_power") in POWER_VALUES:
950            normalized["fractal_power"] = int(preset["fractal_power"])
951
952        presets["mandelbrot"].append(normalized)
953
954    return presets
def save_user_presets(custom_presets): 
957def save_user_presets(custom_presets):
958
959    os.makedirs(
960        USER_PRESET_DIR,
961        exist_ok=True
962    )
963
964    with open(USER_PRESET_FILE, "w", encoding="utf-8") as file:
965        json.dump(
966            custom_presets,
967            file,
968            indent=4
969        )
def get_combined_julia_presets(state): 
972def get_combined_julia_presets(state):
973
974    presets = []
975
976    for name, cx, cy in JULIA_PRESETS:
977        presets.append({
978            "name": name,
979            "julia_cx": cx,
980            "julia_cy": cy,
981            "custom": False,
982        })
983
984    for preset in state.custom_presets.get("julia", []):
985        combined = preset.copy()
986        combined["custom"] = True
987        presets.append(combined)
988
989    return presets
def get_combined_mandelbrot_presets(state): 
 992def get_combined_mandelbrot_presets(state):
 993
 994    presets = []
 995
 996    for name, zx, zy in MANDELBROT_PRESETS:
 997        presets.append({
 998            "name": name,
 999            "mandelbrot_zx": zx,
1000            "mandelbrot_zy": zy,
1001            "custom": False,
1002        })
1003
1004    for preset in state.custom_presets.get("mandelbrot", []):
1005        combined = preset.copy()
1006        combined["custom"] = True
1007        presets.append(combined)
1008
1009    return presets
def apply_julia_preset(state, preset, index): 
1012def apply_julia_preset(state, preset, index):
1013
1014    state.julia_preset_index = index
1015    state.julia_preset_name = preset["name"]
1016
1017    state.julia_cx = preset["julia_cx"]
1018    state.julia_cy = preset["julia_cy"]
1019
1020    if preset.get("fractal_power") in POWER_VALUES:
1021        state.fractal_power = preset["fractal_power"]
1022
1023    state.current_fractal = FractalType.JULIA
1024    state.needs_update = True
def apply_mandelbrot_preset(state, preset, index): 
1027def apply_mandelbrot_preset(state, preset, index):
1028
1029    state.mandelbrot_preset_index = index
1030    state.mandelbrot_preset_name = preset["name"]
1031
1032    state.mandelbrot_zx = preset["mandelbrot_zx"]
1033    state.mandelbrot_zy = preset["mandelbrot_zy"]
1034
1035    if preset.get("fractal_power") in POWER_VALUES:
1036        state.fractal_power = preset["fractal_power"]
1037
1038    state.current_fractal = FractalType.MANDELBROT
1039    state.needs_update = True
def begin_preset_name_input(state, target): 
1042def begin_preset_name_input(state, target):
1043
1044    state.preset_name_input_active = True
1045    state.preset_name_input = ""
1046    state.preset_name_target = target
def cancel_preset_name_input(state): 
1049def cancel_preset_name_input(state):
1050
1051    state.preset_name_input_active = False
1052    state.preset_name_input = ""
1053    state.preset_name_target = None
def save_current_custom_preset(state): 
1056def save_current_custom_preset(state):
1057
1058    name = state.preset_name_input.strip()
1059
1060    if not name:
1061        cancel_preset_name_input(state)
1062        return
1063
1064    if state.preset_name_target == "julia":
1065        state.custom_presets["julia"].append({
1066            "name": name,
1067            "julia_cx": state.julia_cx,
1068            "julia_cy": state.julia_cy,
1069            "fractal_power": state.fractal_power,
1070        })
1071
1072        state.julia_preset_index = len(
1073            get_combined_julia_presets(state)
1074        ) - 1
1075
1076        state.julia_preset_name = name
1077
1078    elif state.preset_name_target == "mandelbrot":
1079        state.custom_presets["mandelbrot"].append({
1080            "name": name,
1081            "mandelbrot_zx": state.mandelbrot_zx,
1082            "mandelbrot_zy": state.mandelbrot_zy,
1083            "fractal_power": state.fractal_power,
1084        })
1085
1086        state.mandelbrot_preset_index = len(
1087            get_combined_mandelbrot_presets(state)
1088        ) - 1
1089
1090        state.mandelbrot_preset_name = name
1091
1092    save_user_presets(state.custom_presets)
1093    cancel_preset_name_input(state)
def delete_custom_preset(state, target, combined_index): 
1096def delete_custom_preset(state, target, combined_index):
1097
1098    builtin_count = (
1099        len(JULIA_PRESETS)
1100        if target == "julia"
1101        else len(MANDELBROT_PRESETS)
1102    )
1103
1104    custom_index = combined_index - builtin_count
1105
1106    if custom_index < 0:
1107        return
1108
1109    if custom_index >= len(state.custom_presets[target]):
1110        return
1111
1112    del state.custom_presets[target][custom_index]
1113
1114    if target == "julia":
1115        state.julia_preset_index = 0
1116        state.julia_preset_name = JULIA_PRESETS[0][0]
1117
1118    else:
1119        state.mandelbrot_preset_index = 0
1120        state.mandelbrot_preset_name = MANDELBROT_PRESETS[0][0]
1121
1122    save_user_presets(state.custom_presets)
BASE_MENU_OPTIONS = ['Continue', 'Fractal Settings', 'Visual Settings', 'Export Settings', 'Audio Settings', 'Controls', 'Tutorial', 'Achievements', 'Exit']
def get_fractal_settings_options(state): 
1142def get_fractal_settings_options(state):
1143
1144    options = [
1145        "Fractal Type",
1146        "Iterations",
1147    ]
1148
1149    if state.current_fractal in (
1150        FractalType.MANDELBROT,
1151        FractalType.JULIA
1152    ):
1153        options.append("Power")
1154
1155    if state.current_fractal == FractalType.MANDELBROT:
1156        options.append("Mandelbrot Presets")
1157
1158    if state.current_fractal == FractalType.JULIA:
1159        options.append("Julia Presets")
1160
1161    return options
def get_visual_settings_options(state): 
1164def get_visual_settings_options(state):
1165

1167        "Palette",
1168        "Game Resolution",
1169        "Show Performance Info",
1170        "Benchmark GPU vs CPU",
1171    ]
def get_export_settings_options(state):

1177        "PNG Resolution",
1178        "GIF Resolution",
1179        "Export PNG",
1180        "Export GIF",
1181    ]
def get_audio_settings_options(state): 
1184def get_audio_settings_options(state):
1185
1186    return []
def get_category_options(state, category): 
1189def get_category_options(state, category):
1190
1191    if category == "Fractal Settings":
1192        return get_fractal_settings_options(state)
1193
1194    if category == "Visual Settings":
1195        return get_visual_settings_options(state)
1196
1197    if category == "Export Settings":
1198        return get_export_settings_options(state)
1199
1200    if category == "Audio Settings":
1201        return get_audio_settings_options(state)
1202
1203    return []
def get_menu_options(state): 
1206def get_menu_options(state):
1207    """ Builds the active main menu option list.
1208    Conditional fractal options live inside the Fractal Settings
1209    submenu so the top-level settings menu stays short.

1211
1212    return BASE_MENU_OPTIONS.copy()

Builds the active main menu option list. Conditional fractal options live inside the Fractal Settings submenu so the top-level settings menu stays short.

@dataclass
class AppState: 
1219@dataclass
1220class AppState:
1221    """ Stores all mutable runtime application state.
1222    The application uses a centralized state container so
1223    that the renderer, UI system, menu system, camera,
1224    export system, and input handler can operate on a
1225    shared synchronized runtime model.
1226    """ 
1227
1228
1229    # --------------------------------------------------------
1230    # Rendering State
1231    # --------------------------------------------------------
1232    xmin: float
1233    xmax: float
1234    ymin: float
1235    ymax: float
1236
1237    max_iter: int
1238
1239    current_palette: int
1240
1241    current_fractal: FractalType
1242
1243    fractal_power: int = 2
1244
1245    running: bool = True
1246
1247    # Indicates whether the fractal surface must be re-rendered.
1248    needs_update: bool = True
1249
1250    show_ui: bool = True
1251
1252    menu_open: bool = False
1253    submenu_open: str | None = None
1254    menu_index: int = 0
1255    hovered_menu_item: str | None = None
1256
1257    user_progress: dict = field(
1258        default_factory=default_user_progress
1259    )
1260
1261    tutorial_active: bool = False
1262    tutorial_step_index: int = 0
1263
1264    custom_presets: dict = field(
1265        default_factory=empty_user_presets
1266    )
1267
1268    preset_name_input_active: bool = False
1269    preset_name_input: str = ""
1270    preset_name_target: str | None = None
1271
1272    surface: pg.Surface | None = None
1273
1274    # --------------------------------------------------------
1275    # Export State
1276    # --------------------------------------------------------
1277    exporting: bool = False
1278    export_message: str = ""
1279    export_message_timer: float = 0.0
1280
1281    benchmark_results_open: bool = False
1282    benchmark_result_lines: list[str] = field(
1283        default_factory=list
1284    )
1285
1286    # --------------------------------------------------------
1287    # Render Performance Statistics
1288    # --------------------------------------------------------
1289    last_render_time_ms: float = 0.0
1290    last_render_fps: float = 0.0
1291
1292    # --------------------------------------------------------
1293    # Mandelbrot Fractal Configuration
1294    # --------------------------------------------------------
1295    mandelbrot_zx: float = 0.0
1296    mandelbrot_zy: float = 0.0
1297
1298    mandelbrot_preset_index: int = 0
1299    mandelbrot_preset_name: str = "Classic"
1300
1301    # --------------------------------------------------------
1302    # Julia Fractal Configuration
1303    # --------------------------------------------------------
1304    julia_cx: float = -0.8
1305    julia_cy: float = 0.156
1306
1307    julia_preset_index: int = 0
1308    julia_preset_name: str = "Classic"

Stores all mutable runtime application state. The application uses a centralized state container so that the renderer, UI system, menu system, camera, export system, and input handler can operate on a shared synchronized runtime model.

AppState( xmin: float, xmax: float, ymin: float, ymax: float, max_iter: int, current_palette: int, current_fractal: FractalType, fractal_power: int = 2, running: bool = True, needs_update: bool = True, show_ui: bool = True, menu_open: bool = False, submenu_open: str | None = None, menu_index: int = 0, hovered_menu_item: str | None = None, user_progress: dict = <factory>, tutorial_active: bool = False, tutorial_step_index: int = 0, custom_presets: dict = <factory>, preset_name_input_active: bool = False, preset_name_input: str = '', preset_name_target: str | None = None, surface: pygame.surface.Surface | None = None, exporting: bool = False, export_message: str = '', export_message_timer: float = 0.0, benchmark_results_open: bool = False, benchmark_result_lines: list[str] = <factory>, last_render_time_ms: float = 0.0, last_render_fps: float = 0.0, mandelbrot_zx: float = 0.0, mandelbrot_zy: float = 0.0, mandelbrot_preset_index: int = 0, mandelbrot_preset_name: str = 'Classic', julia_cx: float = -0.8, julia_cy: float = 0.156, julia_preset_index: int = 0, julia_preset_name: str = 'Classic')
xmin: float
xmax: float
ymin: float
ymax: float
max_iter: int
current_palette: int
current_fractal: FractalType
fractal_power: int = 2
running: bool = True
needs_update: bool = True
show_ui: bool = True
menu_open: bool = False
submenu_open: str | None = None
menu_index: int = 0
hovered_menu_item: str | None = None
user_progress: dict
tutorial_active: bool = False
tutorial_step_index: int = 0
custom_presets: dict
preset_name_input_active: bool = False
preset_name_input: str = ''
preset_name_target: str | None = None
surface: pygame.surface.Surface | None = None
exporting: bool = False
export_message: str = ''
export_message_timer: float = 0.0
benchmark_results_open: bool = False
benchmark_result_lines: list[str]
last_render_time_ms: float = 0.0
last_render_fps: float = 0.0
mandelbrot_zx: float = 0.0
mandelbrot_zy: float = 0.0
mandelbrot_preset_index: int = 0
mandelbrot_preset_name: str = 'Classic'
julia_cx: float = -0.8
julia_cy: float = 0.156
julia_preset_index: int = 0
julia_preset_name: str = 'Classic'
def create_initial_state(): 
1317def create_initial_state():
1318
1319
1320    """ Creates the default runtime application state.
1321    The initial viewport is configured to frame the
1322    Mandelbrot Set while preserving the display aspect ratio.
1323    
1324    Returns:
1325        Initialized AppState instance.
1326    """
1327
1328    xmin, xmax = -3.0, 1.5
1329
1330    x_range = xmax - xmin
1331
1332    # Preserve aspect ratio when constructing the viewport.
1333    y_range = x_range * (
1334        CONFIG.height / CONFIG.width
1335    )
1336
1337    ymin = -y_range / 2
1338    ymax = y_range / 2
1339
1340    return AppState(
1341        xmin=xmin,
1342        xmax=xmax,
1343        ymin=ymin,
1344        ymax=ymax,
1345        max_iter=100,
1346        current_palette=0,
1347        current_fractal=FractalType.MANDELBROT,
1348    )

Creates the default runtime application state. The initial viewport is configured to frame the Mandelbrot Set while preserving the display aspect ratio.

Returns: Initialized AppState instance.

def is_parameter_edit_locked(state): 
1351def is_parameter_edit_locked(state):
1352
1353    return abs(state.xmax - state.xmin) < PARAMETER_EDIT_LOCK_WIDTH
def show_parameter_lock_message(state): 
1356def show_parameter_lock_message(state):
1357
1358    state.export_message = (
1359        "Parameter changes locked at deep zoom"
1360    )
1361
1362    state.export_message_timer = time.time()
fractal_kernel = <cupy._core.raw.RawKernel object>
def smooth_gradient(stops, t): 
1763def smooth_gradient(stops, t):
1764
1765    t = cp.clip(t, 0.0, 1.0)
1766
1767    result_r = cp.zeros_like(t)
1768    result_g = cp.zeros_like(t)
1769    result_b = cp.zeros_like(t)
1770
1771    for i in range(len(stops) - 1):
1772
1773        p0, c0 = stops[i]
1774        p1, c1 = stops[i + 1]
1775
1776        mask = (t >= p0) & (t <= p1)
1777
1778        local_t = (t - p0) / max(p1 - p0, 1e-8)
1779
1780        local_t = local_t * local_t * (
1781            3.0 - 2.0 * local_t
1782        )
1783
1784        result_r = cp.where(
1785            mask,
1786            c0[0] + (c1[0] - c0[0]) * local_t,
1787            result_r
1788        )
1789
1790        result_g = cp.where(
1791            mask,
1792            c0[1] + (c1[1] - c0[1]) * local_t,
1793            result_g
1794        )
1795
1796        result_b = cp.where(
1797            mask,
1798            c0[2] + (c1[2] - c0[2]) * local_t,
1799            result_b
1800        )
1801
1802    return result_r, result_g, result_b
def gradient_palette(name, stops): 
1805def gradient_palette(name, stops):
1806
1807    return {
1808        "name": name,
1809        "func": lambda t: smooth_gradient(stops, t)
1810    }
PALETTES = [{'name': 'Classic Fire', 'func': <function gradient_palette.<locals>.<lambda>>}, {'name': 'Ocean', 'func': <function gradient_palette.<locals>.<lambda>>}, {'name': 'Inferno', 'func': <function gradient_palette.<locals>.<lambda>>}, {'name': 'Rainbow', 'func': <function gradient_palette.<locals>.<lambda>>}, {'name': 'Neon', 'func': <function gradient_palette.<locals>.<lambda>>}, {'name': 'Icy', 'func': <function gradient_palette.<locals>.<lambda>>}, {'name': 'Sunset', 'func': <function gradient_palette.<locals>.<lambda>>}, {'name': 'B&W High Contrast', 'func': <function gradient_palette.<locals>.<lambda>>}]
def colorize_gpu(iter_arr, max_iter, palette_index, width, height): 
1905def colorize_gpu(iter_arr, max_iter, palette_index, width, height):
1906
1907    t = iter_arr.astype(cp.float32) / max_iter
1908
1909    palette = PALETTES[palette_index]["func"]
1910
1911    r, g, b = palette(t)
1912
1913    inside = iter_arr >= max_iter
1914
1915    r = cp.where(inside, 0, r)
1916    g = cp.where(inside, 0, g)
1917    b = cp.where(inside, 0, b)
1918
1919    r = cp.clip(r, 0, 255).astype(cp.uint8)
1920    g = cp.clip(g, 0, 255).astype(cp.uint8)
1921    b = cp.clip(b, 0, 255).astype(cp.uint8)
1922
1923    rgb_flat = cp.stack([r, g, b], axis=1)
1924
1925    return rgb_flat.reshape(height, width, 3)
def render_fractal_iterations_gpu(state, width, height): 
1932def render_fractal_iterations_gpu(
1933    state,
1934    width,
1935    height
1936):
1937
1938    gpu_buffer = cp.zeros(
1939        width * height,
1940        dtype=cp.int32
1941    )
1942
1943    block = (16, 16)
1944
1945    grid = (
1946        (width + block[0] - 1) // block[0],
1947        (height + block[1] - 1) // block[1],
1948    )
1949
1950    fractal_type = 0
1951
1952    if state.current_fractal == FractalType.JULIA:
1953        fractal_type = 1
1954
1955    elif state.current_fractal == FractalType.BURNING_SHIP:
1956        fractal_type = 2
1957
1958    fractal_kernel(
1959        grid,
1960        block,
1961        (
1962            np.int32(fractal_type),
1963
1964            np.float64(state.xmin),
1965            np.float64(state.xmax),
1966            np.float64(state.ymin),
1967            np.float64(state.ymax),
1968
1969            np.int32(width),
1970            np.int32(height),
1971
1972            np.int32(state.max_iter),
1973
1974            np.float64(state.julia_cx),
1975            np.float64(state.julia_cy),
1976
1977            np.float64(state.mandelbrot_zx),
1978            np.float64(state.mandelbrot_zy),
1979
1980            np.int32(state.fractal_power),
1981
1982            gpu_buffer,
1983        )
1984    )
1985
1986    return gpu_buffer
def render_fractal_gpu(state, width, height): 
1989def render_fractal_gpu(
1990    state,
1991    width,
1992    height
1993):
1994
1995    gpu_buffer = render_fractal_iterations_gpu(
1996        state,
1997        width,
1998        height
1999    )
2000
2001    rgb_hw3 = colorize_gpu(
2002        gpu_buffer,
2003        state.max_iter,
2004        state.current_palette,
2005        width,
2006        height
2007    )
2008
2009    return rgb_hw3
def render_fractal_iterations_cpu(state, width, height): 
2012def render_fractal_iterations_cpu(
2013    state,
2014    width,
2015    height
2016):
2017
2018    x = np.arange(
2019        width,
2020        dtype=np.float64
2021    )
2022
2023    y = np.arange(
2024        height,
2025        dtype=np.float64
2026    )
2027
2028    cr = state.xmin + (
2029        x *
2030        ((state.xmax - state.xmin) / width)
2031    )
2032
2033    ci = state.ymax - (
2034        y *
2035        ((state.ymax - state.ymin) / height)
2036    )
2037
2038    cr, ci = np.meshgrid(
2039        cr,
2040        ci
2041    )
2042
2043    if state.current_fractal == FractalType.MANDELBROT:
2044
2045        zr = np.full(
2046            (height, width),
2047            state.mandelbrot_zx,
2048            dtype=np.float64
2049        )
2050
2051        zi = np.full(
2052            (height, width),
2053            state.mandelbrot_zy,
2054            dtype=np.float64
2055        )
2056
2057        c_r = cr
2058        c_i = ci
2059
2060    elif state.current_fractal == FractalType.JULIA:
2061
2062        zr = cr.copy()
2063        zi = ci.copy()
2064
2065        c_r = np.full(
2066            (height, width),
2067            state.julia_cx,
2068            dtype=np.float64
2069        )
2070
2071        c_i = np.full(
2072            (height, width),
2073            state.julia_cy,
2074            dtype=np.float64
2075        )
2076
2077    else:
2078
2079        zr = np.zeros(
2080            (height, width),
2081            dtype=np.float64
2082        )
2083
2084        zi = np.zeros(
2085            (height, width),
2086            dtype=np.float64
2087        )
2088
2089        c_r = cr
2090        c_i = ci
2091
2092    iter_out = np.full(
2093        (height, width),
2094        state.max_iter,
2095        dtype=np.int32
2096    )
2097
2098    active = np.ones(
2099        (height, width),
2100        dtype=bool
2101    )
2102
2103    with np.errstate(
2104        over="ignore",
2105        invalid="ignore"
2106    ):
2107
2108        for i in range(state.max_iter):
2109
2110            if state.current_fractal == FractalType.BURNING_SHIP:
2111                zr = np.abs(zr)
2112                zi = np.abs(zi)
2113
2114            mag2 = zr * zr + zi * zi
2115
2116            escaped = active & (mag2 > 4.0)
2117
2118            iter_out[escaped] = i
2119            active &= ~escaped
2120
2121            if not active.any():
2122                break
2123
2124            if state.current_fractal != FractalType.BURNING_SHIP:
2125
2126                if state.fractal_power == 2:
2127                    zr_active = zr[active]
2128                    zi_active = zi[active]
2129
2130                    power_r = (
2131                        zr_active *
2132                        zr_active -
2133                        zi_active *
2134                        zi_active
2135                    )
2136
2137                    power_i = (
2138                        2.0 *
2139                        zr_active *
2140                        zi_active
2141                    )
2142
2143                else:
2144                    z = (
2145                        zr[active] +
2146                        1j *
2147                        zi[active]
2148                    ) ** state.fractal_power
2149
2150                    power_r = z.real
2151                    power_i = z.imag
2152
2153            else:
2154                zr_active = zr[active]
2155                zi_active = zi[active]
2156
2157                power_r = (
2158                    zr_active *
2159                    zr_active -
2160                    zi_active *
2161                    zi_active
2162                )
2163
2164                power_i = (
2165                    2.0 *
2166                    zr_active *
2167                    zi_active
2168                )
2169
2170            zr[active] = (
2171                power_r +
2172                c_r[active]
2173            )
2174
2175            zi[active] = (
2176                power_i +
2177                c_i[active]
2178            )
2179
2180    return iter_out
def run_gpu_cpu_benchmark(state): 
2183def run_gpu_cpu_benchmark(state):
2184
2185    try:
2186
2187        state.exporting = True
2188
2189        state.export_message = (
2190            "Running benchmark..."
2191        )
2192
2193        state.export_message_timer = time.time()
2194
2195        render_fractal_iterations_gpu(
2196            state,
2197            BENCHMARK_WIDTH,
2198            BENCHMARK_HEIGHT
2199        )
2200
2201        cp.cuda.Stream.null.synchronize()
2202
2203        gpu_times = []
2204
2205        for _ in range(BENCHMARK_RUNS):
2206
2207            start = time.perf_counter()
2208
2209            render_fractal_iterations_gpu(
2210                state,
2211                BENCHMARK_WIDTH,
2212                BENCHMARK_HEIGHT
2213            )
2214
2215            cp.cuda.Stream.null.synchronize()
2216
2217            gpu_times.append(
2218                (time.perf_counter() - start) * 1000.0
2219            )
2220
2221        cpu_times = []
2222
2223        for _ in range(BENCHMARK_RUNS):
2224
2225            start = time.perf_counter()
2226
2227            render_fractal_iterations_cpu(
2228                state,
2229                BENCHMARK_WIDTH,
2230                BENCHMARK_HEIGHT
2231            )
2232
2233            cpu_times.append(
2234                (time.perf_counter() - start) * 1000.0
2235            )
2236
2237        gpu_avg = sum(gpu_times) / len(gpu_times)
2238        cpu_avg = sum(cpu_times) / len(cpu_times)
2239
2240        if gpu_avg > 0.0:
2241            speedup = cpu_avg / gpu_avg
2242        else:
2243            speedup = 0.0
2244
2245        state.benchmark_result_lines = [
2246            "GPU vs CPU Benchmark",
2247            "",
2248            f"Resolution: {BENCHMARK_WIDTH}x{BENCHMARK_HEIGHT}",
2249            f"Runs: {BENCHMARK_RUNS}",
2250            f"Fractal: {state.current_fractal.value}",
2251            f"Iterations: {state.max_iter}",
2252            f"GPU average: {gpu_avg:.1f} ms",
2253            f"CPU average: {cpu_avg:.1f} ms",
2254            f"GPU speedup: {speedup:.1f}x",
2255            "",
2256            "Press ESC to close",
2257        ]
2258
2259        state.benchmark_results_open = True
2260
2261        state.export_message = (
2262            "Benchmark complete"
2263        )
2264
2265        state.export_message_timer = time.time()
2266
2267        unlock_achievement(state, "benchmark_runner")
2268
2269    except Exception as e:
2270
2271        state.benchmark_result_lines = [
2272            "GPU vs CPU Benchmark",
2273            "",
2274            f"BENCHMARK ERROR: {e}",
2275            "",
2276            "Press ESC to close",
2277        ]
2278
2279        state.benchmark_results_open = True
2280
2281        state.export_message = (
2282            f"BENCHMARK ERROR: {e}"
2283        )
2284
2285        state.export_message_timer = time.time()
2286
2287    finally:
2288
2289        state.exporting = False
def compute_surface(state, width, height): 
2292def compute_surface(state, width, height):
2293
2294    rgb_hw3 = render_fractal_gpu(
2295        state,
2296        width,
2297        height
2298    )
2299
2300    rgb_wh3 = cp.transpose(
2301        rgb_hw3,
2302        (1, 0, 2)
2303    )
2304
2305    return pg.surfarray.make_surface(
2306        cp.asnumpy(rgb_wh3)
2307    )
def ensure_export_folders(): 
2314def ensure_export_folders():
2315
2316    os.makedirs(
2317        PNG_EXPORT_DIR,
2318        exist_ok=True
2319    )
2320
2321    os.makedirs(
2322        GIF_EXPORT_DIR,
2323        exist_ok=True
2324    )
def export_fractal_png(state): 
2327def export_fractal_png(state):
2328
2329    try:
2330
2331        state.exporting = True
2332
2333        state.export_message = (
2334            "Rendering export..."
2335        )
2336
2337        rgb_hw3 = render_fractal_gpu(
2338            state,
2339            CONFIG.png_export_width,
2340            CONFIG.png_export_height
2341        )
2342
2343        rgb_wh3 = cp.transpose(
2344            rgb_hw3,
2345            (1, 0, 2)
2346        )
2347
2348        surface = pg.surfarray.make_surface(
2349            cp.asnumpy(rgb_wh3)
2350        )
2351
2352        timestamp = datetime.now().strftime(
2353            "%Y%m%d_%H%M%S"
2354        )
2355
2356        ensure_export_folders()
2357
2358        filename = (
2359            f"fractal_{timestamp}.png"
2360        )
2361
2362        filepath = os.path.join(
2363            PNG_EXPORT_DIR,
2364            filename
2365        )
2366
2367        pg.image.save(surface, filepath)
2368
2369        state.exporting = False
2370
2371        state.export_message = (
2372            f"Exported: {filepath}"
2373        )
2374
2375        state.export_message_timer = time.time()
2376
2377        unlock_achievement(state, "first_export")
2378
2379    except Exception as e:
2380
2381        state.exporting = False
2382
2383        state.export_message = (
2384            f"EXPORT ERROR: {e}"
2385        )
2386
2387        state.export_message_timer = time.time()
def get_gif_export_size(): 
2391def get_gif_export_size():
2392
2393    width = min(
2394        CONFIG.gif_export_width,
2395        GIF_MAX_WIDTH
2396    )
2397
2398    height = min(
2399        CONFIG.gif_export_height,
2400        GIF_MAX_HEIGHT
2401    )
2402
2403    width = max(256, int(width))
2404    height = max(256, int(height))
2405
2406    return width, height
def export_zoom_gif(state): 
2409def export_zoom_gif(state):
2410
2411    if imageio is None:
2412
2413        state.export_message = (
2414            "GIF export requires imageio"
2415        )
2416
2417        state.export_message_timer = time.time()
2418        return
2419
2420    saved_viewport = (
2421        state.xmin,
2422        state.xmax,
2423        state.ymin,
2424        state.ymax,
2425    )
2426
2427    try:
2428
2429        state.exporting = True
2430
2431        state.export_message = (
2432            "Rendering GIF..."
2433        )
2434
2435        state.export_message_timer = time.time()
2436
2437        gif_width, gif_height = get_gif_export_size()
2438
2439        target_center_x = (
2440            state.xmin +
2441            state.xmax
2442        ) * 0.5
2443
2444        target_center_y = (
2445            state.ymin +
2446            state.ymax
2447        ) * 0.5
2448
2449        target_range_x = (
2450            state.xmax -
2451            state.xmin
2452        )
2453
2454        target_range_y = (
2455            state.ymax -
2456            state.ymin
2457        )
2458
2459        default_state = create_initial_state()
2460
2461        start_range_x = (
2462            default_state.xmax -
2463            default_state.xmin
2464        )
2465
2466        start_range_y = (
2467            default_state.ymax -
2468            default_state.ymin
2469        )
2470
2471        timestamp = datetime.now().strftime(
2472            "%Y%m%d_%H%M%S"
2473        )
2474
2475        ensure_export_folders()
2476
2477        filename = (
2478            f"fractal_zoom_{timestamp}.gif"
2479        )
2480
2481        filepath = os.path.join(
2482            GIF_EXPORT_DIR,
2483            filename
2484        )
2485
2486        with imageio.get_writer(
2487            filepath,
2488            mode="I",
2489            duration=GIF_DURATION_MS / 1000.0
2490        ) as writer:
2491
2492            for frame_index in range(GIF_FRAME_COUNT):
2493
2494                if GIF_FRAME_COUNT <= 1:
2495                    t = 1.0
2496                else:
2497                    t = frame_index / (
2498                        GIF_FRAME_COUNT - 1
2499                    )
2500
2501                current_range_x = (
2502                    start_range_x *
2503                    (
2504                        target_range_x /
2505                        start_range_x
2506                    ) ** t
2507                )
2508
2509                current_range_y = (
2510                    start_range_y *
2511                    (
2512                        target_range_y /
2513                        start_range_y
2514                    ) ** t
2515                )
2516
2517                state.xmin = target_center_x - current_range_x * 0.5
2518                state.xmax = target_center_x + current_range_x * 0.5
2519                state.ymin = target_center_y - current_range_y * 0.5
2520                state.ymax = target_center_y + current_range_y * 0.5
2521
2522                rgb_hw3 = render_fractal_gpu(
2523                    state,
2524                    gif_width,
2525                    gif_height
2526                )
2527
2528                writer.append_data(
2529                    cp.asnumpy(rgb_hw3)
2530                )
2531
2532        state.export_message = (
2533            f"Exported GIF: {filepath}"
2534        )
2535
2536        state.export_message_timer = time.time()
2537
2538        unlock_achievement(state, "first_export")
2539
2540    except Exception as e:
2541
2542        state.export_message = (
2543            f"GIF EXPORT ERROR: {e}"
2544        )
2545
2546        state.export_message_timer = time.time()
2547
2548    finally:
2549
2550        (
2551            state.xmin,
2552            state.xmax,
2553            state.ymin,
2554            state.ymax,
2555        ) = saved_viewport
2556
2557        state.exporting = False
2558        state.needs_update = True
class Camera: 
2565class Camera:
2566
2567    @staticmethod
2568    def get_move_speed(state):
2569
2570        return (
2571            CONFIG.base_move_speed *
2572            (state.xmax - state.xmin)
2573        )
2574
2575    @staticmethod
2576    def move(state, dx, dy):
2577
2578        speed = Camera.get_move_speed(state)
2579
2580        state.xmin += dx * speed
2581        state.xmax += dx * speed
2582
2583        state.ymin += dy * speed
2584        state.ymax += dy * speed
2585
2586        state.needs_update = True
2587        check_deep_zoom_achievement(state)
2588
2589    @staticmethod
2590    def center_on_pixel(state, mx, my):
2591
2592        cx = (
2593            state.xmin +
2594            (mx / CONFIG.width) *
2595            (state.xmax - state.xmin)
2596        )
2597
2598        cy = (
2599            state.ymax -
2600            (my / CONFIG.height) *
2601            (state.ymax - state.ymin)
2602        )
2603
2604        xr = state.xmax - state.xmin
2605        yr = state.ymax - state.ymin
2606
2607        state.xmin = cx - xr / 2
2608        state.xmax = cx + xr / 2
2609
2610        state.ymin = cy - yr / 2
2611        state.ymax = cy + yr / 2
2612
2613        state.needs_update = True
2614        check_deep_zoom_achievement(state)
2615
2616    @staticmethod
2617    def zoom(state, direction):
2618
2619        cx = (
2620            state.xmin +
2621            state.xmax
2622        ) * 0.5
2623
2624        cy = (
2625            state.ymin +
2626            state.ymax
2627        ) * 0.5
2628
2629        xr = (
2630            state.xmax -
2631            state.xmin
2632        )
2633
2634        yr = (
2635            state.ymax -
2636            state.ymin
2637        )
2638
2639        zoom = 0.8 if direction > 0 else 1.25
2640
2641        xr *= zoom
2642        yr *= zoom
2643
2644        # ============================================================
2645        # FLOATING POINT PRECISION LIMIT
2646        #
2647        # Prevents xmin/xmax and ymin/ymax from collapsing into the
2648        # same value due to IEEE double precision limits.
2649        # ============================================================
2650
2651        EPS = 1e-15
2652
2653        if abs(xr) < EPS * max(1.0, abs(cx)):
2654            return
2655
2656        if abs(yr) < EPS * max(1.0, abs(cy)):
2657            return
2658
2659        state.xmin = cx - xr * 0.5
2660        state.xmax = cx + xr * 0.5
2661
2662        state.ymin = cy - yr * 0.5
2663        state.ymax = cy + yr * 0.5
2664
2665        state.needs_update = True
2666        check_deep_zoom_achievement(state)
@staticmethod
def get_move_speed(state): 
2567    @staticmethod
2568    def get_move_speed(state):
2569
2570        return (
2571            CONFIG.base_move_speed *
2572            (state.xmax - state.xmin)
2573        )
@staticmethod
def move(state, dx, dy): 
2575    @staticmethod
2576    def move(state, dx, dy):
2577
2578        speed = Camera.get_move_speed(state)
2579
2580        state.xmin += dx * speed
2581        state.xmax += dx * speed
2582
2583        state.ymin += dy * speed
2584        state.ymax += dy * speed
2585
2586        state.needs_update = True
2587        check_deep_zoom_achievement(state)
@staticmethod
def center_on_pixel(state, mx, my): 
2589    @staticmethod
2590    def center_on_pixel(state, mx, my):
2591
2592        cx = (
2593            state.xmin +
2594            (mx / CONFIG.width) *
2595            (state.xmax - state.xmin)
2596        )
2597
2598        cy = (
2599            state.ymax -
2600            (my / CONFIG.height) *
2601            (state.ymax - state.ymin)
2602        )
2603
2604        xr = state.xmax - state.xmin
2605        yr = state.ymax - state.ymin
2606
2607        state.xmin = cx - xr / 2
2608        state.xmax = cx + xr / 2
2609
2610        state.ymin = cy - yr / 2
2611        state.ymax = cy + yr / 2
2612
2613        state.needs_update = True
2614        check_deep_zoom_achievement(state)
@staticmethod
def zoom(state, direction): 
2616    @staticmethod
2617    def zoom(state, direction):
2618
2619        cx = (
2620            state.xmin +
2621            state.xmax
2622        ) * 0.5
2623
2624        cy = (
2625            state.ymin +
2626            state.ymax
2627        ) * 0.5
2628
2629        xr = (
2630            state.xmax -
2631            state.xmin
2632        )
2633
2634        yr = (
2635            state.ymax -
2636            state.ymin
2637        )
2638
2639        zoom = 0.8 if direction > 0 else 1.25
2640
2641        xr *= zoom
2642        yr *= zoom
2643
2644        # ============================================================
2645        # FLOATING POINT PRECISION LIMIT
2646        #
2647        # Prevents xmin/xmax and ymin/ymax from collapsing into the
2648        # same value due to IEEE double precision limits.
2649        # ============================================================
2650
2651        EPS = 1e-15
2652
2653        if abs(xr) < EPS * max(1.0, abs(cx)):
2654            return
2655
2656        if abs(yr) < EPS * max(1.0, abs(cy)):
2657            return
2658
2659        state.xmin = cx - xr * 0.5
2660        state.xmax = cx + xr * 0.5
2661
2662        state.ymin = cy - yr * 0.5
2663        state.ymax = cy + yr * 0.5
2664
2665        state.needs_update = True
2666        check_deep_zoom_achievement(state)
def preserve_viewport_for_aspect_ratio(state): 
2673def preserve_viewport_for_aspect_ratio(state):
2674
2675    center_x = (
2676        state.xmin +
2677        state.xmax
2678    ) * 0.5
2679
2680    center_y = (
2681        state.ymin +
2682        state.ymax
2683    ) * 0.5
2684
2685    x_range = (
2686        state.xmax -
2687        state.xmin
2688    )
2689
2690    y_range = x_range * (
2691        CONFIG.height /
2692        CONFIG.width
2693    )
2694
2695    state.xmin = center_x - x_range * 0.5
2696    state.xmax = center_x + x_range * 0.5
2697    state.ymin = center_y - y_range * 0.5
2698    state.ymax = center_y + y_range * 0.5
def apply_game_resolution(state, width, height): 
2701def apply_game_resolution(state, width, height):
2702
2703    CONFIG.upscale = 1
2704    CONFIG.base_width = int(width)
2705    CONFIG.base_height = int(height)
2706
2707    preserve_viewport_for_aspect_ratio(state)
2708
2709    pg.display.set_mode(
2710        (
2711            CONFIG.width,
2712            CONFIG.height
2713        )
2714    )
2715
2716    save_current_user_settings()
2717
2718    state.surface = None
2719    state.needs_update = True
def set_png_resolution(width, height): 
2722def set_png_resolution(width, height):
2723
2724    CONFIG.png_export_width = int(width)
2725    CONFIG.png_export_height = int(height)
2726
2727    save_current_user_settings()
def set_gif_resolution(width, height): 
2730def set_gif_resolution(width, height):
2731
2732    CONFIG.gif_export_width = int(width)
2733    CONFIG.gif_export_height = int(height)
2734
2735    save_current_user_settings()
def set_volume(audio_manager, key, value): 
2738def set_volume(audio_manager, key, value):
2739
2740    if key == "music_volume":
2741        audio_manager.set_music_volume(value)
2742
2743        update_and_save_user_setting(
2744            "music_volume",
2745            CONFIG.music_volume
2746        )
2747
2748    elif key == "ui_volume":
2749        audio_manager.set_ui_volume(value)
2750
2751        update_and_save_user_setting(
2752            "ui_volume",
2753            CONFIG.ui_volume
2754        )
def change_volume(audio_manager, key, delta): 
2757def change_volume(audio_manager, key, delta):
2758
2759    if key == "music_volume":
2760        set_volume(
2761            audio_manager,
2762            key,
2763            CONFIG.music_volume + delta
2764        )
2765
2766    elif key == "ui_volume":
2767        set_volume(
2768            audio_manager,
2769            key,
2770            CONFIG.ui_volume + delta
2771        )
def toggle_performance_info(): 
2774def toggle_performance_info():
2775
2776    CONFIG.show_performance_info = (
2777        not CONFIG.show_performance_info
2778    )
2779
2780    update_and_save_user_setting(
2781        "show_performance_info",
2782        CONFIG.show_performance_info
2783    )
class InputHandler: 
2790class InputHandler:
2791
2792    @staticmethod
2793    def process_events(state, audio_manager):
2794
2795        for event in pg.event.get():
2796
2797            if event.type == pg.QUIT:
2798                state.running = False
2799
2800            elif state.tutorial_active:
2801                InputHandler.handle_tutorial_event(
2802                    state,
2803                    event,
2804                    audio_manager
2805                )
2806
2807            elif event.type == pg.KEYDOWN:
2808                InputHandler.handle_keydown(
2809                    state,
2810                    event,
2811                    audio_manager
2812                )
2813
2814            elif event.type == pg.MOUSEBUTTONDOWN:
2815                InputHandler.handle_mouse(
2816                    state,
2817                    event,
2818                    audio_manager
2819                )
2820
2821    @staticmethod
2822    def handle_tutorial_event(state, event, audio_manager):
2823
2824        if event.type == pg.KEYDOWN:
2825
2826            if event.key == pg.K_ESCAPE:
2827
2828                if get_tutorial_action(state) == "menu":
2829                    handle_tutorial_action(
2830                        state,
2831                        "menu",
2832                        audio_manager
2833                    )
2834
2835                else:
2836                    skip_tutorial(state)
2837
2838                    if audio_manager:
2839                        audio_manager.play_click()
2840
2841                return
2842
2843            if event.key == pg.K_RETURN:
2844
2845                action = get_tutorial_action(state)
2846
2847                if action == "begin":
2848                    handle_tutorial_action(
2849                        state,
2850                        "begin",
2851                        audio_manager
2852                    )
2853
2854                elif action == "finish":
2855                    handle_tutorial_action(
2856                        state,
2857                        "finish",
2858                        audio_manager
2859                    )
2860
2861                elif action == "parameters" and not is_tutorial_parameter_step_available(state):
2862                    handle_tutorial_action(
2863                        state,
2864                        "parameter_continue",
2865                        audio_manager
2866                    )
2867
2868                return
2869
2870            if event.key in (
2871                pg.K_w,
2872                pg.K_a,
2873                pg.K_s,
2874                pg.K_d
2875            ):
2876                InputHandler.handle_keydown(
2877                    state,
2878                    event,
2879                    audio_manager
2880                )
2881
2882                handle_tutorial_action(
2883                    state,
2884                    "movement",
2885                    audio_manager
2886                )
2887                return
2888
2889            if event.key in (pg.K_q, pg.K_e):
2890                InputHandler.handle_keydown(
2891                    state,
2892                    event,
2893                    audio_manager
2894                )
2895
2896                handle_tutorial_action(
2897                    state,
2898                    "iterations",
2899                    audio_manager
2900                )
2901                return
2902
2903            if event.key in (pg.K_r, pg.K_f):
2904                InputHandler.handle_keydown(
2905                    state,
2906                    event,
2907                    audio_manager
2908                )
2909
2910                handle_tutorial_action(
2911                    state,
2912                    "palette",
2913                    audio_manager
2914                )
2915                return
2916
2917            if event.key in (
2918                pg.K_i,
2919                pg.K_j,
2920                pg.K_k,
2921                pg.K_l
2922            ):
2923                InputHandler.handle_keydown(
2924                    state,
2925                    event,
2926                    audio_manager
2927                )
2928
2929                if is_tutorial_parameter_step_available(state):
2930                    handle_tutorial_action(
2931                        state,
2932                        "parameters",
2933                        audio_manager
2934                    )
2935
2936                return
2937
2938        elif event.type == pg.MOUSEBUTTONDOWN:
2939
2940            if event.button == 1:
2941                InputHandler.handle_mouse(
2942                    state,
2943                    event,
2944                    audio_manager
2945                )
2946
2947                handle_tutorial_action(
2948                    state,
2949                    "center",
2950                    audio_manager
2951                )
2952                return
2953
2954            if event.button in (4, 5):
2955                InputHandler.handle_mouse(
2956                    state,
2957                    event,
2958                    audio_manager
2959                )
2960
2961                handle_tutorial_action(
2962                    state,
2963                    "zoom",
2964                    audio_manager
2965                )
2966                return
2967
2968    @staticmethod
2969    def activate_menu_option(state, option, audio_manager=None):
2970
2971        if audio_manager:
2972            audio_manager.play_click()
2973
2974        if option == "Continue":
2975
2976            state.menu_open = False
2977            state.submenu_open = None
2978
2979        elif option == "Export PNG":
2980
2981            export_fractal_png(state)
2982
2983        elif option == "Export GIF":
2984
2985            export_zoom_gif(state)
2986
2987        elif option == "Show Performance Info":
2988
2989            toggle_performance_info()
2990
2991        elif option == "Benchmark GPU vs CPU":
2992
2993            run_gpu_cpu_benchmark(state)
2994
2995        elif option == "Tutorial":
2996
2997            state.menu_open = False
2998            state.submenu_open = None
2999            state.tutorial_step_index = 0
3000            state.tutorial_active = True
3001
3002        elif option == "Exit":
3003
3004            state.running = False
3005
3006        else:
3007
3008            state.submenu_open = option
3009
3010    @staticmethod
3011    def handle_keydown(state, event, audio_manager):
3012
3013        if state.preset_name_input_active:
3014
3015            if event.key == pg.K_ESCAPE:
3016                cancel_preset_name_input(state)
3017                return
3018
3019            if event.key == pg.K_RETURN:
3020                save_current_custom_preset(state)
3021
3022                if audio_manager:
3023                    audio_manager.play_click()
3024
3025                return
3026
3027            if event.key == pg.K_BACKSPACE:
3028                state.preset_name_input = (
3029                    state.preset_name_input[:-1]
3030                )
3031                return
3032
3033            if event.unicode and event.unicode.isprintable():
3034                if len(state.preset_name_input) < 32:
3035                    state.preset_name_input += event.unicode
3036
3037            return
3038
3039        if state.benchmark_results_open:
3040
3041            if event.key == pg.K_ESCAPE:
3042                state.benchmark_results_open = False
3043
3044            return
3045
3046        if event.key == pg.K_ESCAPE:
3047
3048            if state.submenu_open:
3049
3050                state.submenu_open = None
3051
3052            else:
3053
3054                state.menu_open = (
3055                    not state.menu_open
3056                )
3057
3058            return
3059
3060        # ========================================================
3061        # MENU SHORTCUTS
3062        # ========================================================
3063
3064        if state.submenu_open == "Iterations":
3065
3066            if event.key == pg.K_q:
3067                state.max_iter = max(
3068                    1,
3069                    state.max_iter // 2
3070                )
3071
3072                state.needs_update = True
3073
3074            elif event.key == pg.K_e:
3075                state.max_iter *= 2
3076                state.needs_update = True
3077
3078        if state.submenu_open == "Show Performance Info":
3079
3080            if event.key in (pg.K_RETURN, pg.K_LEFT, pg.K_RIGHT):
3081                toggle_performance_info()
3082
3083        if state.menu_open:
3084
3085            if event.key == pg.K_DOWN:
3086
3087                state.menu_index += 1
3088                state.menu_index %= len(
3089                    get_menu_options(state)
3090                )
3091
3092            elif event.key == pg.K_RETURN:
3093
3094                option = get_menu_options(state)[
3095                    state.menu_index
3096                ]
3097
3098                InputHandler.activate_menu_option(
3099                    state,
3100                    option,
3101                    audio_manager
3102                )
3103
3104            return
3105
3106        # ========================================================
3107        # NORMAL CONTROLS
3108        # ========================================================
3109
3110        if event.key == pg.K_w:
3111            Camera.move(state, 0, 1)
3112
3113        elif event.key == pg.K_s:
3114            Camera.move(state, 0, -1)
3115
3116        elif event.key == pg.K_a:
3117            Camera.move(state, -1, 0)
3118
3119        elif event.key == pg.K_d:
3120            Camera.move(state, 1, 0)
3121
3122        elif event.key == pg.K_q:
3123
3124            state.max_iter = max(
3125                1,
3126                state.max_iter // 2
3127            )
3128
3129            state.needs_update = True
3130
3131        elif event.key == pg.K_e:
3132
3133            state.max_iter *= 2
3134            state.needs_update = True
3135
3136        elif event.key == pg.K_r:
3137
3138            state.current_palette += 1
3139            state.current_palette %= len(
3140                PALETTES
3141            )
3142
3143            state.needs_update = True
3144            unlock_achievement(state, "palette_swapper")
3145
3146        elif event.key == pg.K_f:
3147
3148            state.current_palette -= 1
3149            state.current_palette %= len(
3150                PALETTES
3151            )
3152
3153            state.needs_update = True
3154            unlock_achievement(state, "palette_swapper")
3155
3156        elif event.key == pg.K_p:
3157
3158            export_fractal_png(state)
3159
3160        elif event.key in (
3161            pg.K_i,
3162            pg.K_k,
3163            pg.K_j,
3164            pg.K_l
3165        ):
3166
3167            if state.current_fractal in (
3168                FractalType.MANDELBROT,
3169                FractalType.JULIA
3170            ) and is_parameter_edit_locked(state):
3171
3172                show_parameter_lock_message(state)
3173                return
3174
3175            if state.current_fractal == FractalType.JULIA:
3176
3177                if event.key == pg.K_i:
3178                    state.julia_cy += 0.005
3179
3180                elif event.key == pg.K_k:
3181                    state.julia_cy -= 0.005
3182
3183                elif event.key == pg.K_j:
3184                    state.julia_cx -= 0.005
3185
3186                elif event.key == pg.K_l:
3187                    state.julia_cx += 0.005
3188
3189                state.needs_update = True
3190
3191            elif state.current_fractal == FractalType.MANDELBROT:
3192
3193                if event.key == pg.K_i:
3194                    state.mandelbrot_zy += 0.005
3195
3196                elif event.key == pg.K_k:
3197                    state.mandelbrot_zy -= 0.005
3198
3199                elif event.key == pg.K_j:
3200                    state.mandelbrot_zx -= 0.005
3201
3202                elif event.key == pg.K_l:
3203                    state.mandelbrot_zx += 0.005
3204
3205                state.needs_update = True
3206        
3207    @staticmethod
3208    def handle_mouse(state, event, audio_manager):
3209
3210        mx, my = pg.mouse.get_pos()
3211
3212        if state.benchmark_results_open:
3213            return
3214
3215        if state.preset_name_input_active:
3216            return
3217
3218        # ========================================================
3219        # MENU
3220        # ========================================================
3221
3222        if state.menu_open:
3223
3224            if event.button != 1:
3225                return
3226
3227            panel = pg.Rect(
3228                80,
3229                120,
3230                CONFIG.width - 160,
3231                CONFIG.height - 240
3232            )
3233
3234            category_options = get_category_options(
3235                state,
3236                state.submenu_open
3237            )
3238
3239            if category_options:
3240
3241                y = panel.y + 30
3242
3243                for option in category_options:
3244
3245                    rect = pg.Rect(
3246                        panel.x + 30,
3247                        y,
3248                        panel.width - 60,
3249                        42
3250                    )
3251
3252                    if rect.collidepoint(mx, my):
3253                        InputHandler.activate_menu_option(
3254                            state,
3255                            option,
3256                            audio_manager
3257                        )
3258                        return
3259
3260                    y += 52
3261
3262                return
3263
3264            if state.submenu_open == "Mandelbrot Presets":
3265
3266                y = panel.y + 30
3267
3268                add_rect = pg.Rect(
3269                    panel.x + 30,
3270                    y,
3271                    panel.width - 60,
3272                    42
3273                )
3274
3275                if add_rect.collidepoint(mx, my):
3276                    begin_preset_name_input(
3277                        state,
3278                        "mandelbrot"
3279                    )
3280                    audio_manager.play_click()
3281                    return
3282
3283                y += 52
3284
3285                for i, preset in enumerate(
3286                    get_combined_mandelbrot_presets(state)
3287                ):
3288
3289                    rect = pg.Rect(
3290                        panel.x + 30,
3291                        y,
3292                        panel.width - 60,
3293                        42
3294                    )
3295
3296                    delete_rect = pg.Rect(
3297                        rect.right - 52,
3298                        rect.y + 6,
3299                        36,
3300                        30
3301                    )
3302
3303                    if (
3304                        preset.get("custom")
3305                        and delete_rect.collidepoint(mx, my)
3306                    ):
3307                        delete_custom_preset(
3308                            state,
3309                            "mandelbrot",
3310                            i
3311                        )
3312                        audio_manager.play_click()
3313                        return
3314
3315                    if rect.collidepoint(mx, my):
3316
3317                        if is_parameter_edit_locked(state):
3318                            show_parameter_lock_message(state)
3319                            audio_manager.play_click()
3320                            return
3321
3322                        apply_mandelbrot_preset(
3323                            state,
3324                            preset,
3325                            i
3326                        )
3327
3328                        audio_manager.play_click()
3329
3330                    y += 52
3331
3332                return
3333
3334            if state.submenu_open == "Julia Presets":
3335
3336                y = panel.y + 30
3337
3338                add_rect = pg.Rect(
3339                    panel.x + 30,
3340                    y,
3341                    panel.width - 60,
3342                    42
3343                )
3344
3345                if add_rect.collidepoint(mx, my):
3346                    begin_preset_name_input(
3347                        state,
3348                        "julia"
3349                    )
3350                    audio_manager.play_click()
3351                    return
3352
3353                y += 52
3354
3355                for i, preset in enumerate(
3356                    get_combined_julia_presets(state)
3357                ):
3358
3359                    rect = pg.Rect(
3360                        panel.x + 30,
3361                        y,
3362                        panel.width - 60,
3363                        42
3364                    )
3365
3366                    delete_rect = pg.Rect(
3367                        rect.right - 52,
3368                        rect.y + 6,
3369                        36,
3370                        30
3371                    )
3372
3373                    if (
3374                        preset.get("custom")
3375                        and delete_rect.collidepoint(mx, my)
3376                    ):
3377                        delete_custom_preset(
3378                            state,
3379                            "julia",
3380                            i
3381                        )
3382                        audio_manager.play_click()
3383                        return
3384
3385                    if rect.collidepoint(mx, my):
3386
3387                        if is_parameter_edit_locked(state):
3388                            show_parameter_lock_message(state)
3389                            audio_manager.play_click()
3390                            return
3391
3392                        apply_julia_preset(
3393                            state,
3394                            preset,
3395                            i
3396                        )
3397
3398                        audio_manager.play_click()
3399
3400                    y += 52
3401
3402                return
3403
3404            if state.submenu_open == "Power":
3405
3406                y = panel.y + 30
3407
3408                for power in POWER_VALUES:
3409
3410                    rect = pg.Rect(
3411                        panel.x + 30,
3412                        y,
3413                        panel.width - 60,
3414                        42
3415                    )
3416
3417                    if rect.collidepoint(mx, my):
3418
3419                        if is_parameter_edit_locked(state):
3420                            show_parameter_lock_message(state)
3421                            audio_manager.play_click()
3422                            return
3423
3424                        state.fractal_power = power
3425                        state.needs_update = True
3426
3427                        audio_manager.play_click()
3428
3429                    y += 52
3430
3431                return
3432
3433            if state.submenu_open == "Fractal Type":
3434
3435                y = panel.y + 30
3436
3437                fractals = [
3438                    (FractalType.MANDELBROT, "Mandelbrot"),
3439                    (FractalType.JULIA, "Julia Set"),
3440                    (FractalType.BURNING_SHIP, "Burning Ship"),
3441                ]
3442
3443                for fractal_type, label in fractals:
3444
3445                    rect = pg.Rect(
3446                        panel.x + 30,
3447                        y,
3448                        panel.width - 60,
3449                        50
3450                    )
3451
3452                    if rect.collidepoint(mx, my):
3453
3454                        previous_fractal = (
3455                            state.current_fractal
3456                        )
3457
3458                        state.current_fractal = fractal_type
3459
3460                        if (
3461                            previous_fractal != FractalType.MANDELBROT
3462                            and fractal_type == FractalType.MANDELBROT
3463                        ):
3464
3465                            new_state = create_initial_state()
3466
3467                            state.xmin = new_state.xmin
3468                            state.xmax = new_state.xmax
3469                            state.ymin = new_state.ymin
3470                            state.ymax = new_state.ymax
3471
3472                        state.needs_update = True
3473
3474                        if previous_fractal != fractal_type:
3475                            unlock_achievement(
3476                                state,
3477                                "fractal_switcher"
3478                            )
3479
3480                        audio_manager.play_click()
3481
3482                    y += 62
3483
3484                return
3485
3486            if state.submenu_open == "Palette":
3487
3488                y = panel.y + 30
3489
3490                for i, palette in enumerate(PALETTES):
3491
3492                    rect = pg.Rect(
3493                        panel.x + 30,
3494                        y,
3495                        panel.width - 60,
3496                        42
3497                    )
3498
3499                    if rect.collidepoint(mx, my):
3500
3501                        previous_palette = state.current_palette
3502
3503                        state.current_palette = i
3504                        state.needs_update = True
3505
3506                        if previous_palette != i:
3507                            unlock_achievement(
3508                                state,
3509                                "palette_swapper"
3510                            )
3511
3512                        audio_manager.play_click()
3513
3514                    y += 52
3515
3516                return
3517
3518            if state.submenu_open == "Game Resolution":
3519
3520                y = panel.y + 30
3521
3522                for width, height in GAME_RESOLUTION_PRESETS:
3523
3524                    rect = pg.Rect(
3525                        panel.x + 30,
3526                        y,
3527                        panel.width - 60,
3528                        42
3529                    )
3530
3531                    if rect.collidepoint(mx, my):
3532                        apply_game_resolution(
3533                            state,
3534                            width,
3535                            height
3536                        )
3537                        audio_manager.play_click()
3538                        return
3539
3540                    y += 52
3541
3542            if state.submenu_open == "PNG Resolution":
3543
3544                y = panel.y + 30
3545
3546                for width, height in PNG_RESOLUTION_PRESETS:
3547
3548                    rect = pg.Rect(
3549                        panel.x + 30,
3550                        y,
3551                        panel.width - 60,
3552                        42
3553                    )
3554
3555                    if rect.collidepoint(mx, my):
3556                        set_png_resolution(
3557                            width,
3558                            height
3559                        )
3560                        audio_manager.play_click()
3561                        return
3562
3563                    y += 52
3564
3565            if state.submenu_open == "GIF Resolution":
3566
3567                y = panel.y + 30
3568
3569                for width, height in GIF_RESOLUTION_PRESETS:
3570
3571                    rect = pg.Rect(
3572                        panel.x + 30,
3573                        y,
3574                        panel.width - 60,
3575                        42
3576                    )
3577
3578                    if rect.collidepoint(mx, my):
3579                        set_gif_resolution(
3580                            width,
3581                            height
3582                        )
3583                        audio_manager.play_click()
3584                        return
3585
3586                    y += 52
3587
3588            if state.submenu_open == "Audio Settings":
3589
3590                sliders = [
3591                    (
3592                        "music_volume",
3593                        panel.y + 110
3594                    ),
3595                    (
3596                        "ui_volume",
3597                        panel.y + 220
3598                    ),
3599                ]
3600
3601                for key, slider_y in sliders:
3602
3603                    slider_rect = pg.Rect(
3604                        panel.x + 260,
3605                        slider_y + 6,
3606                        panel.width - 360,
3607                        22
3608                    )
3609
3610                    hit_rect = slider_rect.inflate(
3611                        20,
3612                        34
3613                    )
3614
3615                    if hit_rect.collidepoint(mx, my):
3616                        value = (
3617                            mx - slider_rect.x
3618                        ) / slider_rect.width
3619
3620                        set_volume(
3621                            audio_manager,
3622                            key,
3623                            value
3624                        )
3625
3626                        audio_manager.play_click()
3627                        return
3628
3629                return
3630
3631            if state.submenu_open == "Music Volume":
3632
3633                change_volume(
3634                    audio_manager,
3635                    "music_volume",
3636                    0.05
3637                )
3638                audio_manager.play_click()
3639                return
3640
3641            if state.submenu_open == "UI Volume":
3642
3643                change_volume(
3644                    audio_manager,
3645                    "ui_volume",
3646                    0.05
3647                )
3648                audio_manager.play_click()
3649                return
3650
3651            if state.submenu_open == "Show Performance Info":
3652
3653                toggle_performance_info()
3654                audio_manager.play_click()
3655                return
3656
3657            start_y = 240
3658
3659            for i, option in enumerate(get_menu_options(state)):
3660
3661                rect = pg.Rect(
3662                    CONFIG.width // 2 - 250,
3663                    start_y + i * 70,
3664                    500,
3665                    55
3666                )
3667
3668                if rect.collidepoint(mx, my):
3669
3670                    state.menu_index = i
3671
3672                    InputHandler.activate_menu_option(
3673                        state,
3674                        option,
3675                        audio_manager
3676                    )
3677
3678            return
3679
3680        # ========================================================
3681        # NORMAL
3682        # ========================================================
3683
3684        if event.button == 1:
3685
3686            Camera.center_on_pixel(
3687                state,
3688                mx,
3689                my
3690            )
3691
3692        elif event.button == 4:
3693
3694            Camera.zoom(state, 1)
3695            unlock_achievement(state, "first_zoom")
3696
3697        elif event.button == 5:
3698
3699            Camera.zoom(state, -1)
3700            unlock_achievement(state, "first_zoom")
@staticmethod
def process_events(state, audio_manager): 
2792    @staticmethod
2793    def process_events(state, audio_manager):
2794
2795        for event in pg.event.get():
2796
2797            if event.type == pg.QUIT:
2798                state.running = False
2799
2800            elif state.tutorial_active:
2801                InputHandler.handle_tutorial_event(
2802                    state,
2803                    event,
2804                    audio_manager
2805                )
2806
2807            elif event.type == pg.KEYDOWN:
2808                InputHandler.handle_keydown(
2809                    state,
2810                    event,
2811                    audio_manager
2812                )
2813
2814            elif event.type == pg.MOUSEBUTTONDOWN:
2815                InputHandler.handle_mouse(
2816                    state,
2817                    event,
2818                    audio_manager
2819                )
@staticmethod
def handle_tutorial_event(state, event, audio_manager): 
2821    @staticmethod
2822    def handle_tutorial_event(state, event, audio_manager):
2823
2824        if event.type == pg.KEYDOWN:
2825
2826            if event.key == pg.K_ESCAPE:
2827
2828                if get_tutorial_action(state) == "menu":
2829                    handle_tutorial_action(
2830                        state,
2831                        "menu",
2832                        audio_manager
2833                    )
2834
2835                else:
2836                    skip_tutorial(state)
2837
2838                    if audio_manager:
2839                        audio_manager.play_click()
2840
2841                return
2842
2843            if event.key == pg.K_RETURN:
2844
2845                action = get_tutorial_action(state)
2846
2847                if action == "begin":
2848                    handle_tutorial_action(
2849                        state,
2850                        "begin",
2851                        audio_manager
2852                    )
2853
2854                elif action == "finish":
2855                    handle_tutorial_action(
2856                        state,
2857                        "finish",
2858                        audio_manager
2859                    )
2860
2861                elif action == "parameters" and not is_tutorial_parameter_step_available(state):
2862                    handle_tutorial_action(
2863                        state,
2864                        "parameter_continue",
2865                        audio_manager
2866                    )
2867
2868                return
2869
2870            if event.key in (
2871                pg.K_w,
2872                pg.K_a,
2873                pg.K_s,
2874                pg.K_d
2875            ):
2876                InputHandler.handle_keydown(
2877                    state,
2878                    event,
2879                    audio_manager
2880                )
2881
2882                handle_tutorial_action(
2883                    state,
2884                    "movement",
2885                    audio_manager
2886                )
2887                return
2888
2889            if event.key in (pg.K_q, pg.K_e):
2890                InputHandler.handle_keydown(
2891                    state,
2892                    event,
2893                    audio_manager
2894                )
2895
2896                handle_tutorial_action(
2897                    state,
2898                    "iterations",
2899                    audio_manager
2900                )
2901                return
2902
2903            if event.key in (pg.K_r, pg.K_f):
2904                InputHandler.handle_keydown(
2905                    state,
2906                    event,
2907                    audio_manager
2908                )
2909
2910                handle_tutorial_action(
2911                    state,
2912                    "palette",
2913                    audio_manager
2914                )
2915                return
2916
2917            if event.key in (
2918                pg.K_i,
2919                pg.K_j,
2920                pg.K_k,
2921                pg.K_l
2922            ):
2923                InputHandler.handle_keydown(
2924                    state,
2925                    event,
2926                    audio_manager
2927                )
2928
2929                if is_tutorial_parameter_step_available(state):
2930                    handle_tutorial_action(
2931                        state,
2932                        "parameters",
2933                        audio_manager
2934                    )
2935
2936                return
2937
2938        elif event.type == pg.MOUSEBUTTONDOWN:
2939
2940            if event.button == 1:
2941                InputHandler.handle_mouse(
2942                    state,
2943                    event,
2944                    audio_manager
2945                )
2946
2947                handle_tutorial_action(
2948                    state,
2949                    "center",
2950                    audio_manager
2951                )
2952                return
2953
2954            if event.button in (4, 5):
2955                InputHandler.handle_mouse(
2956                    state,
2957                    event,
2958                    audio_manager
2959                )
2960
2961                handle_tutorial_action(
2962                    state,
2963                    "zoom",
2964                    audio_manager
2965                )
2966                return
@staticmethod
def activate_menu_option(state, option, audio_manager=None): 
2968    @staticmethod
2969    def activate_menu_option(state, option, audio_manager=None):
2970
2971        if audio_manager:
2972            audio_manager.play_click()
2973
2974        if option == "Continue":
2975
2976            state.menu_open = False
2977            state.submenu_open = None
2978
2979        elif option == "Export PNG":
2980
2981            export_fractal_png(state)
2982
2983        elif option == "Export GIF":
2984
2985            export_zoom_gif(state)
2986
2987        elif option == "Show Performance Info":
2988
2989            toggle_performance_info()
2990
2991        elif option == "Benchmark GPU vs CPU":
2992
2993            run_gpu_cpu_benchmark(state)
2994
2995        elif option == "Tutorial":
2996
2997            state.menu_open = False
2998            state.submenu_open = None
2999            state.tutorial_step_index = 0
3000            state.tutorial_active = True
3001
3002        elif option == "Exit":
3003
3004            state.running = False
3005
3006        else:
3007
3008            state.submenu_open = option
@staticmethod
def handle_keydown(state, event, audio_manager): 
3010    @staticmethod
3011    def handle_keydown(state, event, audio_manager):
3012
3013        if state.preset_name_input_active:
3014
3015            if event.key == pg.K_ESCAPE:
3016                cancel_preset_name_input(state)
3017                return
3018
3019            if event.key == pg.K_RETURN:
3020                save_current_custom_preset(state)
3021
3022                if audio_manager:
3023                    audio_manager.play_click()
3024
3025                return
3026
3027            if event.key == pg.K_BACKSPACE:
3028                state.preset_name_input = (
3029                    state.preset_name_input[:-1]
3030                )
3031                return
3032
3033            if event.unicode and event.unicode.isprintable():
3034                if len(state.preset_name_input) < 32:
3035                    state.preset_name_input += event.unicode
3036
3037            return
3038
3039        if state.benchmark_results_open:
3040
3041            if event.key == pg.K_ESCAPE:
3042                state.benchmark_results_open = False
3043
3044            return
3045
3046        if event.key == pg.K_ESCAPE:
3047
3048            if state.submenu_open:
3049
3050                state.submenu_open = None
3051
3052            else:
3053
3054                state.menu_open = (
3055                    not state.menu_open
3056                )
3057
3058            return
3059
3060        # ========================================================
3061        # MENU SHORTCUTS
3062        # ========================================================
3063
3064        if state.submenu_open == "Iterations":
3065
3066            if event.key == pg.K_q:
3067                state.max_iter = max(
3068                    1,
3069                    state.max_iter // 2
3070                )
3071
3072                state.needs_update = True
3073
3074            elif event.key == pg.K_e:
3075                state.max_iter *= 2
3076                state.needs_update = True
3077
3078        if state.submenu_open == "Show Performance Info":
3079
3080            if event.key in (pg.K_RETURN, pg.K_LEFT, pg.K_RIGHT):
3081                toggle_performance_info()
3082
3083        if state.menu_open:
3084
3085            if event.key == pg.K_DOWN:
3086
3087                state.menu_index += 1
3088                state.menu_index %= len(
3089                    get_menu_options(state)
3090                )
3091
3092            elif event.key == pg.K_RETURN:
3093
3094                option = get_menu_options(state)[
3095                    state.menu_index
3096                ]
3097
3098                InputHandler.activate_menu_option(
3099                    state,
3100                    option,
3101                    audio_manager
3102                )
3103
3104            return
3105
