3106        # ========================================================
3107        # NORMAL CONTROLS
3108        # ========================================================
3109
3110        if event.key == pg.K_w:
3111            Camera.move(state, 0, 1)
3112
3113        elif event.key == pg.K_s:
3114            Camera.move(state, 0, -1)
3115
3116        elif event.key == pg.K_a:
3117            Camera.move(state, -1, 0)
3118
3119        elif event.key == pg.K_d:
3120            Camera.move(state, 1, 0)
3121
3122        elif event.key == pg.K_q:
3123
3124            state.max_iter = max(
3125                1,
3126                state.max_iter // 2
3127            )
3128
3129            state.needs_update = True
3130
3131        elif event.key == pg.K_e:
3132
3133            state.max_iter *= 2
3134            state.needs_update = True
3135
3136        elif event.key == pg.K_r:
3137
3138            state.current_palette += 1
3139            state.current_palette %= len(
3140                PALETTES
3141            )
3142
3143            state.needs_update = True
3144            unlock_achievement(state, "palette_swapper")
3145
3146        elif event.key == pg.K_f:
3147
3148            state.current_palette -= 1
3149            state.current_palette %= len(
3150                PALETTES
3151            )
3152
3153            state.needs_update = True
3154            unlock_achievement(state, "palette_swapper")
3155
3156        elif event.key == pg.K_p:
3157
3158            export_fractal_png(state)
3159
3160        elif event.key in (
3161            pg.K_i,
3162            pg.K_k,
3163            pg.K_j,
3164            pg.K_l
3165        ):
3166
3167            if state.current_fractal in (
3168                FractalType.MANDELBROT,
3169                FractalType.JULIA
3170            ) and is_parameter_edit_locked(state):
3171
3172                show_parameter_lock_message(state)
3173                return
3174
3175            if state.current_fractal == FractalType.JULIA:
3176
3177                if event.key == pg.K_i:
3178                    state.julia_cy += 0.005
3179
3180                elif event.key == pg.K_k:
3181                    state.julia_cy -= 0.005
3182
3183                elif event.key == pg.K_j:
3184                    state.julia_cx -= 0.005
3185
3186                elif event.key == pg.K_l:
3187                    state.julia_cx += 0.005
3188
3189                state.needs_update = True
3190
3191            elif state.current_fractal == FractalType.MANDELBROT:
3192
3193                if event.key == pg.K_i:
3194                    state.mandelbrot_zy += 0.005
3195
3196                elif event.key == pg.K_k:
3197                    state.mandelbrot_zy -= 0.005
3198
3199                elif event.key == pg.K_j:
3200                    state.mandelbrot_zx -= 0.005
3201
3202                elif event.key == pg.K_l:
3203                    state.mandelbrot_zx += 0.005
3204
3205                state.needs_update = True
@staticmethod
def handle_mouse(state, event, audio_manager): 
3207    @staticmethod
3208    def handle_mouse(state, event, audio_manager):
3209
3210        mx, my = pg.mouse.get_pos()
3211
3212        if state.benchmark_results_open:
3213            return
3214
3215        if state.preset_name_input_active:
3216            return
3217
3218        # ========================================================
3219        # MENU
3220        # ========================================================
3221
3222        if state.menu_open:
3223
3224            if event.button != 1:
3225                return
3226
3227            panel = pg.Rect(
3228                80,
3229                120,
3230                CONFIG.width - 160,
3231                CONFIG.height - 240
3232            )
3233
3234            category_options = get_category_options(
3235                state,
3236                state.submenu_open
3237            )
3238
3239            if category_options:
3240
3241                y = panel.y + 30
3242
3243                for option in category_options:
3244
3245                    rect = pg.Rect(
3246                        panel.x + 30,
3247                        y,
3248                        panel.width - 60,
3249                        42
3250                    )
3251
3252                    if rect.collidepoint(mx, my):
3253                        InputHandler.activate_menu_option(
3254                            state,
3255                            option,
3256                            audio_manager
3257                        )
3258                        return
3259
3260                    y += 52
3261
3262                return
3263
3264            if state.submenu_open == "Mandelbrot Presets":
3265
3266                y = panel.y + 30
3267
3268                add_rect = pg.Rect(
3269                    panel.x + 30,
3270                    y,
3271                    panel.width - 60,
3272                    42
3273                )
3274
3275                if add_rect.collidepoint(mx, my):
3276                    begin_preset_name_input(
3277                        state,
3278                        "mandelbrot"
3279                    )
3280                    audio_manager.play_click()
3281                    return
3282
3283                y += 52
3284
3285                for i, preset in enumerate(
3286                    get_combined_mandelbrot_presets(state)
3287                ):
3288
3289                    rect = pg.Rect(
3290                        panel.x + 30,
3291                        y,
3292                        panel.width - 60,
3293                        42
3294                    )
3295
3296                    delete_rect = pg.Rect(
3297                        rect.right - 52,
3298                        rect.y + 6,
3299                        36,
3300                        30
3301                    )
3302
3303                    if (
3304                        preset.get("custom")
3305                        and delete_rect.collidepoint(mx, my)
3306                    ):
3307                        delete_custom_preset(
3308                            state,
3309                            "mandelbrot",
3310                            i
3311                        )
3312                        audio_manager.play_click()
3313                        return
3314
3315                    if rect.collidepoint(mx, my):
3316
3317                        if is_parameter_edit_locked(state):
3318                            show_parameter_lock_message(state)
3319                            audio_manager.play_click()
3320                            return
3321
3322                        apply_mandelbrot_preset(
3323                            state,
3324                            preset,
3325                            i
3326                        )
3327
3328                        audio_manager.play_click()
3329
3330                    y += 52
3331
3332                return
3333
3334            if state.submenu_open == "Julia Presets":
3335
3336                y = panel.y + 30
3337
3338                add_rect = pg.Rect(
3339                    panel.x + 30,
3340                    y,
3341                    panel.width - 60,
3342                    42
3343                )
3344
3345                if add_rect.collidepoint(mx, my):
3346                    begin_preset_name_input(
3347                        state,
3348                        "julia"
3349                    )
3350                    audio_manager.play_click()
3351                    return
3352
3353                y += 52
3354
3355                for i, preset in enumerate(
3356                    get_combined_julia_presets(state)
3357                ):
3358
3359                    rect = pg.Rect(
3360                        panel.x + 30,
3361                        y,
3362                        panel.width - 60,
3363                        42
3364                    )
3365
3366                    delete_rect = pg.Rect(
3367                        rect.right - 52,
3368                        rect.y + 6,
3369                        36,
3370                        30
3371                    )
3372
3373                    if (
3374                        preset.get("custom")
3375                        and delete_rect.collidepoint(mx, my)
3376                    ):
3377                        delete_custom_preset(
3378                            state,
3379                            "julia",
3380                            i
3381                        )
3382                        audio_manager.play_click()
3383                        return
3384
3385                    if rect.collidepoint(mx, my):
3386
3387                        if is_parameter_edit_locked(state):
3388                            show_parameter_lock_message(state)
3389                            audio_manager.play_click()
3390                            return
3391
3392                        apply_julia_preset(
3393                            state,
3394                            preset,
3395                            i
3396                        )
3397
3398                        audio_manager.play_click()
3399
3400                    y += 52
3401
3402                return
3403
3404            if state.submenu_open == "Power":
3405
3406                y = panel.y + 30
3407
3408                for power in POWER_VALUES:
3409
3410                    rect = pg.Rect(
3411                        panel.x + 30,
3412                        y,
3413                        panel.width - 60,
3414                        42
3415                    )
3416
3417                    if rect.collidepoint(mx, my):
3418
3419                        if is_parameter_edit_locked(state):
3420                            show_parameter_lock_message(state)
3421                            audio_manager.play_click()
3422                            return
3423
3424                        state.fractal_power = power
3425                        state.needs_update = True
3426
3427                        audio_manager.play_click()
3428
3429                    y += 52
3430
3431                return
3432
3433            if state.submenu_open == "Fractal Type":
3434
3435                y = panel.y + 30
3436
3437                fractals = [
3438                    (FractalType.MANDELBROT, "Mandelbrot"),
3439                    (FractalType.JULIA, "Julia Set"),
3440                    (FractalType.BURNING_SHIP, "Burning Ship"),
3441                ]
3442
3443                for fractal_type, label in fractals:
3444
3445                    rect = pg.Rect(
3446                        panel.x + 30,
3447                        y,
3448                        panel.width - 60,
3449                        50
3450                    )
3451
3452                    if rect.collidepoint(mx, my):
3453
3454                        previous_fractal = (
3455                            state.current_fractal
3456                        )
3457
3458                        state.current_fractal = fractal_type
3459
3460                        if (
3461                            previous_fractal != FractalType.MANDELBROT
3462                            and fractal_type == FractalType.MANDELBROT
3463                        ):
3464
3465                            new_state = create_initial_state()
3466
3467                            state.xmin = new_state.xmin
3468                            state.xmax = new_state.xmax
3469                            state.ymin = new_state.ymin
3470                            state.ymax = new_state.ymax
3471
3472                        state.needs_update = True
3473
3474                        if previous_fractal != fractal_type:
3475                            unlock_achievement(
3476                                state,
3477                                "fractal_switcher"
3478                            )
3479
3480                        audio_manager.play_click()
3481
3482                    y += 62
3483
3484                return
3485
3486            if state.submenu_open == "Palette":
3487
3488                y = panel.y + 30
3489
3490                for i, palette in enumerate(PALETTES):
3491
3492                    rect = pg.Rect(
3493                        panel.x + 30,
3494                        y,
3495                        panel.width - 60,
3496                        42
3497                    )
3498
3499                    if rect.collidepoint(mx, my):
3500
3501                        previous_palette = state.current_palette
3502
3503                        state.current_palette = i
3504                        state.needs_update = True
3505
3506                        if previous_palette != i:
3507                            unlock_achievement(
3508                                state,
3509                                "palette_swapper"
3510                            )
3511
3512                        audio_manager.play_click()
3513
3514                    y += 52
3515
3516                return
3517
3518            if state.submenu_open == "Game Resolution":
3519
3520                y = panel.y + 30
3521
3522                for width, height in GAME_RESOLUTION_PRESETS:
3523
3524                    rect = pg.Rect(
3525                        panel.x + 30,
3526                        y,
3527                        panel.width - 60,
3528                        42
3529                    )
3530
3531                    if rect.collidepoint(mx, my):
3532                        apply_game_resolution(
3533                            state,
3534                            width,
3535                            height
3536                        )
3537                        audio_manager.play_click()
3538                        return
3539
3540                    y += 52
3541
3542            if state.submenu_open == "PNG Resolution":
3543
3544                y = panel.y + 30
3545
3546                for width, height in PNG_RESOLUTION_PRESETS:
3547
3548                    rect = pg.Rect(
3549                        panel.x + 30,
3550                        y,
3551                        panel.width - 60,
3552                        42
3553                    )
3554
3555                    if rect.collidepoint(mx, my):
3556                        set_png_resolution(
3557                            width,
3558                            height
3559                        )
3560                        audio_manager.play_click()
3561                        return
3562
3563                    y += 52
3564
3565            if state.submenu_open == "GIF Resolution":
3566
3567                y = panel.y + 30
3568
3569                for width, height in GIF_RESOLUTION_PRESETS:
3570
3571                    rect = pg.Rect(
3572                        panel.x + 30,
3573                        y,
3574                        panel.width - 60,
3575                        42
3576                    )
3577
3578                    if rect.collidepoint(mx, my):
3579                        set_gif_resolution(
3580                            width,
3581                            height
3582                        )
3583                        audio_manager.play_click()
3584                        return
3585
3586                    y += 52
3587
3588            if state.submenu_open == "Audio Settings":
3589
3590                sliders = [
3591                    (
3592                        "music_volume",
3593                        panel.y + 110
3594                    ),
3595                    (
3596                        "ui_volume",
3597                        panel.y + 220
3598                    ),
3599                ]
3600
3601                for key, slider_y in sliders:
3602
3603                    slider_rect = pg.Rect(
3604                        panel.x + 260,
3605                        slider_y + 6,
3606                        panel.width - 360,
3607                        22
3608                    )
3609
3610                    hit_rect = slider_rect.inflate(
3611                        20,
3612                        34
3613                    )
3614
3615                    if hit_rect.collidepoint(mx, my):
3616                        value = (
3617                            mx - slider_rect.x
3618                        ) / slider_rect.width
3619
3620                        set_volume(
3621                            audio_manager,
3622                            key,
3623                            value
3624                        )
3625
3626                        audio_manager.play_click()
3627                        return
3628
3629                return
3630
3631            if state.submenu_open == "Music Volume":
3632
3633                change_volume(
3634                    audio_manager,
3635                    "music_volume",
3636                    0.05
3637                )
3638                audio_manager.play_click()
3639                return
3640
3641            if state.submenu_open == "UI Volume":
3642
3643                change_volume(
3644                    audio_manager,
3645                    "ui_volume",
3646                    0.05
3647                )
3648                audio_manager.play_click()
3649                return
3650
3651            if state.submenu_open == "Show Performance Info":
3652
3653                toggle_performance_info()
3654                audio_manager.play_click()
3655                return
3656
3657            start_y = 240
3658
3659            for i, option in enumerate(get_menu_options(state)):
3660
3661                rect = pg.Rect(
3662                    CONFIG.width // 2 - 250,
3663                    start_y + i * 70,
3664                    500,
3665                    55
3666                )
3667
3668                if rect.collidepoint(mx, my):
3669
3670                    state.menu_index = i
3671
3672                    InputHandler.activate_menu_option(
3673                        state,
3674                        option,
3675                        audio_manager
3676                    )
3677
3678            return
3679
3680        # ========================================================
3681        # NORMAL
3682        # ========================================================
3683
3684        if event.button == 1:
3685
3686            Camera.center_on_pixel(
3687                state,
3688                mx,
3689                my
3690            )
3691
3692        elif event.button == 4:
3693
3694            Camera.zoom(state, 1)
3695            unlock_achievement(state, "first_zoom")
3696
3697        elif event.button == 5:
3698
3699            Camera.zoom(state, -1)
3700            unlock_achievement(state, "first_zoom")
class UI: 
3707class UI:
3708
3709    def __init__(self):
3710
3711        self.font = pg.font.SysFont(
3712            CONFIG.font_name,
3713            CONFIG.font_size
3714        )
3715
3716    def draw(self, screen, state):
3717
3718        if not state.show_ui:
3719
3720            if state.tutorial_active:
3721                self.draw_tutorial_overlay(screen, state)
3722
3723            return
3724
3725        palette_name = PALETTES[
3726            state.current_palette
3727        ]["name"]
3728
3729        lines = [
3730            f"Fractal: {state.current_fractal.value}",
3731        ]
3732        
3733        if state.current_fractal == FractalType.MANDELBROT:
3734
3735            lines += [
3736                f"Mandelbrot Z Real: {state.mandelbrot_zx:.6f}",
3737                f"Mandelbrot Z Imag: {state.mandelbrot_zy:.6f}",
3738                f"Mandelbrot Preset: {state.mandelbrot_preset_name}",
3739            ]
3740
3741        if state.current_fractal == FractalType.JULIA:
3742
3743            lines += [
3744                f"Julia C Real: {state.julia_cx:.6f}",
3745                f"Julia C Imag: {state.julia_cy:.6f}",
3746                f"Julia Preset: {state.julia_preset_name}",
3747            ]
3748
3749        if state.current_fractal in (
3750            FractalType.MANDELBROT,
3751            FractalType.JULIA
3752        ):
3753
3754            lines += [
3755                f"Power: {state.fractal_power}",
3756            ]
3757        
3758        if is_parameter_edit_locked(state):
3759
3760            lines += [
3761                "Parameter editing locked: zoom out to change fractal parameters",
3762            ]
3763
3764        lines += [
3765            f"Iterations: {state.max_iter}",
3766            f"Palette: {palette_name}",
3767        ]
3768
3769        if CONFIG.show_performance_info:
3770
3771            lines += [
3772                f"Render: {state.last_render_time_ms:.2f} ms",
3773                f"FPS: {state.last_render_fps:.1f}",
3774            ]
3775
3776        lines += [
3777            "",
3778            "ESC = menu"
3779        ]
3780        
3781
3782        y = 10
3783
3784        for line in lines:
3785
3786            text = self.font.render(
3787                line,
3788                True,
3789                (255, 255, 255)
3790            )
3791
3792            screen.blit(text, (10, y))
3793
3794            y += 30
3795
3796        now = time.time()
3797
3798        if (
3799            state.export_message and
3800            now - state.export_message_timer < 5.0
3801        ):
3802
3803            text = self.font.render(
3804                state.export_message,
3805                True,
3806                (255, 255, 255)
3807            )
3808
3809            screen.blit(
3810                text,
3811                (20, CONFIG.height - 40)
3812            )
3813
3814        if state.tutorial_active:
3815            self.draw_tutorial_overlay(screen, state)
3816
3817    def draw_tutorial_overlay(self, screen, state):
3818
3819        overlay = pg.Surface(
3820            (CONFIG.width, CONFIG.height),
3821            pg.SRCALPHA
3822        )
3823
3824        overlay.fill((0, 0, 0, 120))
3825        screen.blit(overlay, (0, 0))
3826
3827        panel = pg.Rect(
3828            CONFIG.width // 2 - 550,
3829            CONFIG.height - 310,
3830            1100,
3831            230
3832        )
3833
3834        pg.draw.rect(
3835            screen,
3836            (20, 20, 24),
3837            panel,
3838            border_radius=16
3839        )
3840
3841        pg.draw.rect(
3842            screen,
3843            (90, 90, 140),
3844            panel,
3845            width=2,
3846            border_radius=16
3847        )
3848
3849        step_index = max(
3850            0,
3851            min(state.tutorial_step_index, len(TUTORIAL_STEPS) - 1)
3852        )
3853
3854        step = TUTORIAL_STEPS[step_index]
3855
3856        title = step.get(
3857            "title",
3858            "Tutorial"
3859        )
3860
3861        body, required = get_tutorial_step_text(state)
3862
3863        title_text = self.font.render(
3864            f"Tutorial {step_index + 1}/{len(TUTORIAL_STEPS)}: {title}",
3865            True,
3866            (255, 255, 255)
3867        )
3868
3869        screen.blit(
3870            title_text,
3871            (panel.x + 30, panel.y + 25)
3872        )
3873
3874        body_text = self.font.render(
3875            body,
3876            True,
3877            (220, 220, 220)
3878        )
3879
3880        screen.blit(
3881            body_text,
3882            (panel.x + 30, panel.y + 78)
3883        )
3884
3885        required_text = self.font.render(
3886            required,
3887            True,
3888            (255, 255, 255)
3889        )
3890
3891        screen.blit(
3892            required_text,
3893            (panel.x + 30, panel.y + 118)
3894        )
3895
3896        hint_text = self.font.render(
3897            "ESC skips tutorial",
3898            True,
3899            (190, 190, 210)
3900        )
3901
3902        screen.blit(
3903            hint_text,
3904            (panel.x + 30, panel.y + 165)
3905        )
3906
3907    def draw_benchmark_results_overlay(self, screen, state):
3908
3909        overlay = pg.Surface(
3910            (CONFIG.width, CONFIG.height),
3911            pg.SRCALPHA
3912        )
3913
3914        overlay.fill((0, 0, 0, 180))
3915        screen.blit(overlay, (0, 0))
3916
3917        panel_width = min(
3918            900,
3919            CONFIG.width - 120
3920        )
3921
3922        panel_height = min(
3923            560,
3924            CONFIG.height - 120
3925        )
3926
3927        panel = pg.Rect(
3928            CONFIG.width // 2 - panel_width // 2,
3929            CONFIG.height // 2 - panel_height // 2,
3930            panel_width,
3931            panel_height
3932        )
3933
3934        pg.draw.rect(
3935            screen,
3936            (20, 20, 24),
3937            panel,
3938            border_radius=16
3939        )
3940
3941        pg.draw.rect(
3942            screen,
3943            (90, 90, 140),
3944            panel,
3945            width=2,
3946            border_radius=16
3947        )
3948
3949        y = panel.y + 40
3950
3951        for index, line in enumerate(state.benchmark_result_lines):
3952
3953            font = self.font if index == 0 else self.font
3954
3955            text = font.render(
3956                line,
3957                True,
3958                (255, 255, 255)
3959            )
3960
3961            screen.blit(
3962                text,
3963                (panel.x + 40, y)
3964            )
3965
3966            y += 42
font

def draw_tutorial_overlay(self, screen, state): 
3817    def draw_tutorial_overlay(self, screen, state):
3818
3819        overlay = pg.Surface(
3820            (CONFIG.width, CONFIG.height),
3821            pg.SRCALPHA
3822        )
3823
3824        overlay.fill((0, 0, 0, 120))
3825        screen.blit(overlay, (0, 0))
3826
3827        panel = pg.Rect(
3828            CONFIG.width // 2 - 550,
3829            CONFIG.height - 310,
3830            1100,
3831            230
3832        )
3833
3834        pg.draw.rect(
3835            screen,
3836            (20, 20, 24),
3837            panel,
3838            border_radius=16
3839        )
3840

3842            screen,
3843            (90, 90, 140),
3844            panel,
3845            width=2,
3846            border_radius=16
3847        )
3848

3850            0,
3851            min(state.tutorial_step_index, len(TUTORIAL_STEPS) - 1)
3852        )
3853
3854        step = TUTORIAL_STEPS[step_index]
3855
3856        title = step.get(
3857            "title",
3858            "Tutorial"
3859        )
3860
3861        body, required = get_tutorial_step_text(state)
3862
3863        title_text = self.font.render(
3864            f"Tutorial {step_index + 1}/{len(TUTORIAL_STEPS)}: {title}",
3865            True,
3866            (255, 255, 255)
3867        )

3870            title_text,
3871            (panel.x + 30, panel.y + 25)
3872        )
