3875            body,
3876            True,
3877            (220, 220, 220)
3878        )
3879
3880        screen.blit(
3881            body_text,
3882            (panel.x + 30, panel.y + 78)
3883        )
3884
3885        required_text = self.font.render(
3886            required,
3887            True,
3888            (255, 255, 255)
3889        )
3890
3891        screen.blit(
3892            required_text,
3893            (panel.x + 30, panel.y + 118)
3894        )
3895
3896        hint_text = self.font.render(
3897            "ESC skips tutorial",
3898            True,
3899            (190, 190, 210)
3900        )
3901
3902        screen.blit(
3903            hint_text,
3904            (panel.x + 30, panel.y + 165)
3905        )
def draw_benchmark_results_overlay(self, screen, state): 
3907    def draw_benchmark_results_overlay(self, screen, state):
3908
3909        overlay = pg.Surface(
3910            (CONFIG.width, CONFIG.height),
3911            pg.SRCALPHA
3912        )
3913
3914        overlay.fill((0, 0, 0, 180))
3915        screen.blit(overlay, (0, 0))
3916
3917        panel_width = min(
3918            900,
3919            CONFIG.width - 120
3920        )
3921
3922        panel_height = min(
3923            560,
3924            CONFIG.height - 120
3925        )
3926
3927        panel = pg.Rect(
3928            CONFIG.width // 2 - panel_width // 2,
3929            CONFIG.height // 2 - panel_height // 2,
3930            panel_width,
3931            panel_height
3932        )
3933
3934        pg.draw.rect(
3935            screen,
3936            (20, 20, 24),
3937            panel,
3938            border_radius=16
3939        )
3940
3941        pg.draw.rect(
3942            screen,
3943            (90, 90, 140),
3944            panel,
3945            width=2,
3946            border_radius=16
3947        )
3948
3949        y = panel.y + 40
3950
3951        for index, line in enumerate(state.benchmark_result_lines):
3952
3953            font = self.font if index == 0 else self.font
3954
3955            text = font.render(
3956                line,
3957                True,
3958                (255, 255, 255)
3959            )
3960
3961            screen.blit(
3962                text,
3963                (panel.x + 40, y)
3964            )
3965
3966            y += 42
class MenuUI: 
3974class MenuUI:
3975
3976    def __init__(self):
3977
3978        self.font = pg.font.SysFont(
3979            CONFIG.font_name,
3980            34
3981        )
3982
3983        self.small_font = pg.font.SysFont(
3984            CONFIG.font_name,
3985            22
3986        )
3987
3988    def update_hover_sound(
3989        self,
3990        state,
3991        audio_manager,
3992        hovered_item
3993    ):
3994
3995        if hovered_item != state.hovered_menu_item:
3996
3997            state.hovered_menu_item = hovered_item
3998
3999            if hovered_item:
4000                audio_manager.play_hover()
4001
4002    def draw(self, screen, state, audio_manager):
4003
4004        overlay = pg.Surface(
4005            (CONFIG.width, CONFIG.height),
4006            pg.SRCALPHA
4007        )
4008
4009        overlay.fill((0, 0, 0, 180))
4010
4011        screen.blit(overlay, (0, 0))
4012
4013        title = self.font.render(
4014            "SETTINGS MENU",
4015            True,
4016            (255, 255, 255)
4017        )
4018
4019        screen.blit(title, (50, 50))
4020
4021        start_y = 240
4022
4023        mouse_x, mouse_y = pg.mouse.get_pos()
4024
4025        hovered_item = None
4026
4027        for i, option in enumerate(get_menu_options(state)):
4028
4029            rect = pg.Rect(
4030                CONFIG.width // 2 - 250,
4031                start_y + i * 70,
4032                500,
4033                55
4034            )
4035
4036            hovered = rect.collidepoint(
4037                mouse_x,
4038                mouse_y
4039            )
4040
4041            if hovered:
4042                hovered_item = f"menu:{option}"
4043
4044            selected = (
4045                hovered or
4046                i == state.menu_index
4047            )
4048
4049            bg = (
4050                (80, 80, 120)
4051                if selected
4052                else
4053                (40, 40, 40)
4054            )
4055
4056            pg.draw.rect(
4057                screen,
4058                bg,
4059                rect,
4060                border_radius=10
4061            )
4062
4063            text = self.font.render(
4064                option,
4065                True,
4066                (255, 255, 255)
4067            )
4068
4069            screen.blit(
4070                text,
4071                (
4072                    rect.x + 20,
4073                    rect.y + 10
4074                )
4075            )
4076
4077        submenu_hovered_item = self.draw_submenu(screen, state)
4078
4079        if submenu_hovered_item:
4080            hovered_item = submenu_hovered_item
4081
4082        if state.preset_name_input_active:
4083            self.draw_preset_name_modal(screen, state)
4084
4085        self.update_hover_sound(
4086            state,
4087            audio_manager,
4088            hovered_item
4089        )
4090
4091    def draw_preset_name_modal(self, screen, state):
4092
4093        modal = pg.Rect(
4094            CONFIG.width // 2 - 330,
4095            CONFIG.height // 2 - 120,
4096            660,
4097            220
4098        )
4099
4100        pg.draw.rect(
4101            screen,
4102            (20, 20, 20),
4103            modal,
4104            border_radius=16
4105        )
4106
4107        pg.draw.rect(
4108            screen,
4109            (90, 90, 140),
4110            modal,
4111            width=2,
4112            border_radius=16
4113        )
4114
4115        title = self.font.render(
4116            "Add Current Preset",
4117            True,
4118            (255, 255, 255)
4119        )
4120
4121        screen.blit(
4122            title,
4123            (modal.x + 30, modal.y + 25)
4124        )
4125
4126        input_rect = pg.Rect(
4127            modal.x + 30,
4128            modal.y + 85,
4129            modal.width - 60,
4130            46
4131        )
4132
4133        pg.draw.rect(
4134            screen,
4135            (35, 35, 35),
4136            input_rect,
4137            border_radius=8
4138        )
4139
4140        text = self.small_font.render(
4141            state.preset_name_input + "_",
4142            True,
4143            (255, 255, 255)
4144        )
4145
4146        screen.blit(
4147            text,
4148            (input_rect.x + 12, input_rect.y + 12)
4149        )
4150
4151        hint = self.small_font.render(
4152            "Enter = save    Escape = cancel",
4153            True,
4154            (220, 220, 220)
4155        )
4156
4157        screen.blit(
4158            hint,
4159            (modal.x + 30, modal.y + 155)
4160        )
4161
4162    def draw_option_rows(
4163        self,
4164        screen,
4165        rows,
4166        selected_index,
4167        hover_prefix,
4168        panel,
4169        y
4170    ):
4171
4172        mouse_x, mouse_y = pg.mouse.get_pos()
4173        hovered_item = None
4174
4175        for i, label in enumerate(rows):
4176
4177            rect = pg.Rect(
4178                panel.x + 30,
4179                y,
4180                panel.width - 60,
4181                42
4182            )
4183
4184            hovered = rect.collidepoint(
4185                mouse_x,
4186                mouse_y
4187            )
4188
4189            if hovered:
4190                hovered_item = f"{hover_prefix}:{i}"
4191
4192            selected = (
4193                i == selected_index
4194            )
4195
4196            bg = (
4197                (80, 80, 120)
4198                if selected or hovered
4199                else
4200                (35, 35, 35)
4201            )
4202
4203            pg.draw.rect(
4204                screen,
4205                bg,
4206                rect,
4207                border_radius=8
4208            )
4209
4210            text = self.small_font.render(
4211                label,
4212                True,
4213                (255, 255, 255)
4214            )
4215
4216            screen.blit(
4217                text,
4218                (
4219                    rect.x + 10,
4220                    rect.y + 10
4221                )
4222            )
4223
4224            y += 52
4225
4226        return hovered_item
4227
4228    def draw_volume_slider(
4229        self,
4230        screen,
4231        panel,
4232        y,
4233        label,
4234        value,
4235        hover_id
4236    ):
4237
4238        mouse_x, mouse_y = pg.mouse.get_pos()
4239
4240        slider_rect = pg.Rect(
4241            panel.x + 260,
4242            y + 6,
4243            panel.width - 360,
4244            22
4245        )
4246
4247        hit_rect = slider_rect.inflate(
4248            20,
4249            34
4250        )
4251
4252        hovered = hit_rect.collidepoint(
4253            mouse_x,
4254            mouse_y
4255        )
4256
4257        label_text = self.small_font.render(
4258            f"{label}: {int(value * 100):3d}%",
4259            True,
4260            (255, 255, 255)
4261        )
4262
4263        screen.blit(
4264            label_text,
4265            (panel.x + 30, y)
4266        )
4267
4268        bg = (
4269            (80, 80, 120)
4270            if hovered
4271            else (45, 45, 45)
4272        )
4273
4274        pg.draw.rect(
4275            screen,
4276            bg,
4277            slider_rect,
4278            border_radius=10
4279        )
4280
4281        fill_rect = pg.Rect(
4282            slider_rect.x,
4283            slider_rect.y,
4284            int(slider_rect.width * clamp_volume(value)),
4285            slider_rect.height
4286        )
4287
4288        pg.draw.rect(
4289            screen,
4290            (120, 120, 180),
4291            fill_rect,
4292            border_radius=10
4293        )
4294
4295        knob_x = (
4296            slider_rect.x +
4297            int(slider_rect.width * clamp_volume(value))
4298        )
4299
4300        pg.draw.circle(
4301            screen,
4302            (230, 230, 255),
4303            (knob_x, slider_rect.centery),
4304            15
4305        )
4306
4307        if hovered:
4308            return hover_id
4309
4310        return None
4311
4312    def draw_submenu(self, screen, state):
4313
4314        if not state.submenu_open:
4315            return None
4316
4317        panel = pg.Rect(
4318            80,
4319            120,
4320            CONFIG.width - 160,
4321            CONFIG.height - 240
4322        )
4323
4324        pg.draw.rect(
4325            screen,
4326            (18, 18, 18),
4327            panel,
4328            border_radius=16
4329        )
4330
4331        y = panel.y + 30
4332
4333        lines = []
4334
4335        mouse_x, mouse_y = pg.mouse.get_pos()
4336        hovered_item = None
4337
4338        title = self.font.render(
4339            state.submenu_open,
4340            True,
4341            (255, 255, 255)
4342        )
4343
4344        screen.blit(
4345            title,
4346            (panel.x + 30, panel.y - 60)
4347        )
4348
4349        category_options = get_category_options(
4350            state,
4351            state.submenu_open
4352        )
4353
4354        if category_options:
4355
4356            rows = []
4357
4358            for option in category_options:
4359
4360                label = option
4361
4362                if option == "Show Performance Info":
4363                    label = (
4364                        "Show Performance Info: " +
4365                        ("ON" if CONFIG.show_performance_info else "OFF")
4366                    )
4367
4368                rows.append(label)
4369
4370            return self.draw_option_rows(
4371                screen,
4372                rows,
4373                -1,
4374                f"submenu:{state.submenu_open}",
4375                panel,
4376                y
4377            )
4378
4379        if state.submenu_open == "Audio Settings":
4380
4381            music_hover = self.draw_volume_slider(
4382                screen,
4383                panel,
4384                y + 80,
4385                "Music Volume",
4386                CONFIG.music_volume,
4387                "submenu:audio:music"
4388            )
4389
4390            ui_hover = self.draw_volume_slider(
4391                screen,
4392                panel,
4393                y + 190,
4394                "UI Volume",
4395                CONFIG.ui_volume,
4396                "submenu:audio:ui"
4397            )
4398
4399            return music_hover or ui_hover
4400
4401        if state.submenu_open == "Palette":
4402
4403            rows = [
4404                palette["name"]
4405                for palette in PALETTES
4406            ]
4407
4408            return self.draw_option_rows(
4409                screen,
4410                rows,
4411                state.current_palette,
4412                "submenu:palette",
4413                panel,
4414                y
4415            )
4416
4417        elif state.submenu_open == "Power":
4418
4419            if is_parameter_edit_locked(state):
4420
4421                warning = self.small_font.render(
4422                    "Parameter editing locked: zoom out to change power",
4423                    True,
4424                    (255, 220, 120)
4425                )
4426
4427                screen.blit(
4428                    warning,
4429                    (panel.x + 30, y)
4430                )
4431
4432                y += 42
4433
4434            rows = [
4435                f"Power {power}"
4436                for power in POWER_VALUES
4437            ]
4438
4439            selected = POWER_VALUES.index(
4440                state.fractal_power
4441            )
4442
4443            return self.draw_option_rows(
4444                screen,
4445                rows,
4446                selected,
4447                "submenu:power",
4448                panel,
4449                y
4450            )
4451
4452        elif state.submenu_open == "Iterations":
4453
4454            lines = [
4455                f"Current Iterations: {state.max_iter}",
4456                "",
4457                "Q = decrease",
4458                "E = increase"
4459            ]
4460
4461        elif state.submenu_open == "Game Resolution":
4462
4463            rows = [
4464                f"{width}x{height}"
4465                for width, height in GAME_RESOLUTION_PRESETS
4466            ]
4467
4468            selected = GAME_RESOLUTION_PRESETS.index(
4469                (CONFIG.base_width, CONFIG.base_height)
4470            )
4471
4472            return self.draw_option_rows(
4473                screen,
4474                rows,
4475                selected,
4476                "submenu:game_resolution",
4477                panel,
4478                y
4479            )
4480
4481        elif state.submenu_open == "PNG Resolution":
4482
4483            rows = [
4484                f"{width}x{height}"
4485                for width, height in PNG_RESOLUTION_PRESETS
4486            ]
4487
4488            selected = PNG_RESOLUTION_PRESETS.index(
4489                (
4490                    CONFIG.png_export_width,
4491                    CONFIG.png_export_height
4492                )
4493            )
4494
4495            return self.draw_option_rows(
4496                screen,
4497                rows,
4498                selected,
4499                "submenu:png_resolution",
4500                panel,
4501                y
4502            )
4503
4504        elif state.submenu_open == "GIF Resolution":
4505
4506            rows = [
4507                f"{width}x{height}"
4508                for width, height in GIF_RESOLUTION_PRESETS
4509            ]
4510
4511            selected = GIF_RESOLUTION_PRESETS.index(
4512                (
4513                    CONFIG.gif_export_width,
4514                    CONFIG.gif_export_height
4515                )
4516            )
4517
4518            return self.draw_option_rows(
4519                screen,
4520                rows,
4521                selected,
4522                "submenu:gif_resolution",
4523                panel,
4524                y
4525            )
4526
4527        elif state.submenu_open == "Show Performance Info":
4528
4529            lines = [
4530                "Show Performance Info: " +
4531                ("ON" if CONFIG.show_performance_info else "OFF"),
4532                "",
4533                "Enter/LEFT/RIGHT/click = toggle"
4534            ]
4535
4536        elif state.submenu_open == "Fractal Type":
4537
4538            fractals = [
4539                (FractalType.MANDELBROT, "Mandelbrot"),
4540                (FractalType.JULIA, "Julia Set"),
4541                (FractalType.BURNING_SHIP, "Burning Ship"),
4542            ]
4543
4544            rows = [
4545                label
4546                for fractal_type, label in fractals
4547            ]
4548
4549            selected = [
4550                fractal_type
4551                for fractal_type, label in fractals
4552            ].index(state.current_fractal)
4553
4554            return self.draw_option_rows(
4555                screen,
4556                rows,
4557                selected,
4558                "submenu:fractal",
4559                panel,
4560                y
4561            )
4562
4563        elif state.submenu_open == "Mandelbrot Presets":
4564
4565            if is_parameter_edit_locked(state):
4566
4567                warning = self.small_font.render(
4568                    "Parameter editing locked: zoom out to change presets",
4569                    True,
4570                    (255, 220, 120)
4571                )
4572
4573                screen.blit(
4574                    warning,
4575                    (panel.x + 30, y)
4576                )
4577
4578                y += 42
4579
4580            add_rect = pg.Rect(
4581                panel.x + 30,
4582                y,
4583                panel.width - 60,
4584                42
4585            )
4586
4587            add_hovered = add_rect.collidepoint(
4588                mouse_x,
4589                mouse_y
4590            )
4591
4592            if add_hovered:
4593                hovered_item = "submenu:mandelbrot:add"
4594
4595            pg.draw.rect(
4596                screen,
4597                (70, 70, 110) if add_hovered else (35, 35, 35),
4598                add_rect,
4599                border_radius=8
4600            )
4601
4602            text = self.small_font.render(
4603                "Add Current Preset",
4604                True,
4605                (255, 255, 255)
4606            )
4607
4608            screen.blit(
4609                text,
4610                (add_rect.x + 10, add_rect.y + 10)
4611            )
4612
4613            y += 52
4614
4615            for i, preset in enumerate(
4616                get_combined_mandelbrot_presets(state)
4617            ):
4618
4619                name = preset["name"]
4620                zx = preset["mandelbrot_zx"]
4621                zy = preset["mandelbrot_zy"]
4622
4623                rect = pg.Rect(
4624                    panel.x + 30,
4625                    y,
4626                    panel.width - 60,
4627                    42
4628                )
4629
4630                delete_rect = pg.Rect(
4631                    rect.right - 52,
4632                    rect.y + 6,
4633                    36,
4634                    30
4635                )
4636
4637                hovered = rect.collidepoint(
4638                    mouse_x,
4639                    mouse_y
4640                )
4641
4642                if hovered:
4643                    hovered_item = f"submenu:mandelbrot:{i}"
4644
4645                selected = (
4646                    i == state.mandelbrot_preset_index
4647                )
4648
4649                bg = (
4650                    (80, 80, 120)
4651                    if selected
4652                    else
4653                    (35, 35, 35)
4654                )
4655
4656                pg.draw.rect(
4657                    screen,
4658                    bg,
4659                    rect,
4660                    border_radius=8
4661                )
4662
4663                label = f"{name}  ({zx:.6f}, {zy:.6f})"
4664
4665                if preset.get("custom"):
4666                    label += "  [custom]"
4667
4668                text = self.small_font.render(
4669                    label,
4670                    True,
4671                    (255, 255, 255)
4672                )
4673
4674                screen.blit(
4675                    text,
4676                    (
4677                        rect.x + 10,
4678                        rect.y + 10
4679                    )
4680                )
4681
4682                if preset.get("custom"):
4683                    delete_hovered = delete_rect.collidepoint(
4684                        mouse_x,
4685                        mouse_y
4686                    )
4687
4688                    if delete_hovered:
4689                        hovered_item = f"submenu:mandelbrot:delete:{i}"
4690
4691                    pg.draw.rect(
4692                        screen,
4693                        (110, 50, 50) if delete_hovered else (70, 40, 40),
4694                        delete_rect,
4695                        border_radius=6
4696                    )
4697
4698                    delete_text = self.small_font.render(
4699                        "X",
4700                        True,
4701                        (255, 255, 255)
4702                    )
4703
4704                    screen.blit(
4705                        delete_text,
4706                        (delete_rect.x + 11, delete_rect.y + 4)
4707                    )
4708
4709                y += 52
4710
4711            return hovered_item
4712
4713        elif state.submenu_open == "Julia Presets":
4714
4715            if is_parameter_edit_locked(state):
4716
4717                warning = self.small_font.render(
4718                    "Parameter editing locked: zoom out to change presets",
4719                    True,
4720                    (255, 220, 120)
4721                )
4722
4723                screen.blit(
4724                    warning,
4725                    (panel.x + 30, y)
4726                )
4727
4728                y += 42
4729
4730            add_rect = pg.Rect(
4731                panel.x + 30,
4732                y,
4733                panel.width - 60,
4734                42
4735            )
4736
4737            add_hovered = add_rect.collidepoint(
4738                mouse_x,
4739                mouse_y
4740            )
4741
4742            if add_hovered:
4743                hovered_item = "submenu:julia:add"
4744
4745            pg.draw.rect(
4746                screen,
4747                (70, 70, 110) if add_hovered else (35, 35, 35),
4748                add_rect,
4749                border_radius=8
4750            )
4751
4752            text = self.small_font.render(
4753                "Add Current Preset",
4754                True,
4755                (255, 255, 255)
4756            )
4757
4758            screen.blit(
4759                text,
4760                (add_rect.x + 10, add_rect.y + 10)
4761            )
4762
4763            y += 52
4764
4765            for i, preset in enumerate(
4766                get_combined_julia_presets(state)
4767            ):
4768
4769                name = preset["name"]
4770                cx = preset["julia_cx"]
4771                cy = preset["julia_cy"]
4772
4773                rect = pg.Rect(
4774                    panel.x + 30,
4775                    y,
4776                    panel.width - 60,
4777                    42
4778                )
4779
4780                delete_rect = pg.Rect(
4781                    rect.right - 52,
4782                    rect.y + 6,
4783                    36,
4784                    30
4785                )
4786
4787                hovered = rect.collidepoint(
4788                    mouse_x,
4789                    mouse_y
4790                )
4791
4792                if hovered:
4793                    hovered_item = f"submenu:julia:{i}"
4794
4795                selected = (
4796                    i == state.julia_preset_index
4797                )
4798
4799                bg = (
4800                    (80, 80, 120)
4801                    if selected
4802                    else
4803                    (35, 35, 35)
4804                )
4805
4806                pg.draw.rect(
4807                    screen,
4808                    bg,
4809                    rect,
4810                    border_radius=8
4811                )
4812
4813                label = f"{name}  ({cx:.6f}, {cy:.6f})"
4814
4815                if preset.get("custom"):
4816                    label += "  [custom]"
4817
4818                text = self.small_font.render(
4819                    label,
4820                    True,
4821                    (255, 255, 255)
4822                )
4823
4824                screen.blit(
4825                    text,
4826                    (
4827                        rect.x + 10,
4828                        rect.y + 10
4829                    )
4830                )
4831
4832                if preset.get("custom"):
4833                    delete_hovered = delete_rect.collidepoint(
4834                        mouse_x,
4835                        mouse_y
4836                    )
4837
4838                    if delete_hovered:
4839                        hovered_item = f"submenu:julia:delete:{i}"
4840
4841                    pg.draw.rect(
4842                        screen,
4843                        (110, 50, 50) if delete_hovered else (70, 40, 40),
4844                        delete_rect,
4845                        border_radius=6
4846                    )
4847
4848                    delete_text = self.small_font.render(
4849                        "X",
4850                        True,
4851                        (255, 255, 255)
4852                    )
4853
4854                    screen.blit(
4855                        delete_text,
4856                        (delete_rect.x + 11, delete_rect.y + 4)
4857                    )
4858
4859                y += 52
4860
4861            return hovered_item
4862
4863        elif state.submenu_open == "Achievements":
4864
4865            for achievement_id, data in ACHIEVEMENTS.items():
4866
4867                name, description = data
4868
4869                unlocked = state.user_progress.get(
4870                    "achievements",
4871                    {}
4872                ).get(achievement_id, False)
4873
4874                rect = pg.Rect(
4875                    panel.x + 30,
4876                    y,
4877                    panel.width - 60,
4878                    58
4879                )
4880
4881                pg.draw.rect(
4882                    screen,
4883                    (55, 70, 55) if unlocked else (35, 35, 35),
4884                    rect,
4885                    border_radius=8
4886                )
4887
4888                title = (
4889                    f"{name} - Unlocked"
4890                    if unlocked
4891                    else f"{name} - Locked"
4892                )
4893
4894                title_text = self.small_font.render(
4895                    title,
4896                    True,
4897                    (255, 255, 255)
4898                )
4899
4900                desc_text = self.small_font.render(
4901                    description if unlocked else "Locked",
4902                    True,
4903                    (210, 210, 210)
4904                )
4905
4906                screen.blit(
4907                    title_text,
4908                    (rect.x + 10, rect.y + 8)
4909                )
4910
4911                screen.blit(
4912                    desc_text,
4913                    (rect.x + 10, rect.y + 32)
4914                )
4915
4916                y += 68
4917
4918            return hovered_item
4919
4920        elif state.submenu_open == "Controls":
4921
4922            lines = [
4923                "WASD = move",
4924                "Mouse wheel = zoom",
4925                "Left click = center",
4926                "Q/E = iterations",
4927                "R/F = palettes",
4928                "I/J/K/L = edit Julia or Mandelbrot parameters",
4929                "P = export PNG",
4930                "Export Settings -> Export GIF = zoom animation"
4931            ]
4932
4933        for line in lines:
4934
4935            text = self.small_font.render(
4936                line,
4937                True,
4938                (220, 220, 220)
4939            )
4940
4941            screen.blit(
4942                text,
4943                (panel.x + 40, y)
4944            )
4945
4946            y += 34
4947
4948        return hovered_item
font
small_font
def update_hover_sound(self, state, audio_manager, hovered_item): 
3988    def update_hover_sound(
3989        self,
3990        state,
3991        audio_manager,
3992        hovered_item
3993    ):
3994
3995        if hovered_item != state.hovered_menu_item:
3996
3997            state.hovered_menu_item = hovered_item
3998
3999            if hovered_item:
4000                audio_manager.play_hover()
def draw(self, screen, state, audio_manager): 
4002    def draw(self, screen, state, audio_manager):
4003
4004        overlay = pg.Surface(
4005            (CONFIG.width, CONFIG.height),
4006            pg.SRCALPHA
4007        )
4008
4009        overlay.fill((0, 0, 0, 180))
4010
4011        screen.blit(overlay, (0, 0))
4012
4013        title = self.font.render(
4014            "SETTINGS MENU",
4015            True,
4016            (255, 255, 255)
4017        )
4018
4019        screen.blit(title, (50, 50))
4020
4021        start_y = 240
4022
4023        mouse_x, mouse_y = pg.mouse.get_pos()
4024
4025        hovered_item = None
4026
4027        for i, option in enumerate(get_menu_options(state)):
4028
4029            rect = pg.Rect(
4030                CONFIG.width // 2 - 250,
4031                start_y + i * 70,
4032                500,
4033                55
4034            )
4035
4036            hovered = rect.collidepoint(
4037                mouse_x,
4038                mouse_y
4039            )
4040
4041            if hovered:
4042                hovered_item = f"menu:{option}"
4043
4044            selected = (
4045                hovered or
4046                i == state.menu_index
4047            )
4048
4049            bg = (
4050                (80, 80, 120)
4051                if selected
4052                else
4053                (40, 40, 40)
4054            )
4055
4056            pg.draw.rect(
4057                screen,
4058                bg,
4059                rect,
4060                border_radius=10
4061            )
4062
4063            text = self.font.render(
4064                option,
4065                True,
4066                (255, 255, 255)
4067            )
4068
4069            screen.blit(
4070                text,
4071                (
4072                    rect.x + 20,
4073                    rect.y + 10
4074                )
4075            )
4076
4077        submenu_hovered_item = self.draw_submenu(screen, state)
4078
4079        if submenu_hovered_item:
4080            hovered_item = submenu_hovered_item
4081
4082        if state.preset_name_input_active:
4083            self.draw_preset_name_modal(screen, state)
4084
4085        self.update_hover_sound(
4086            state,
4087            audio_manager,
4088            hovered_item
4089        )
def draw_preset_name_modal(self, screen, state): 
4091    def draw_preset_name_modal(self, screen, state):
4092
4093        modal = pg.Rect(
4094            CONFIG.width // 2 - 330,
4095            CONFIG.height // 2 - 120,
4096            660,
4097            220
4098        )
4099
4100        pg.draw.rect(
4101            screen,
4102            (20, 20, 20),
4103            modal,
4104            border_radius=16
4105        )
4106
4107        pg.draw.rect(
4108            screen,
4109            (90, 90, 140),
4110            modal,
4111            width=2,
4112            border_radius=16
4113        )
4114
4115        title = self.font.render(
4116            "Add Current Preset",
4117            True,
4118            (255, 255, 255)
4119        )
4120
4121        screen.blit(
4122            title,
4123            (modal.x + 30, modal.y + 25)
4124        )
4125
4126        input_rect = pg.Rect(
4127            modal.x + 30,
4128            modal.y + 85,
4129            modal.width - 60,
4130            46
4131        )
4132
4133        pg.draw.rect(
4134            screen,
4135            (35, 35, 35),
4136            input_rect,
4137            border_radius=8
4138        )
4139
4140        text = self.small_font.render(
4141            state.preset_name_input + "_",
4142            True,
4143            (255, 255, 255)
4144        )
4145
4146        screen.blit(
4147            text,
4148            (input_rect.x + 12, input_rect.y + 12)
4149        )
4150
4151        hint = self.small_font.render(
4152            "Enter = save    Escape = cancel",
4153            True,
4154            (220, 220, 220)
4155        )
4156
4157        screen.blit(
4158            hint,
4159            (modal.x + 30, modal.y + 155)
4160        )
def draw_option_rows(self, screen, rows, selected_index, hover_prefix, panel, y): 
4162    def draw_option_rows(
4163        self,
4164        screen,
4165        rows,
4166        selected_index,
4167        hover_prefix,
4168        panel,
4169        y
4170    ):
4171
4172        mouse_x, mouse_y = pg.mouse.get_pos()
4173        hovered_item = None
4174
4175        for i, label in enumerate(rows):
4176
4177            rect = pg.Rect(
4178                panel.x + 30,
4179                y,
4180                panel.width - 60,
4181                42
4182            )
4183
4184            hovered = rect.collidepoint(
4185                mouse_x,
4186                mouse_y
4187            )
4188
4189            if hovered:
4190                hovered_item = f"{hover_prefix}:{i}"
4191
4192            selected = (
4193                i == selected_index
4194            )
4195
4196            bg = (
4197                (80, 80, 120)
4198                if selected or hovered
4199                else
4200                (35, 35, 35)
4201            )
4202
4203            pg.draw.rect(
4204                screen,
4205                bg,
4206                rect,
4207                border_radius=8
4208            )
4209
4210            text = self.small_font.render(
4211                label,
4212                True,
4213                (255, 255, 255)
4214            )
4215
4216            screen.blit(
4217                text,
4218                (
4219                    rect.x + 10,
4220                    rect.y + 10
4221                )
4222            )
4223
4224            y += 52
4225
4226        return hovered_item
def draw_volume_slider(self, screen, panel, y, label, value, hover_id): 
4228    def draw_volume_slider(
4229        self,
4230        screen,
4231        panel,
4232        y,
4233        label,
4234        value,
4235        hover_id
4236    ):
4237
4238        mouse_x, mouse_y = pg.mouse.get_pos()
4239
4240        slider_rect = pg.Rect(
4241            panel.x + 260,
4242            y + 6,
4243            panel.width - 360,
4244            22
4245        )
4246
4247        hit_rect = slider_rect.inflate(
4248            20,
4249            34
4250        )
4251
4252        hovered = hit_rect.collidepoint(
4253            mouse_x,
4254            mouse_y
4255        )
4256
4257        label_text = self.small_font.render(
4258            f"{label}: {int(value * 100):3d}%",
4259            True,
4260            (255, 255, 255)
4261        )
4262
4263        screen.blit(
4264            label_text,
4265            (panel.x + 30, y)
4266        )
4267
4268        bg = (
4269            (80, 80, 120)
4270            if hovered
4271            else (45, 45, 45)
4272        )
4273
4274        pg.draw.rect(
4275            screen,
4276            bg,
4277            slider_rect,
4278            border_radius=10
4279        )
4280
4281        fill_rect = pg.Rect(
4282            slider_rect.x,
4283            slider_rect.y,
4284            int(slider_rect.width * clamp_volume(value)),
4285            slider_rect.height
4286        )
4287
4288        pg.draw.rect(
4289            screen,
4290            (120, 120, 180),
4291            fill_rect,
4292            border_radius=10
4293        )
4294
4295        knob_x = (
4296            slider_rect.x +
4297            int(slider_rect.width * clamp_volume(value))
4298        )
4299
4300        pg.draw.circle(
4301            screen,
4302            (230, 230, 255),
4303            (knob_x, slider_rect.centery),
4304            15
4305        )
4306
4307        if hovered:
4308            return hover_id
4309
4310        return None
def draw_submenu(self, screen, state): 
4312    def draw_submenu(self, screen, state):
4313
4314        if not state.submenu_open:
4315            return None
4316
4317        panel = pg.Rect(
4318            80,
4319            120,
4320            CONFIG.width - 160,
4321            CONFIG.height - 240
4322        )
4323
4324        pg.draw.rect(
4325            screen,
4326            (18, 18, 18),
4327            panel,
4328            border_radius=16
4329        )
4330
4331        y = panel.y + 30
4332
4333        lines = []
4334
4335        mouse_x, mouse_y = pg.mouse.get_pos()
4336        hovered_item = None
4337
4338        title = self.font.render(
4339            state.submenu_open,
4340            True,
4341            (255, 255, 255)
4342        )
4343
4344        screen.blit(
4345            title,
4346            (panel.x + 30, panel.y - 60)
4347        )
4348
4349        category_options = get_category_options(
4350            state,
4351            state.submenu_open
4352        )
4353
4354        if category_options:
4355
4356            rows = []
4357
4358            for option in category_options:
4359
4360                label = option
4361
4362                if option == "Show Performance Info":
4363                    label = (
4364                        "Show Performance Info: " +
4365                        ("ON" if CONFIG.show_performance_info else "OFF")
4366                    )
4367
4368                rows.append(label)
4369
4370            return self.draw_option_rows(
4371                screen,
4372                rows,
4373                -1,
4374                f"submenu:{state.submenu_open}",
4375                panel,
4376                y
4377            )
4378
4379        if state.submenu_open == "Audio Settings":
4380
4381            music_hover = self.draw_volume_slider(
4382                screen,
4383                panel,
4384                y + 80,
4385                "Music Volume",
4386                CONFIG.music_volume,
4387                "submenu:audio:music"
4388            )
4389
4390            ui_hover = self.draw_volume_slider(
4391                screen,
4392                panel,
4393                y + 190,
4394                "UI Volume",
4395                CONFIG.ui_volume,
4396                "submenu:audio:ui"
4397            )
4398
4399            return music_hover or ui_hover
4400
4401        if state.submenu_open == "Palette":
4402
4403            rows = [
4404                palette["name"]
4405                for palette in PALETTES
4406            ]
4407
4408            return self.draw_option_rows(
4409                screen,
4410                rows,
4411                state.current_palette,
4412                "submenu:palette",
4413                panel,
4414                y
4415            )
4416
4417        elif state.submenu_open == "Power":
4418
4419            if is_parameter_edit_locked(state):
4420
4421                warning = self.small_font.render(
4422                    "Parameter editing locked: zoom out to change power",
4423                    True,
4424                    (255, 220, 120)
4425                )
4426
4427                screen.blit(
4428                    warning,
4429                    (panel.x + 30, y)
4430                )
4431
4432                y += 42
4433
4434            rows = [
4435                f"Power {power}"
4436                for power in POWER_VALUES
4437            ]
4438
4439            selected = POWER_VALUES.index(
4440                state.fractal_power
4441            )
4442
4443            return self.draw_option_rows(
4444                screen,
4445                rows,
4446                selected,
4447                "submenu:power",
4448                panel,
4449                y
4450            )
4451
4452        elif state.submenu_open == "Iterations":
4453
4454            lines = [
4455                f"Current Iterations: {state.max_iter}",
4456                "",
4457                "Q = decrease",
4458                "E = increase"
4459            ]
4460
4461        elif state.submenu_open == "Game Resolution":
4462
4463            rows = [
4464                f"{width}x{height}"
4465                for width, height in GAME_RESOLUTION_PRESETS
4466            ]
4467
4468            selected = GAME_RESOLUTION_PRESETS.index(
4469                (CONFIG.base_width, CONFIG.base_height)
4470            )
4471
4472            return self.draw_option_rows(
4473                screen,
4474                rows,
4475                selected,
4476                "submenu:game_resolution",
4477                panel,
4478                y
4479            )
4480
4481        elif state.submenu_open == "PNG Resolution":
4482
4483            rows = [
4484                f"{width}x{height}"
4485                for width, height in PNG_RESOLUTION_PRESETS
4486            ]
4487
4488            selected = PNG_RESOLUTION_PRESETS.index(
4489                (
4490                    CONFIG.png_export_width,
4491                    CONFIG.png_export_height
4492                )
4493            )
4494
4495            return self.draw_option_rows(
4496                screen,
4497                rows,
4498                selected,
4499                "submenu:png_resolution",
4500                panel,
4501                y
4502            )
4503
4504        elif state.submenu_open == "GIF Resolution":
4505
4506            rows = [
4507                f"{width}x{height}"
4508                for width, height in GIF_RESOLUTION_PRESETS
4509            ]
4510
4511            selected = GIF_RESOLUTION_PRESETS.index(
4512                (
4513                    CONFIG.gif_export_width,
4514                    CONFIG.gif_export_height
4515                )
4516            )
4517
4518            return self.draw_option_rows(
4519                screen,
4520                rows,
4521                selected,
4522                "submenu:gif_resolution",
4523                panel,
4524                y
4525            )
4526
4527        elif state.submenu_open == "Show Performance Info":
4528
4529            lines = [
4530                "Show Performance Info: " +
4531                ("ON" if CONFIG.show_performance_info else "OFF"),
4532                "",
4533                "Enter/LEFT/RIGHT/click = toggle"
4534            ]
4535
4536        elif state.submenu_open == "Fractal Type":
4537
4538            fractals = [
4539                (FractalType.MANDELBROT, "Mandelbrot"),
4540                (FractalType.JULIA, "Julia Set"),
4541                (FractalType.BURNING_SHIP, "Burning Ship"),
4542            ]
4543
4544            rows = [
4545                label
4546                for fractal_type, label in fractals
4547            ]
4548
4549            selected = [
4550                fractal_type
4551                for fractal_type, label in fractals
4552            ].index(state.current_fractal)
4553
4554            return self.draw_option_rows(
4555                screen,
4556                rows,
4557                selected,
4558                "submenu:fractal",
4559                panel,
4560                y
4561            )
4562
4563        elif state.submenu_open == "Mandelbrot Presets":
4564
4565            if is_parameter_edit_locked(state):
4566
4567                warning = self.small_font.render(
4568                    "Parameter editing locked: zoom out to change presets",
4569                    True,
4570                    (255, 220, 120)
4571                )
4572
4573                screen.blit(
4574                    warning,
4575                    (panel.x + 30, y)
4576                )
4577
4578                y += 42
4579
4580            add_rect = pg.Rect(
4581                panel.x + 30,
4582                y,
4583                panel.width - 60,
4584                42
4585            )
4586
4587            add_hovered = add_rect.collidepoint(
4588                mouse_x,
4589                mouse_y
4590            )
4591
4592            if add_hovered:
4593                hovered_item = "submenu:mandelbrot:add"
4594
4595            pg.draw.rect(
4596                screen,
4597                (70, 70, 110) if add_hovered else (35, 35, 35),
4598                add_rect,
4599                border_radius=8
4600            )
4601
4602            text = self.small_font.render(
4603                "Add Current Preset",
4604                True,
4605                (255, 255, 255)
4606            )
4607
4608            screen.blit(
4609                text,
4610                (add_rect.x + 10, add_rect.y + 10)
4611            )
4612
4613            y += 52
4614
4615            for i, preset in enumerate(
4616                get_combined_mandelbrot_presets(state)
4617            ):
4618
4619                name = preset["name"]
4620                zx = preset["mandelbrot_zx"]
4621                zy = preset["mandelbrot_zy"]
4622
4623                rect = pg.Rect(
4624                    panel.x + 30,
4625                    y,
4626                    panel.width - 60,
4627                    42
4628                )
4629
4630                delete_rect = pg.Rect(
4631                    rect.right - 52,
4632                    rect.y + 6,
4633                    36,
4634                    30
4635                )
4636
4637                hovered = rect.collidepoint(
4638                    mouse_x,
4639                    mouse_y
4640                )
4641
4642                if hovered:
4643                    hovered_item = f"submenu:mandelbrot:{i}"
4644
4645                selected = (
4646                    i == state.mandelbrot_preset_index
4647                )
4648
4649                bg = (
4650                    (80, 80, 120)
4651                    if selected
4652                    else
4653                    (35, 35, 35)
4654                )
4655
4656                pg.draw.rect(
4657                    screen,
4658                    bg,
4659                    rect,
4660                    border_radius=8
4661                )
4662
4663                label = f"{name}  ({zx:.6f}, {zy:.6f})"
4664
4665                if preset.get("custom"):
4666                    label += "  [custom]"
4667
4668                text = self.small_font.render(
4669                    label,
4670                    True,
4671                    (255, 255, 255)
4672                )
4673
4674                screen.blit(
4675                    text,
4676                    (
4677                        rect.x + 10,
4678                        rect.y + 10
4679                    )
4680                )
4681
4682                if preset.get("custom"):
4683                    delete_hovered = delete_rect.collidepoint(
4684                        mouse_x,
4685                        mouse_y
4686                    )
4687
4688                    if delete_hovered:
4689                        hovered_item = f"submenu:mandelbrot:delete:{i}"
4690
4691                    pg.draw.rect(
4692                        screen,
4693                        (110, 50, 50) if delete_hovered else (70, 40, 40),
4694                        delete_rect,
4695                        border_radius=6
4696                    )
4697
4698                    delete_text = self.small_font.render(
4699                        "X",
4700                        True,
4701                        (255, 255, 255)
4702                    )
4703
4704                    screen.blit(
4705                        delete_text,
4706                        (delete_rect.x + 11, delete_rect.y + 4)
4707                    )
4708
4709                y += 52
4710
4711            return hovered_item
4712
4713        elif state.submenu_open == "Julia Presets":
4714
4715            if is_parameter_edit_locked(state):
4716
4717                warning = self.small_font.render(
4718                    "Parameter editing locked: zoom out to change presets",
4719                    True,
4720                    (255, 220, 120)
4721                )
4722
4723                screen.blit(
4724                    warning,
4725                    (panel.x + 30, y)
4726                )
4727
4728                y += 42
4729
4730            add_rect = pg.Rect(
4731                panel.x + 30,
4732                y,
4733                panel.width - 60,
4734                42
4735            )
4736
4737            add_hovered = add_rect.collidepoint(
4738                mouse_x,
4739                mouse_y
4740            )
4741
4742            if add_hovered:
4743                hovered_item = "submenu:julia:add"
4744
4745            pg.draw.rect(
4746                screen,
4747                (70, 70, 110) if add_hovered else (35, 35, 35),
4748                add_rect,
4749                border_radius=8
4750            )
4751
4752            text = self.small_font.render(
4753                "Add Current Preset",
4754                True,
4755                (255, 255, 255)
4756            )
4757
4758            screen.blit(
4759                text,
4760                (add_rect.x + 10, add_rect.y + 10)
4761            )
4762
4763            y += 52
4764
4765            for i, preset in enumerate(
4766                get_combined_julia_presets(state)
4767            ):
4768
4769                name = preset["name"]
4770                cx = preset["julia_cx"]
4771                cy = preset["julia_cy"]
4772
4773                rect = pg.Rect(
4774                    panel.x + 30,
4775                    y,
4776                    panel.width - 60,
4777                    42
4778                )
4779
4780                delete_rect = pg.Rect(
4781                    rect.right - 52,
4782                    rect.y + 6,
4783                    36,
4784                    30
4785                )
4786
4787                hovered = rect.collidepoint(
4788                    mouse_x,
4789                    mouse_y
4790                )
4791
4792                if hovered:
4793                    hovered_item = f"submenu:julia:{i}"
4794
4795                selected = (
4796                    i == state.julia_preset_index
4797                )
4798
4799                bg = (
4800                    (80, 80, 120)
4801                    if selected
4802                    else
4803                    (35, 35, 35)
4804                )
4805
4806                pg.draw.rect(
4807                    screen,
4808                    bg,
4809                    rect,
4810                    border_radius=8
4811                )
4812
4813                label = f"{name}  ({cx:.6f}, {cy:.6f})"
4814
4815                if preset.get("custom"):
4816                    label += "  [custom]"
4817
4818                text = self.small_font.render(
4819                    label,
4820                    True,
4821                    (255, 255, 255)
4822                )
4823
4824                screen.blit(
4825                    text,
4826                    (
4827                        rect.x + 10,
4828                        rect.y + 10
4829                    )
4830                )
4831
4832                if preset.get("custom"):
4833                    delete_hovered = delete_rect.collidepoint(
4834                        mouse_x,
4835                        mouse_y
4836                    )
4837
4838                    if delete_hovered:
4839                        hovered_item = f"submenu:julia:delete:{i}"
4840
4841                    pg.draw.rect(
4842                        screen,
4843                        (110, 50, 50) if delete_hovered else (70, 40, 40),
4844                        delete_rect,
4845                        border_radius=6
4846                    )
4847
4848                    delete_text = self.small_font.render(
4849                        "X",
4850                        True,
4851                        (255, 255, 255)
4852                    )
4853
4854                    screen.blit(
4855                        delete_text,
4856                        (delete_rect.x + 11, delete_rect.y + 4)
4857                    )
4858
4859                y += 52
4860
4861            return hovered_item
4862
4863        elif state.submenu_open == "Achievements":
4864
4865            for achievement_id, data in ACHIEVEMENTS.items():
4866
4867                name, description = data
4868
4869                unlocked = state.user_progress.get(
4870                    "achievements",
4871                    {}
4872                ).get(achievement_id, False)
4873
4874                rect = pg.Rect(
4875                    panel.x + 30,
4876                    y,
4877                    panel.width - 60,
4878                    58
4879                )
4880
4881                pg.draw.rect(
4882                    screen,
4883                    (55, 70, 55) if unlocked else (35, 35, 35),
4884                    rect,
4885                    border_radius=8
4886                )
4887
4888                title = (
4889                    f"{name} - Unlocked"
4890                    if unlocked
4891                    else f"{name} - Locked"
4892                )
4893
4894                title_text = self.small_font.render(
4895                    title,
4896                    True,
4897                    (255, 255, 255)
4898                )
4899
4900                desc_text = self.small_font.render(
4901                    description if unlocked else "Locked",
4902                    True,
4903                    (210, 210, 210)
4904                )
4905
4906                screen.blit(
4907                    title_text,
4908                    (rect.x + 10, rect.y + 8)
4909                )
4910
4911                screen.blit(
4912                    desc_text,
4913                    (rect.x + 10, rect.y + 32)
4914                )
4915
4916                y += 68
4917
4918            return hovered_item
4919
4920        elif state.submenu_open == "Controls":
4921
4922            lines = [
4923                "WASD = move",
4924                "Mouse wheel = zoom",
4925                "Left click = center",
4926                "Q/E = iterations",
4927                "R/F = palettes",
4928                "I/J/K/L = edit Julia or Mandelbrot parameters",
4929                "P = export PNG",
4930                "Export Settings -> Export GIF = zoom animation"
4931            ]
4932
4933        for line in lines:
4934
4935            text = self.small_font.render(
4936                line,
4937                True,
4938                (220, 220, 220)
4939            )
4940
4941            screen.blit(
4942                text,
4943                (panel.x + 40, y)
4944            )
4945
4946            y += 34
4947
4948        return hovered_item
class Renderer: 
4955class Renderer:
4956
4957    def __init__(self, screen):
4958
4959        self.screen = screen
4960
4961    def render_frame(
4962        self,
4963        state,
4964        ui,
4965        menu_ui,
4966        audio_manager
4967    ):
4968
4969        self.screen = pg.display.get_surface()
4970
4971        if state.needs_update:
4972
4973            t0 = time.perf_counter()
4974
4975            state.surface = compute_surface(
4976                state,
4977                CONFIG.width,
4978                CONFIG.height
4979            )
4980
4981            dt = time.perf_counter() - t0
4982
4983            # ====================================================
4984            # STORE RENDER STATS
4985            # ====================================================
4986
4987            state.last_render_time_ms = dt * 1000.0
4988
4989            if dt > 0.0:
4990                state.last_render_fps = 1.0 / dt
4991            else:
4992                state.last_render_fps = 0.0
4993
4994            state.needs_update = False
4995
4996            if CONFIG.show_performance_info:
4997                pg.display.set_caption(
4998                    f"{CONFIG.window_title} "
4999                    f"| render {state.last_render_time_ms:.1f} ms "
5000                    f"| {state.last_render_fps:.1f} FPS"
5001                )
5002            else:
5003                pg.display.set_caption(
5004                    CONFIG.window_title
5005                )
5006
5007        if state.surface:
5008
5009            self.screen.blit(
5010                state.surface,
5011                (0, 0)
5012            )
5013
5014        ui.draw(self.screen, state)
5015
5016        if state.menu_open:
5017
5018            menu_ui.draw(
5019                self.screen,
5020                state,
5021                audio_manager
5022            )
5023
5024        if state.benchmark_results_open:
5025
5026            ui.draw_benchmark_results_overlay(
5027                self.screen,
5028                state
5029            )
Renderer(screen) 
4957    def __init__(self, screen):
4958
4959        self.screen = screen
screen
def render_frame(self, state, ui, menu_ui, audio_manager): 
4961    def render_frame(
4962        self,
4963        state,
4964        ui,
4965        menu_ui,
4966        audio_manager
4967    ):
4968
4969        self.screen = pg.display.get_surface()
4970
4971        if state.needs_update:
4972
4973            t0 = time.perf_counter()
4974
4975            state.surface = compute_surface(
4976                state,
4977                CONFIG.width,
4978                CONFIG.height
4979            )
4980
4981            dt = time.perf_counter() - t0
4982
4983            # ====================================================
4984            # STORE RENDER STATS
4985            # ====================================================
4986
4987            state.last_render_time_ms = dt * 1000.0
4988
4989            if dt > 0.0:
4990                state.last_render_fps = 1.0 / dt
4991            else:
4992                state.last_render_fps = 0.0
4993
4994            state.needs_update = False
4995
4996            if CONFIG.show_performance_info:
4997                pg.display.set_caption(
4998                    f"{CONFIG.window_title} "
4999                    f"| render {state.last_render_time_ms:.1f} ms "
5000                    f"| {state.last_render_fps:.1f} FPS"
5001                )
5002            else:
5003                pg.display.set_caption(
5004                    CONFIG.window_title
5005                )
5006
5007        if state.surface:
5008
5009            self.screen.blit(
5010                state.surface,
5011                (0, 0)
5012            )
5013
5014        ui.draw(self.screen, state)
5015
5016        if state.menu_open:
5017
5018            menu_ui.draw(
5019                self.screen,
5020                state,
5021                audio_manager
5022            )
5023
5024        if state.benchmark_results_open:
5025
5026            ui.draw_benchmark_results_overlay(
5027                self.screen,
5028                state
5029            )
class Application: 
5036class Application:
5037
5038    def __init__(self):
5039
5040        apply_user_settings_to_config(
5041            load_user_settings()
5042        )
5043
5044        pg.init()
5045
5046        self.screen = pg.display.set_mode(
5047            (
5048                CONFIG.width,
5049                CONFIG.height
5050            )
5051        )
5052
5053        pg.display.set_caption(
5054            CONFIG.window_title
5055        )
5056
5057        self.clock = pg.time.Clock()
5058
5059        self.audio_manager = AudioManager()
5060        self.audio_manager.start_music()
5061
5062        self.state = create_initial_state()
5063        self.state.custom_presets = load_user_presets()
5064        self.state.user_progress = load_user_progress()
5065
5066        if not self.state.user_progress.get("tutorial_completed", False):
5067            self.state.tutorial_active = True
5068
5069        self.ui = UI()
5070
5071        self.menu_ui = MenuUI()
5072
5073        self.renderer = Renderer(
5074            self.screen
5075        )
5076
5077    def run(self):
5078
5079        while self.state.running:
5080
5081            InputHandler.process_events(
5082                self.state,
5083                self.audio_manager
5084            )
5085
5086            self.renderer.render_frame(
5087                self.state,
5088                self.ui,
5089                self.menu_ui,
5090                self.audio_manager
5091            )
5092
5093            pg.display.flip()
5094
5095            self.clock.tick(
5096                CONFIG.target_fps
5097            )
5098
5099        pg.quit()
screen
clock
audio_manager
state
ui
menu_ui
renderer

5085

5091            )
5092

5094
5095            self.clock.tick(
5096                CONFIG.target_fps
5097            )
5098
5099        pg.quit()
def main(): 
5106def main():
5107
5108    app = Application()
5109
5110    app.run()
